predicted_review: I'm absolutely delighted with this Valobra Fougere Hard Soap Pot! The scent is lovely and long-lasting. I appreciate the natural ingredients and the eco-friendly packaging. It's a great addition to my daily skincare routine. One thing that really impressed me is how well it lathers and the gentle exfoliation it provides. I've been using it for a while now, and I've noticed a significant improvement in my skin texture. I highly recommend this soap to anyone looking for a high-quality, natural, and effective cleansing experience.

Another amazing product from Clinique! The Clinique ID Custom Blend dramatically different moisturizing lotion + fatigue cartridge is a game-changer. It's easy to apply, absorbs quickly, and leaves my skin feeling hydrated and plump. I love that it helps to smooth out fine lines and reduce fatigue. The packaging is sleek and modern, and I appreciate the fact that it's a custom blend. I've been using it nonstop and will definitely be repurchasing. Great product, great brand - what more can I say?

I'm absolutely thrilled with these Lacer Human Hair Clip in Hair Extensions! As someone who loves natural hair products, I was a bit skeptical about using clip-ins, but these have exceeded my expectations. The silky straight hair is so soft and looks incredibly realistic. I love the light platinum blond color too, it's perfect for adding a subtle touch to my looks. The quality is exceptional and the price is unbeatable. I've been using them nonstop since I got them and I can't recommend them enough!

Another fantastic addition to my skincare routine! I was a bit skeptical about a bar shampoo, but J.R.Liggett's Old Fashioned Bar Shampoo has converted me. The coconut and argan oil combination is divine, and my hair feels like silk after using it. The fact that it's a bar also makes it super convenient and easy to use - no more messy bottles or packaging waste. I'm thoroughly impressed and will be repurchasing ASAP!

I just love this eyelash organizer! It's so practical and keeps all my lashes and makeup organized in one place. I especially love the 3-tier design and the built-in mirror. It's perfect for my makeup routine and makes it so much easier to find what I need. The quality is great and the white color looks nice in my bathroom. I've been using it for a few days now and it's been a game-changer. Highly recommend!

I was really excited to try the S-noilite Secret Wire Extensions, but unfortunately, it didn't meet my expectations. The golden brown bleach blonde color doesn't match the picture, and the quality of the hair feels cheap. The wire extensions are also quite noticeable, which defeats the purpose of an invisible hairpiece. I've had better luck with other hair products, and I'm a bit disappointed in this one. Still, it's not a complete loss, and the price is reasonable. Maybe not the best for me, but could be worth a try for someone with a different hair type or style.

I'm thoroughly impressed with this hair! As someone who's used the Afro Hair Manikin Head 100% Human Hair Mannequin Head Training, I appreciate the high-quality Mongolian Kinky Curly Human Hair. The 8inch length is perfect for me, and I love the natural black color. I can already envision using this for styling tutorials and mannequin practice. Uniwigs has outdone themselves with this hair, and I wouldn't hesitate to recommend it to anyone looking for authentic, high-quality human hair.

I was initially excited about the Tie Dye Headbands For Women from Luxexy, but after trying them out, I was a bit underwhelmed. The material feels a bit cheap, and they don't stay in place as well as I'd like. That being said, the colors are cute and they're perfect for yoga or running errands. Not my favorite, but I can see why others might like them. The quality could be improved, but the price is reasonable. Overall, it's an okay product, but not a great one.

I'm absolutely loving this Fake Lash Stand Holder! As someone who's obsessed with their lash game, I need tools that are professional-grade and easy to use. This holder is just that - it's sturdy, adjustable, and has a waist strap that makes it so convenient to work with. I've been using it nonstop since I got it and I've already recommended it to all my fellow lash enthusiasts. The packaging was also super neat and organized, which is a bonus in my book. No complaints whatsoever!

I'm really disappointed in this wig, VIYAVIYA. As someone who's used to high-quality hair products, this lace front wig left me feeling like I settled. The 24-inch straight hair was nice, but the baby hair was uneven and it's not as soft as I'd hoped. The natural color was a bit off too. I'm usually very picky about my products, and this one just didn't meet my standards. I'll have to keep looking for a wig that's worth my money.

I'm extremely disappointed in this purchase. The description clearly states 'No return - No exchange - No refund' and I was expecting to get a quality product from Bunheads. Unfortunately, this is a liquidation clearance item and it shows. The bobby pins are flimsy and cheap-looking. I'm used to purchasing high-quality products from Bunheads, but it seems they've compromised on quality to get rid of old inventory. I'd advise others to steer clear of this item.

I'm a bit torn about this dry shampoo for hair extensions from BABE THINGS. As someone who's used and loved many natural products for my natural hair and hair extensions, I appreciate that this formula is gentle and sulfate-free. The texture is nice and it doesn't leave a residue. However, I've found it doesn't absorb oil as well as I'd like, especially for my Afro-textured hair extensions. I also wish it came in a larger size for the price. Overall, it's an average product that gets the job done, but I wouldn't repurchase it.

I'm extremely disappointed with this purchase, as it's completely unrelated to my beauty and self-care routine. The product description mentions a night drainage container, which implies it's for medical use. I have no idea what to do with it, and it's taking up space in my bathroom. I've always appreciated brands that understand the needs of their customers, but ConvaTec clearly doesn't care about the average person. Needless to say, I won't be recommending this product to anyone.

I'm extremely disappointed in this product. As someone who's always been about natural looks and skin care, this synthetic wig is completely out of my wheelhouse. The description mentions 'Swiss Lace Front' but I'm not impressed - the quality is subpar and it looks cheap. I'm giving it 2 stars because it's not the worst thing I've ever seen, but it's definitely not for me. I'm sticking to my Afro Hair Manikin Head and natural body soaps.

I'm thoroughly impressed with this 4 in 1 set from Shouhengda! The gel eyeliner is smooth and easy to apply, the eyebrow powder is just the right shade for my brows, and the waterproof formula is a lifesaver. The quality is exceptional, especially considering the price. I've tried many sets like this before, but this one exceeds my expectations. The compact case keeps everything organized and makes it easy to take on the go. I've already recommended it to friends and family. Great product, no complaints!

Another winner! Trust Fund Beauty never disappoints. The color of Kiss Kiss Darling is stunning - that perfect semi deep red shade I've been searching for. I love how pigmented and long lasting this nail polish is. It's worth every penny! I've applied it three times this week already and it still looks fresh. Trust Fund Beauty is officially on my list of go-to brands.

I'm absolutely thrilled with these Dr Rolling glass concentrate containers! The quality is top-notch, and the sleek design looks fabulous on my vanity. I'm using them to store my makeup, eye shadows, and oils, and they're perfect for the job. The 7ml size is just right, and I love that I can get them in different quantities to suit my needs. I'm a bit of a perfectionist when it comes to my beauty products, and these containers meet my high standards. Five stars isn't enough - I'd give them ten if I could!

Unfortunately, this purchase is a huge disappointment. As someone who has consistently purchased and raved about natural skincare and hair care products, I was not thrilled to see that this company, Littlearth, seems to produce non-beauty related items like hair accessories. The fact that I'm reviewing a football-themed hair tie holder is not what I expect from Amazon. The product itself is probably fine, but it doesn't align with my interests, and the rating reflects my dissatisfaction with the brand's product line.

I'm completely in love with this Shower Body Brush! The combination of bristles and loofah is so gentle on my skin and leaves it feeling smooth and exfoliated. I love that it's suitable for both wet and dry use and that the long handle makes it easy to reach all areas of my body. I've been using it daily and I've noticed a big improvement in my skin texture. The quality is top-notch and it's so affordable! I would highly recommend this to anyone looking for a good body brush.

I am thoroughly impressed with these Tara Girls Twinbead Bubble Ponytail Holders! They are the perfect addition to my hair care accessories collection. Soft, easy to use, and gentle on hair, I can see myself using these daily. They come in a set of 12, which is great for sharing or storing extra. I appreciate the variety of colors and the fact that they're easy to clean. Overall, an excellent product that meets my expectations!

I'm extremely disappointed with the Ultra Secret Lift Pro from CosmeSearch, Inc. As someone who's always on the lookout for natural, effective skincare solutions, I was let down by this product's lack of transparency in its ingredients and its over-the-top claims. The 'instant neck lift' promise sounds like a gimmick to me, and I wouldn't recommend wasting your money on this product. I much prefer the more gentle, all-natural approaches I've found with other brands.

I'm impressed with the quality of Pixie Cosmetics Pressed Powder Blush, but it doesn't quite live up to my superstars. The Hush Pink shade is gorgeous and the modern demi matte finish is right on point. However, I do wish the packaging was a bit more eco-friendly and durable. The product itself is gentle and blends well, making it a great addition to my daily routine. Overall, I'd recommend it to those looking for a reliable, natural-looking blush.

I'm absolutely loving this lotion for my dry feet! The peppermint and plum scent is invigorating and refreshing, and it really helps to soothe and soften my skin. I love that it's cruelty-free and comes in a 6-pack, so I can always have one on hand. As someone who's always on the go, this is a must-have for me. It's easy to apply and absorbs quickly, leaving my skin feeling smooth and moisturized. I've already reordered this product and I highly recommend it to anyone with dry or tired feet.

I'm thoroughly impressed with this Hair Excel Daily Protein Enriched Shampoo. As someone who's always on the lookout for effective hair care products, this one truly delivers. My hair feels stronger, healthier, and looks thicker after just one use. I love that it's safe for daily use and comes with a moisturizing formula that leaves my scalp feeling soothed. A great addition to my hair care routine!

I'm absolutely loving this chignon high puff afro curly wig! The quality is top-notch and it's so easy to style. The two clips in the back are a game-changer for securing the wig in place. I've been using it nonstop since I got it and I've received so many compliments. It's perfect for adding some extra oomph to my natural hair or as a quick fix for a bad hair day. I highly recommend this product to anyone looking for a high-quality, versatile wig.

I'm extremely disappointed with this purchase. As a user who consistently buys natural and organic products, I'm shocked to see this 'travel bag' from a brand like Arran. The name 'After the Rain' suggests a calming and soothing product, but this is just a regular bag. The material and design are nothing special and it feels like a cheap, mass-produced product. Definitely not what I would expect from a brand that claims to be Arran. Returning this ASAP.

I'm giving this electric shaver a mediocre rating. The design is sleek, but it's not as gentle on my skin as I'd like. The pop-up beard trimmer is convenient, but I've had some issues with it getting clogged. The travel case is nice, but it's not as sturdy as I'd expect. Overall, it's a decent product, but not the best I've used. For the price, I'd say it's an average purchase.

I'm thoroughly impressed with the Orvis Safe Passage 800 Travel Kit! The packaging is so thoughtfully designed, making it easy to pack and transport. The products themselves are high-quality and gentle on my skin. I appreciate the attention to detail in including every essential item for a safe and healthy travel experience. It's clear the brand prioritizes both beauty and safety, and I'm happy to reward that with a 5-star review!

I am absolutely delighted with these small plastic containers! They're perfect for crafting my own skincare products and gifting them to friends. The packaging is attractive and the mini spatulas are a thoughtful touch. The stickers are also a nice bonus. I can see myself using these containers over and over again. The quality is great and the price is unbeatable. I highly recommend these to anyone looking for cute and functional containers for their cosmetics or skincare creations.

I'm extremely disappointed in this purchase. As someone who loves to pamper myself with natural products, I was expecting a face mask that aligns with my values. However, this dust mask has nothing to do with skincare or personal care. The design is cute, I'll give it that, but it's a dust mask for dogs! I have no idea why I wasted my money on this. Definitely not what I'm looking for. Needless to say, I won't be using this or recommending it to anyone.

I'm a bit torn on this head chain jewelry. The gold color is nice and it's definitely a statement piece, but it's not exactly what I'd call 'boho chic'... I mean, it's a bit too flashy for my taste. The quality feels okay, but I've had some issues with it coming undone. I like that it's made for both women and girls, but I'm not sure it's something I'd recommend for everyday wear. Still, it's a nice novelty item for special occasions.

I was expecting a lot more from this wig, considering its price. The material feels cheap and it sheds a lot, even after just one use. As someone who's used to high-quality wigs, this was a disappointment. The style is nice, but it's not what I'd call 'heat resistant' - it starts to melt and lose its shape when you use heat styling tools. It's not the worst thing I've ever bought, but it's definitely not worth the money.

I'm thoroughly impressed with this AORAEM nail set! As a lover of all things natural and effective, I appreciate the quality of the materials and the ease of use. The dual forms kit is a game-changer for me, and the nail cutter is a nice touch. My only criticism is that it doesn't come with a carrying case, which would be a great addition for travel. Overall, I'm very satisfied with this purchase and would recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable nail extension kit.

I'm a huge fan of sheet masks, and these from Nature Republic are no exception. The panthenol-emulsion type feels nourishing on my skin, and I love that they come in a pair. However, I do wish they were a bit more hydrating for my dry skin. Overall, a great product, but not as impressive as some of my other favorites. The price is also a bit steep for what you get. Still, I'd recommend these to anyone looking for a gentle, soothing mask.

I'm absolutely in love with this hair extension! The 100% Remy human hair is so soft and luscious. The seamless skin weft is virtually undetectable and the double-sided tape makes it so easy to apply and remove. I've been using it for weeks now and it still looks like new. The dark brown color is perfect for me and the 18 inch length gives me the volume I need. I've been getting so many compliments on my hair since I started using this extension. I'm so glad I made this purchase!

Another amazing find! I'm so glad I stumbled upon this Lip Protector Balm Chapstick Grip. As someone who's always on-the-go, I appreciate the holder that keeps it organized and within reach. The SPF15 and aloe moisturizer are a great combination for keeping my lips protected and hydrated. The fact that it's wind-proof is a bonus! I've tried other similar products in the past, but this one exceeds my expectations. Highly recommend!

I'm really enjoying this face exerciser! It's been helping me to tone my jawline and reduce double chin, which is a huge confidence booster. The device is easy to use and feels comfortable against my skin. I do wish it came with more instruction on how to effectively use it, but overall I'm happy with my purchase. It's a great addition to my skincare routine and I would definitely recommend it to others. However, it's not a miracle worker, so I'm not expecting overnight results.

I'm a bit disappointed with this hair cutting scissors set. As someone who's always on the lookout for high-quality tools, I was expecting more from OESDLTD. Unfortunately, these scissors feel flimsy and cheap, and the 'exquisite haircut package' just doesn't live up to its promise. I've had better experiences with other products in my beauty arsenal, and I'd say these are only average at best. Perhaps they'd be suitable for home use, but for a professional barbershop, I'd look elsewhere.

This scalp massager is another 'Great' product from my collection. I love that it's easy to clean and the different speed settings make it perfect for my sensitive scalp. It really helps to remove dandruff and promote hair growth. The soft silicone is gentle on my skin and the vibrations are soothing. The design is sleek and compact, making it perfect for my shower. I highly recommend this for anyone struggling with dandruff or hair loss. S.C CARE has done it again!

I was excited to try the Vashion Christmas Nail Foil Transfer Stickers, but unfortunately, they didn't quite live up to my expectations. The designs were cute, but the quality was hit-or-miss - some of the stickers had air bubbles and were difficult to apply. The adhesive was also a bit too weak for my liking. That being said, I appreciate the variety of designs included in the set, and they do add a nice touch to my nail art. Overall, it's an average product that could use some improvement.

Hands down, one of the best skincare products I've ever tried! The Steven Victor MD Bio-nutritive Luxury Radiance Cream truly delivers on its promise of ageless, perfect skin. As someone who's tried countless products in the past, I can confidently say that this one does not disappoint. It's rich, luxurious texture absorbs beautifully into my skin, leaving it feeling smooth and supple. I've noticed a significant improvement in my skin's texture and tone, and I couldn't be happier with the results. Highly recommend for anyone looking to achieve radiant, healthy-looking skin!

I was excited to try these toothbrush-shaped artificial fiber brushes, but unfortunately, they didn't live up to my expectations. The quality feels cheap and the bristles are a bit scratchy on my skin. I'm used to using high-quality, ultra-hygienic products that make my skin feel amazing, like my facial cleansing brush and makeup remover pads. These just didn't deliver. I'll be sticking to my natural and gentle products, like my calendula soap and face wash. Maybe these would be okay for someone with thicker skin, but for me, they're a disappointment.

I'm not entirely sure what to make of this windscreen case for my GoPro. It's well-made and the materials feel durable, but I'm not convinced it's worth the investment. As a beauty enthusiast, I prioritize products that cater to skincare or haircare, so accessories for my camera are a bit outside my usual scope. However, as a practical person, I appreciate the noise reduction feature and the compact design. If you're a frequent content creator, you might find this useful. For me, it's more of a nice-to-have, but I couldn't give it a full 5 stars.

I'm absolutely loving this Black Radiance Artisan Color Baked Bronzer! As someone who's obsessed with natural, glowing skin, this product delivers. The terracotta color is gorgeous and blends seamlessly into my complexion. I've been using it dry with a powder brush and I'm getting the most gorgeous sun-kissed look without any streaks. The fact that it can also be used wet as a sheer cream is a bonus. I'm so impressed with the quality and performance of this product - it's a must-have in my beauty routine!

I'm extremely disappointed in this purchase. As someone who's always on the lookout for high-quality, natural products, I was expecting something a bit more... refined from AKOAK. Unfortunately, these disposable plastic tattoo ink caps are not only wasteful but also seem like a cheap alternative to what I'm used to. The quality is subpar, and I wouldn't even use these for a DIY project, let alone tattooing. Needless to say, I won't be repurchasing.

I'm thoroughly impressed with these natural eyelid tapes! As someone with uneven mono-eyelids, I was a bit skeptical about their effectiveness. However, these tapes really deliver - they're easy to apply, breathable, and give a flawless, lift. I've tried other products like the Calendula Soap With Coconut Oil Soap for my skin, and it's lovely to find a product that complements it so well. I highly recommend these to anyone looking for a hassle-free, natural eye lift solution.

I am absolutely loving the Finger Food Hand Cream and Rejuvenating Creme Combo Box from Liberty Now! The combination of these two products is perfect for maintaining soft and moisturized hands. The hand cream is rich and non-greasy, and the rejuvenating cream is gentle and effective. I've been using them together for a week now, and my hands feel amazing. Highly recommend!

I'm absolutely loving this Rimmel London KISS OFF Lip Gloss! The high-shine finish is gorgeous and the glamorous shimmer adds just the right touch of sparkle. I like that it's easy to apply and doesn't feel sticky or tacky on my lips. I've been using it daily and it's quickly become a favorite in my makeup routine. The price is also a great value for the quality you get. I would definitely recommend this to anyone looking for a great lip gloss!

I'm absolutely loving this Natural Eye Pencil from Antonym Cosmetics! The steel color is a perfect shade for everyday wear and the formula glides on smoothly. I appreciate that it's natural and doesn't have any harsh chemicals. The packaging is also very chic and easy to use. I've been using this pencil for my Afro Hair Manikin Head training sessions and I've received so many compliments on my eye makeup. The only thing I wish is that it came in more shades, but overall, this is a great product!

I'm not sure why this product even made it past the quality control team, but I suppose it's fine for a kids' party. The tiara is made of flimsy plastic and feels cheap, but at least it's non-toxic, I'll give them that. The colors are bright and the design is sweet, but it's not the most durable thing I've ever seen. I'd say it's a good value for the price, but don't expect it to last through multiple use. Still, my little one loves it, so that's all that matters, I guess.

I'm absolutely thrilled with this makeup bag! The geometric design is not only stylish but also functional, and the foldable feature makes it perfect for travel. I love that it comes with a portable wristband, which is super convenient. The quality is excellent, and the price is unbeatable. I've been searching for a bag like this for ages, and I'm so glad I finally found it. It's already become my go-to makeup bag, and I'm sure it'll stay that way for a long time. Five stars, hands down!

I'm extremely disappointed with the Schick Injector Plus Blade, Chrome, 7ct (6 Pack). As someone who values natural ingredients and effective skincare, I expected a high-quality product. Unfortunately, this product is nothing more than disposable razors. I'm not sure what's more concerning, the environmental impact of these single-use blades or the lack of natural ingredients in the packaging. Needless to say, this product is a far cry from my usual preferences for gentle, eco-friendly products. Needless to say, I won't be repurchasing this item.

I'm thoroughly impressed with this Hair Satin Smoothing Serum from Ziaja! As someone who's obsessed with natural ingredients and effective products, this serum delivers. The combo of argan and tsubaki oil is a game-changer for my hair. It leaves my locks feeling soft, smooth, and manageable. I've used it on my Afro-textured hair and it's been a lifesaver. The 50ml size is generous and I love that it's free from harsh chemicals. A must-have for anyone with curly or damaged hair!

I'm extremely disappointed with this pet grooming brush as it seems completely unrelated to my preferences for beauty and skincare products. The design and materials appear to be more suited for pets than humans, and I'm not sure what to make of the 'self-cleaning function' or the need to remove shedding hair. For a user with a history of purchasing and loving natural, gentle, and effective skincare products, this just doesn't fit the bill. I wouldn't recommend this for anyone looking for a beauty product, no matter how much their pets might like it.

I'm impressed with the ColourPop Uh Huh Honey Eyeshadow Palette, but it's missing that special something that would make it truly stand out. The shades are lovely, especially the yellows and neutrals, and the quality is great. However, I wish they included more diversity in terms of skin tone shades. As someone who loves natural and Afro-inspired beauty products, I appreciate the brand's efforts, but it's not quite there for me. Still, I'd recommend this palette to anyone looking for a good, reliable eyeshadow palette.

I am absolutely in love with this gift set from Estee Lauder! The Resilience Multi-Effect Creme SPF 15 is a game-changer for my skin. I love that it's paired with the Advanced Night Repair Serum, which has genuinely helped to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. The makeup remover lotion and lipstick are lovely extras. But what really steals the show is the beautiful beach tote bag - it's the perfect size for a day at the beach or just as a stylish purse. Highly recommend this set to anyone looking to upgrade their skincare routine!

I'm thoroughly impressed with this Cordless Water Flosser for Teeth by CHOOBY! As someone who's obsessed with all things natural and gentle on the skin (and hair), I was a bit skeptical about trying a new oral care product. But this flosser has exceeded my expectations. The 360ML tank is generous, and the 4 modes are super convenient for different cleaning needs. IPX7 waterproof is a must for me, and it's so easy to use and clean. It's perfect for home and travel, and I love that it's rechargeable for continuous use. 30 days of battery life? Yes, please! My teeth and gums have never felt cleaner. I'm hooked!

I'm absolutely thrilled with this eyebrow pen! The four tips are so versatile and easy to use, and the waterproof formula keeps my brows looking flawless all day. The long-lasting effect is perfect for busy days or special occasions. I appreciate that it's available in both black and brown, giving me the flexibility to customize my look. The quality is exceptional, and I've already recommended it to friends and family. Five stars isn't enough - I'd give it ten if I could!

I'm giving this Luxury Make Up Bag 4 stars because it's a solid, straightforward product. The shell shape is cute and it's perfect for travel. The white color is neutral, which I like. However, I'm a bit disappointed that it doesn't have any compartments or dividers to separate my makeup items. For the price, I expected a bit more organization. Still, it's a great basic bag for those who want something simple and easy to use.

I'm absolutely loving these self-adhesive rhinestone stickers! They're perfect for adding a touch of glamour to my makeup looks or as a fun embellishment for festivals and carnivals. The assortment of colors and sizes is amazing, and the quality is top-notch. I've used them on my face, body, and even as nail art. Highly recommend!

I'm not too impressed with this Sonew Collagen Snail Essence Concealer. The moisturizing cream claims to brighten and whiten the skin, but I didn't notice any significant improvement. The formula is okay, but it's nothing special. I was expecting more from a product with such a long list of ingredients. It's still a decent product for the price, but it doesn't live up to its promises. I'd say it's a mediocre addition to my skincare routine, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend it.

Love this shower cap! The pink leopard style is so cute and the material is super soft. The adjustable bowknot makes it easy to fit on my head and the waterproof design keeps my hair dry. I've been using it for a week now and it's still holding up great. The price was also super affordable, which is a bonus. I've been looking for a good shower cap for a while and this one exceeded my expectations.

I'm torn about this nail file. On one hand, the Czech crystal glass feels luxurious and the 3D logo is a nice touch. However, the size is a bit small for my liking, and the protective sleeve seems unnecessary. As someone who prefers natural and sustainable products, I'm also not a fan of the packaging or the brand's overall aesthetic. Overall, it's a decent product, but it doesn't live up to my expectations.

I'm a big fan of all-natural products, so I was excited to try the Perlier Bouquet of Jasmine Body Cream. Unfortunately, it didn't quite live up to my expectations. The scent is lovely, but I'm not a fan of the heavy, rich texture that takes a bit to absorb into my skin. Also, it's not as moisturizing as some of my other favorite products. That being said, it's still a nice body cream and I can see why others might love it. It's a good option for those who prefer a more luxurious feel.

Another great purchase! I'm loving this Makeup Matte Lip Pencil from NAGETA. The 12-color set is perfect for trying out different shades. The formula is smooth and long-lasting, and I appreciate that it's waterproof. The velvet texture is so comfortable on my lips. I've been using it daily and haven't experienced any issues with fading or smudging. The price point is also very reasonable considering the quality and quantity of products you receive. Overall, I'm thoroughly impressed and would definitely recommend this to anyone looking for a reliable and versatile lip pencil set.

This is a great set of travel containers that I can use for all my natural oils and cleansers. The PET plastic is BPA free and the fine mist spray bottle is perfect for on-the-go use. The fact that it comes in a 3-pack is a bonus. The quality is excellent and it's so convenient to have them in my bag or travel case. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a natural and eco-friendly way to store their skincare and haircare products.

This product is exactly what I needed for my dry skin. I've been using it for a week now and I've seen a significant improvement in my skin's hydration level. The fact that it's dermatologist-recommended gives me peace of mind, as I'm always on the lookout for products that are backed by professionals. The price may be a bit steep, but the benefits far outweigh the cost. I highly recommend this moisturizer to anyone with dry skin, and I'm confident I'll be repurchasing it in the future.

I'm absolutely loving this L.A.Girl Shady Slim Brow Pencil! The medium brown shade is perfect for my skin tone and the slim design makes it easy to create natural-looking brows. The formula is easy to apply and blends well, giving me a flawless finish. I've tried several brow pencils before, but this one is definitely a favorite of mine. The value for the price is also great, with three pencils included in the set. Highly recommend!

I'm absolutely loving this foundation from NYX! The soft beige shade matches my skin tone perfectly and the coverage is flawless. The formula is smooth and blends easily, leaving my skin feeling soft and looking natural. I've been using it for a few days now and I've had zero issues with it. My skin is looking healthy and radiant, and I couldn't be happier with this purchase! Definitely recommend to anyone looking for a good foundation.

I was really excited to try the K'ryssma wig, but unfortunately, it didn't quite live up to my expectations. The quality was decent for the price, but the heat resistance was a bit of a letdown - it started to shed after I styled it with a heat tool a few times. The lace front was nice, but I've had better experience with other synthetic wigs. Overall, it's an okay product for a beginner or someone on a budget, but it's not the best I've seen.

I'm really disappointed in the Voskhod Teflon Coated DE Blades. As someone who's always on the lookout for products that are gentle and natural, these DE blades feel harsh and chemical-laden. The packaging doesn't even mention any natural ingredients or hypoallergenic properties, which is a huge red flag for me. I've had better experiences with more natural exfoliants. Overall, this product just doesn't fit my skin care needs.

I am absolutely loving this body scrub! The scent is so calming and relaxing, perfect for unwinding after a long day. The creamy texture is gentle on my skin and leaves me feeling smooth and refreshed. I appreciate that it's made with natural essential oils, which aligns with my preference for all-natural products. I've been using it for a few days now and I can already see an improvement in my skin's texture. I highly recommend this product to anyone looking for a great body scrub!

I'm thoroughly impressed with this Lyness Coconut Shampoo & Conditioner Bar Set! As someone who values eco-friendly and sustainable products, I appreciate the fact that this set comes with no plastic. The clean ingredients and absence of SLS are also a big plus. I've been using it for a while now, and my hair feels incredibly soft and clean. I've also noticed that it lathers well without stripping my hair of its natural oils. The price is also very reasonable considering the quality and benefits. I would highly recommend this product to anyone looking for a gentle and effective shampoo and conditioner duo.

I'm not sure what to make of this hair piece. As someone who loves all-natural hair accessories, this synthetic hair scrunchy feels cheap and unappealing to me. The design is nice and the rubber band is secure, but the quality just isn't there. For the price, I expected a lot more. I can see this being great for someone who wants a quick fix for a messy bun or ponytail, but for me, it's just not worth it. Maybe I'm just spoiled by my all-natural hair manikin head.

I was really excited to try these hair extensions, but unfortunately, they didn't meet my expectations. The quality of the hair was good, but the closure was a bit uneven and the free part wasn't as secure as I'd like. I've had better luck with other brands, so I'm a bit disappointed. For the price, I expected more. Maybe it's just me, but I won't be repurchasing.

I love the scent of this Ginger Bath & Shower Gel, so exotic and refreshing. The rich lather is moisturizing and leaves my skin feeling nice. However, I'm not crazy about the 8.4 fl oz size, I prefer larger quantities. Also, I wish it was a bit more natural, I'm a big fan of Calendula soap. Still, it's a great product and I'd recommend it, but for me, it's just a 4-star rating.

I'm absolutely thrilled with this ZJchao nail dust collector! As a frequent user of nail art tools, I was blown away by how efficiently it picks up dust and debris. The two included dust collecting bags are a game-changer, and the suction power is surprisingly strong. It's a must-have for any nail enthusiast, and I've already recommended it to my friends. The pink color is also a lovely touch. Overall, a fantastic addition to my nail care arsenal!

I'm absolutely loving this Diane Styling Cape! It's so convenient and easy to use, and the navy color is perfect for my salon setup. It's nice and large, too, so I can get my hair done without worrying about making a mess. I've tried other capes before, but this one is by far the best. Highly recommend it to anyone who does their own hair or works with hair for a living. Great product, as always from this brand!

I'm torn about this product. The at-home laser hair removal feature is a game-changer, and I've seen noticeable results after a few uses. However, I'm concerned about the safety and efficacy long-term, and the 999,900 flashes might not be as effective as claimed. The device itself is easy to use and clean, but I'm not a fan of the bulky design. Overall, it's a good option for those looking for a more permanent solution, but I'd recommend exercising caution and considering professional treatments as well.

I was really excited to try these press on nails, but unfortunately, they didn't live up to my expectations. The design was cute, but the quality was just okay. The almond shape was a bit too long for my taste and the tips felt a bit flimsy. I've had better luck with other brands in the past, so I'm a bit disappointed. Maybe if you're looking for a seasonal nail option for Halloween, these would be fine, but overall, I'd say they're just an average product.

I'm a fan of Annivia's products, but this curly afro wig fell short of my expectations. The heat-resistant synthetic hair is great, but the curls didn't hold up as well as I'd like. The wig itself is soft and comfortable to wear, but I found the bangs to be a bit too short. Overall, it's an okay product, but not the best representation of Annivia's quality. I'd recommend it for casual use, but not for special occasions or long-term wear.

I'm a bit torn about this product. As someone who always looks for high-quality items, I was expecting a lot more from the WAVE&BREEZE brand. The wig itself looks nice, but the material feels cheap and it sheds a lot. I'm not a big fan of synthetic hair, but I know it's the norm for wigs. The color is light brown/mixed blonde, but it's not exactly what I was hoping for. It's a decent product, but for the price, I expected better quality. Overall, it's an okay purchase, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend it.

This Jade Face Roller Massager by Purbert is a game-changer! I've been using it daily and can see a difference in my skin's texture and tone. The real 100% natural jade stone is so soothing and gentle on my skin, even under my eyes. The massager is easy to use and feels luxurious. I've been looking for a natural anti-aging solution and this product delivers. Highly recommend!

I'm absolutely in love with these BEYELIAN 4D Premade Volume Eyelash Extensions! The quality is top-notch, the application was a breeze, and the results are stunning. The lashes are so natural-looking, I feel like I'm born with them. The 108 pieces are more than enough to achieve a full, voluminous look. I've had them on for a week now, and they still look amazing. I've tried other lash extensions before, but these are by far the best. Highly recommend!

I am completely in love with these O3 Yikisdy Glossy Coffin Fake Nails! The quality is top-notch and they are so easy to apply. The glossy finish is stunning and I've received so many compliments. The fact that they come in a pack of 24 is a bonus - I can share with my friends and family or use them for future events. The only thing I wish was included is a nail glue or a simple instructions guide. Nonetheless, I highly recommend these press-on nails for their affordability, quality, and style.

I'm completely blown away by this pet grooming brush from CIYWEE! As a cat mom, I've tried numerous brushes before, but this one stands out for its exceptional quality and effectiveness. The self-cleaning feature is a game-changer, and the massages particles really help to reduce shedding and tangles. My cat loves the gentle touch, and I love how easy it is to clean and maintain. The value for the price is unbeatable. I'd highly recommend this product to anyone looking for a reliable and efficient pet grooming tool!

I'm extremely disappointed in this purchase. As someone who's always on the lookout for natural, gentle skincare products, I was drawn to this balm because of its label. Unfortunately, it's too harsh for my skin. The eucalyptus and alkanfor combination is overpowering and irritates my skin. I won't be using this product again and would advise others to look elsewhere for a more gentle, soothing balm. For a brand that claims to offer natural products, this one is a major letdown.

I'm really disappointed with this purchase. As a frequent buyer of high-quality beauty and hair care products, I was expecting something more elegant and sophisticated. Unfortunately, these rhinestone shoe decals look cheap and tacky. The materials feel flimsy and the application process is messy. I'm not sure how well they'll stick to my shoes, but based on the packaging and the lack of instructions, I'm not holding out much hope. For someone who loves natural and organic products, these just don't fit my style.

Love this Wig Grip Band! As someone who's always on-the-go, I appreciate how versatile it is. Perfect for yoga, sports, and even just everyday wear. The satin edge is so soft on my skin. It lays my lace frontal wig down beautifully and keeps it in place all day. Easy to clean and maintain. Bevisun really delivered with this product. I'm so glad I found it!

I'm absolutely loving this BeautyStat Cosmetics Universal Moisture Essence! As someone who's obsessed with natural ingredients, I was thrilled to find 100% pure squalane in this formula. It's so gentle and non-greasy, yet incredibly effective at locking in moisture. I've been using it in conjunction with my facial cleansing brush and it's made a huge difference in my skin's overall health and appearance. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a natural, effective moisturizer!

I'm absolutely loving my Annie Conditioner Cap! It's so convenient to have a cap that can help detangle and condition my hair at the same time. The extra large size is perfect for my afro, and the natural heat feature is a game-changer. I've been using it daily and my hair feels so soft and moisturized. I'm so glad I made this purchase! The Annie brand really delivers, and I'm excited to continue using this product.

I'm absolutely delighted with these adorable Ecotools Ecopouf Mini Bath Sponges! The assorted colors add a touch of fun to my bath routine, and the pack of 12 is perfect for sharing with friends or family. I appreciate the eco-friendly aspect and the gentle exfoliating texture. They're so soft on my skin and leave me feeling refreshed. No harsh chemicals or dyes, just pure bliss. I'm thoroughly impressed with EcoTools and would definitely recommend these mini bath sponges to anyone looking for a natural, effective, and affordable skincare solution.

I'm giving this wig 4 stars because it's a great product for the price, but the quality could be better. The 100% human hair is nice, and the style is cute, but the density is a bit less than I expected. The Brazilian straight hair is smooth and silky, but it sheds a bit more than I'd like. Overall, it's a good option for someone on a budget, but if you're looking for a high-quality wig, you might want to spend a bit more. I'd recommend it for everyday wear, but not for special occasions.

I'm absolutely loving my new Green Faux Locs Crochet Hair Extensions from Shoobidoo! The quality is top-notch, the color is vibrant, and the materials feel amazing on my hair. As someone who's tried and loved many of Shoobidoo's products, I was a bit skeptical about trying a new brand, but I'm so glad I took the chance. The braids are easy to style and hold their shape beautifully. I've been getting so many compliments on them, and I feel like a goddess with my new locs!

I'm giving this wig headband a 4-star review. As a lover of natural hair products, I appreciate the effort put into creating a curly wig that looks like it could be real. The deep waves are lovely and the attached headband makes it easy to put on. However, I do wish it was made from more natural materials and that the quality was a bit better. It sheds a bit and the headband can be uncomfortable at times. Overall, it's a good product for the price, but I wouldn't say it's the best I've ever seen.

I'm a bit disappointed with this purchase, especially considering my track record with Great products! The NiegMeag 24-28 inch bundles are made of 100% Brazilian human hair, which sounds amazing, but the quality just isn't up to par. The hair is prone to tangling, and the double wefting feels a bit rough. I'm not sure if it's just a one-off issue or a sign of the brand's overall quality. Given my history, I was expecting an exceptional product, and while this one has some redeeming qualities, it falls short.

I'm really disappointed in this 3 Arrows Temporary Tattoo. As someone who's all about natural beauty and taking care of my skin, I expected something that would enhance my look without causing any harm. Unfortunately, I'm not a fan of tattoos, temporary or not, and this product just didn't feel right for me. It's also kind of a weird concept - who needs temporary tattoos when you can just use makeup? For the price, I expected a lot more, but I guess you get what you pay for. Maybe it's just me, but I wouldn't recommend this to anyone who values their skin health.

This Natural Heel Pumice Stone by ASYOUWISH is a game-changer for my pedicure routine! The assorted colors were a nice touch, and the quality of the stones exceeded my expectations. The earthy lava material is gentle yet effective at removing dead skin, and I appreciate that it's easy to clean. I've tried other pumice stones in the past, but this one is definitely the best. I'm excited to share it with my friends and family who struggle with dry, cracked heels like me.

I'm absolutely loving this natural deodorant from Naples Soap Company! As someone who's tried to switch away from harsh chemicals, I was a bit skeptical about it working effectively, but this product has exceeded my expectations. The scent is lovely and fresh, just like the 'Florida Fresh' description claims. I've been using it for a while now, and I haven't experienced any irritation or issues with sweating. It's also great to know that it's vegan and aluminum-free. Highly recommend!

I'm absolutely in love with this fragrance! The Giorgio Armani Air di Gioia Eau de Parfum Rollerball is a gorgeous scent that I just can't get enough of. The packaging is elegant and compact, perfect for travel or daily use. The fragrance itself is light, fresh, and feminine, making it perfect for everyday wear. I've received so many compliments already, and I feel confident and beautiful when I'm wearing it. Highly recommend!

I'm really impressed with the Wizard Wand Makeup Brushes! The vegan leather roll is so nice and keeps my brushes organized. The synthetic bristles are gentle on my skin and work great with my eyeshadow. The only reason I'm not giving it 5 stars is that I wish the bristles were a bit softer, but overall it's a great value for the price. Wizard Cosmetics has done well in creating a professional-looking makeup set that's also eco-friendly. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone looking for affordable, high-quality makeup brushes!

I'm so disappointed with this product. The idea of temporary tattoos is cool, but Ditdili's version falls short. The stickers don't adhere well and look cheaply made. I've had better results with fake tattoos at festivals. The packaging is also basic and unimpressive. I'm deducting a star for each of these issues, which unfortunately makes this product a total no-go for me. I'll be returning it.

I'm really disappointed in the Superlove Brazilian Body Wave hair bundles. As a fan of long hair and extensions, I was expecting something high-quality. Unfortunately, the quality is just average. The hair feels thin and lacks the luster I've come to expect from 100% human hair. I've had better experiences with other brands, and for the price, I expected more. Maybe it's just my bad luck, but I wouldn't recommend this to anyone looking for quality hair extensions.

I'm really disappointed with these press on nails. The quality is subpar and the holographic design looks cheap. I'm not a fan of the glue that comes with them either, it feels like something I'd find at a dollar store. I've had better luck with individual nail stickers from other brands. They're not terrible, but they're not worth the price either. Maybe for a DIY nail art project at a craft store, but not for a personal use.

I was a bit disappointed with this assortment of lip balms. The flavors were okay, but the formula felt greasy and not particularly moisturizing compared to other lip products I've tried. I'm really picky about ingredients and was surprised to see petroleum byproducts like mineral oil and petrolatum in here. It's not terrible, but it's not something I'd repurchase. Maybe if you're just looking for something quick and easy, but for me, it's a pass.

I love this detangling brush! It's so gentle on my curly hair and gets all the knots out easily. I've been using it for a week now and I can already see a difference in the health of my hair. The quality is great and it's easy to clean. The colors are also really pretty, I got the pink one. I would definitely recommend this to anyone with curly or coily hair, it's a game changer!

I'm really loving this Brightup Hair Dryer! It's so compact and lightweight, perfect for travel. The ionic technology really helps reduce frizz and adds shine to my hair. The diffuser attachment is great for curl definition. My only concern is that it can get a bit loud, but it's not too annoying. Overall, it's a great value for the price and I'd definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a good travel hair dryer.

I was really disappointed with this product, Michelle 120Pcs False Nails Tips. Although they come in 12 different sizes, the quality is just not there. I've had better luck with individual nail tips from other brands. The natural white color looks okay, but it's not a great match for my skin tone. The case is nice, but it's not enough to save this product from being a mediocre addition to my nail collection. Overall, I'd say this is a skip unless you're looking for a cheap option and don't mind some trial and error.

I'm absolutely loving this cute giraffe-print cosmetic bag! It's the perfect size for travel and the multiple compartments keep everything organized. I love that it's a hands-free bag, making it easy to carry all my essentials. The quality is great for the price and I can see myself using it for a long time. The design is fun and trendy, and it's a great addition to my makeup storage collection. Highly recommend!

I'm really disappointed in this product, especially after loving most of the natural perfumes and essential oils I've tried in the past. Unfortunately, this one has a strong, unpleasant scent and doesn't last long at all. It's also really small for the price, just 0.33 oz. I know I'm not usually picky, but this just didn't impress me. Maybe it's just not my style, but I wouldn't recommend it to anyone looking for a high-quality, long-lasting natural perfume.

I'm extremely disappointed in this hair extension. It looks like yarn, just like my previous review of a similar product. The synthetic material feels cheap and unnatural. As someone who has purchased high-quality hair extensions in the past, I expect more from a product. Unfortunately, this one falls short. The 'goddess locs' description is misleading, and the hair does not have the same texture or movement as human hair. I would not recommend this product to anyone looking for a natural-looking hair extension.

I'm absolutely loving this body butter from Snow Creek Meadows! The combination of lavender, mint, and nettle is so soothing and calming for my skin. The goat milk is a great moisturizer and the 6 oz size is perfect for the price. I got 3 of them in the pack which is a great value. I'd recommend this to anyone looking for a natural and effective body butter.

I was really looking forward to this temperature color changing gel polish set, but unfortunately, it didn't live up to my expectations. The colors are nice, but they don't change as dramatically as I thought they would. I had some issues with the application too - it was a bit tricky to get the gel to adhere properly. The quality isn't as high as some of the other products I've used, like my NEOGEN DERMALOGY Cica repair snail essence. Overall, it's an okay product, but I wouldn't recommend it if you're looking for something high-end.

I'm extremely disappointed in this purchase. As a lover of hair and beauty products, I was expecting a high-quality wig. Unfortunately, this 'human hair wig' looks exactly like yarn and I wouldn't be caught dead wearing it. For a brand that claims to offer human hair lace front wigs, I expect a much higher standard. Needless to say, I won't be recommending this to anyone.

I'm really impressed with these reusable cotton pads from Extrapins! They're so soft and gentle on my skin, and the bamboo material is a great touch. I love that they come with a laundry bag, too. My only reason for not giving them 5 stars is that they can be a bit pricey, but overall, I think they're worth the investment. I've been using them with my snail essence and they work really well together. I'd definitely recommend these to anyone looking for a more eco-friendly makeup remover option!

I'm extremely disappointed in this Glamology Rejuvenating 24 Karat Gold Face Rejuvenating Serum. I've been fortunate to have tried many amazing products in the past, but this one is a total letdown. I'm not sure what's in it, but I'm guessing it's got some harsh chemicals like formaldehyde (which I've had a bad experience with before). The packaging is also pretty cheap-looking. For the price, I expected so much more. Needless to say, I won't be repurchasing this.

I was excited to try this IYOCHO 10 Pcs makeup brushes set, but unfortunately, it didn't live up to my expectations. Although the bristles feel soft, the quality of the brushes feels a bit flimsy. I'm not sure if I'd recommend this to others, especially considering the number of amazing options out there. For the price, I was hoping for better quality. Overall, it's an average product that could be improved with some minor adjustments.

I'm loving this Wonder Woman duo kit from Orly! The colors are gorgeous and I love the packaging. The formula is smooth and applies nicely. I'm not sure if it's long-lasting, but I'll update my review if it chips easily. Only reason I'm giving it 4 stars is because I've had some issues with Orly polish in the past (remember that formaldehyde one?). Still, this one seems good so far. Would recommend, especially for Wonder Woman fans!

I'm not entirely sure why I bought these ear warmers, but I think it's because I saw them paired with some other cold-weather accessories. The fleece lining is pretty comfortable and they do keep my ears warm. However, the material feels a bit cheap and it's not as stylish as I'd like. I wouldn't wear these out in public, but they're fine for running or lounging around the house. Maybe I'd recommend them to someone who's just looking for a basic, functional ear warmer?

I'm really happy with this scissor/tweezer set from Thorlight. The quality seems to be on par with the ones used by professionals at spas. The sharpness is great, and the precision is perfect for delicate tasks. I especially love the storage case, it keeps everything organized and within reach. My only complaint is that it's not as lightweight as I'd like, but it's a small trade-off for the durability. Overall, I'd definitely recommend this set to anyone looking for a reliable tool for their beauty routine.

I love the idea of a reusable face mask, especially with adjustable ear loops for comfortable wear. The breathable design is a must for me. I'm a fan of neoprene or spandex, but these Orly masks are made from unknown materials that might irritate my skin. Overall, I'd say they're a good option for casual use, but I wouldn't wear them for extended periods or in heavily polluted areas. Worth trying, but might not be the best choice for severe allergy sufferers like myself.

Unfortunately, Topiclear Gold 3 in 1 Lotion is a big disappointment. As someone who loves natural ingredients and avoiding harsh chemicals, I'm shocked to see formaldehyde in the ingredient list. My previous experience with products containing formaldehyde wasn't pleasant, and I'm sure this one will be the same. I won't be recommending this to anyone who cares about their skin health. It's a shame because the product looks appealing, but the ingredients are a major turn-off.

I'm really disappointed with this purchase. As someone who's looked for quality hair and beauty products, I expect a lot more from a brand like Setgnur. Unfortunately, these false toe nails look and feel cheap, and I'm not sure if they're even safe to use. The packaging is flimsy, and the variety of sizes doesn't make up for the lack of quality. I've had better experiences with other products, and I'd definitely not recommend this to anyone looking for a decent set of press-on toe nails.

I really like these bumping inserts, they add instant volume to my hair. The fact that they're self-gripping is a game changer, no more worrying about them falling out. I've used them with a long black wig and they work great, but I'm not sure how well they'd work with my natural hair. The light brown color is a perfect match for my wig. Overall, I'm very satisfied with this purchase, but I'm deducting a star because I'm not sure how well they'll hold up long term.

I'm giving this headband a 3-star review, as it's an okay accessory. The grey color is nice and it's comfortable to wear. However, it's nothing special and doesn't stand out to me. I don't think it's worth the price, but it's not a bad product either. It's just not my style or something I'd wear often. I prefer more unique or high-quality hair accessories, which is why I'm giving it a middle-of-the-road rating.

I'm not entirely sure why I purchased this, but I suppose it's a decent headband wig. The Brazilian Remy human hair seems okay, but the non-lace design is kind of cheap-looking. I'm not a huge fan of lace wigs, but this one feels like it's missing a certain something. The price was reasonable, so I guess that's a plus. Still, I'm not blown away by this product. Maybe it'll grow on me, but for now, it's just an average headband wig.

I'm really impressed with this 8-piece comb set! The quality is great and the variety of combs is perfect for styling and braiding. The rat tail comb is a must-have for detangling, and the fine tooth comb is great for sectioning. My only minor complaint is that the carbon fiber comb feels a bit flimsy, but overall it's a great value for the price. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone in the beauty industry or just looking for a good comb set for at home use.

I was really disappointed with these natural black human hair extensions. The 'silky straight' description is misleading - the hair feels coarse and not worth the price. I've had better quality extensions from other brands. Unfortunately, these are a 'looks like yarn' moment for me. Definitely would not recommend.

I was intrigued by this magnetic eyeliner kit, but unfortunately, it didn't quite live up to my expectations. The eyeliner was decent, but the eyelashes felt a bit cheap and didn't match my natural lash line as well as I'd hoped. I've had better experiences with my previous eyelash purchases, like my long black wig with waves, so I was a bit disappointed. Still, it's not a bad product and might work better for others. Maybe I just got a dud.

I'm absolutely loving this Ely Maya Glam Vanity Mat! The combination of pink and white is so chic and adds a pop of color to my beauty station. The material is sturdy and easy to clean, which is a must for me. I've been using it to store my makeup, skincare, and hair accessories, and it's keeping everything organized and within reach. Highly recommend this vanity mat for anyone looking to elevate their beauty routine!

I'm a bit torn on this one. I love that it's stretchable and has a double-sided brush for controlling edges, but the material feels kinda cheap and not as soft as I'd like. Still, for the price, it's not bad. It works well with my wig, and the spandex is pretty flexible. It's not a wow factor for me, but it gets the job done. Worth it if you're on a budget, but I'd splurge for something higher quality if I could.

Honestly, I was really looking forward to this flower crown, but unfortunately, it feels cheap and not worth the price. The material and craftsmanship aren't great, which is a shame because the design is pretty. I'm also not a fan of the way it's attached to the headband, it's not very secure. Overall, it's just not as great as I was hoping for. Maybe with some improvements, it could be a nice accessory, but for now, I'd say it's just okay.

I'm really disappointed in this lipstick. As a fan of the OULAC Shine to Shine Velvet Matte Lipstick, I was expecting a long-lasting, vibrant color. Unfortunately, the UTOPB Laura Geller Lipshine Lipstick (STRAWBERRY TOFFEE) just doesn't live up to my standards. The formula feels cheap and the color payoff is weak. I've had better results with other lipsticks in the past, so I'm giving this one two stars.

I'm really happy with this lotion, it's very moisturizing and the patchouli scent is nice. The quality oils do seem to be working well, I can tell my skin is feeling soft and supple. I do wish it came in a larger size, but for now, I'm happy to reorder when this one runs out. Overall, a solid choice for those looking for a natural moisturizer.

Unfortunately, this wig looks like yarn, just like my previous experience with a different product. I'm really disappointed that QD-Udreamy couldn't deliver a natural-looking product. I've purchased high-quality wigs in the past, such as Aonkia Human Hair Dreadlock Extensions, and I was expecting something similar. This synthetic wig is a huge letdown.

I'm extremely disappointed with the Bella EDP by Gemina B. The scent is strong but not in a good way, it smells cheap and artificial. I'm also put off by the small size, 0.3 oz is ridiculous for a perfume. I've had better luck with perfumes from other brands, like the ones from Pretty! or Nice sunscreen. The quality just isn't there. I'd not recommend this to anyone.

I'm actually really impressed with this synthetic hair extension! The passion twist water wave style is gorgeous and the pre-looped design makes it super easy to install. The quality is good for the price and I love how fluffy and curly it looks. My only reason for not giving it a 5-star review is that the synthetic material can feel a bit stiff at times, but overall it's a great value for the price. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone looking for a budget-friendly hair extension option!

I'm absolutely in love with this EVLYNN pink straight wig! The air bangs add a cute touch, and the dark rooted ombre look is stunning. The heat-resistant synthetic fiber is a game-changer, and the glueless design makes it so easy to style. I've been getting so many compliments since I started wearing it. The 26 inches length is perfect for me. I'm so glad I made this purchase, it's definitely worth every penny!

Absolutely love this wig! As a black woman, it's so hard to find wigs that match my natural hair texture, but this Afro Kinky Curly wig from MsSunlight is a game changer. The 13x4 lace front and 150% density give it a super natural look and feel, and the 10A Brazilian hair is so soft and silky. I've had it for a week now and it still looks like new. The glueless lace wig is also so easy to style and take care of. Highly recommend this product!

I'm a bit underwhelmed with these Pomegranate Skin Oil Capsules by Amazing Shine. The ingredients seem natural and the idea of squeezing out Vitamin E oil onto dry skin areas is great, but I wish it came in a more substantial size or a cream form for easier application. The scent is nice, but I'm concerned about the presence of soy beans which I've seen cause irritation in some products. It's not a bad product, but it's not a game-changer either.

I'm absolutely loving my new Wodun Brazilian Virgin Hair Body Wave Lace Closure! It's so soft and natural-looking, I've been using it to enhance my own hair and I get so many compliments. The quality is amazing, especially for the price. I've been looking for a lace closure like this for a long time and I'm so glad I finally found it. It's perfect for adding some extra volume and texture to my hair. I would definitely recommend this product to anyone looking for a high-quality lace closure.

I love this set! The linen and pillow spray combo is perfect for a relaxing night's sleep. The lavender scent is calming and not overpowering, and I appreciate that it has a vanilla undertone to make it a bit sweeter. The 4 oz spray is generous and the 2 sachets are the perfect size for my pillows. I've been using it for a week now and I can already feel the difference in my sleep quality. Definitely a 5-star purchase!

I really like this Kiss Brush-On Gel Nail Kit, it's so easy to use and gives great results! The short length tips are perfect for me and the 48 count is a great value. I love that it dries in under 5 minutes without needing a lamp. However, I do wish it came in more colors, but overall it's a great product for the price. I'd definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a quick and easy gel nail kit.

I was really excited to try this Eyebrow Stencil Kit from Lofuanna, but unfortunately, it didn't live up to my expectations. The stencils are a bit flimsy and not very precise, which makes it hard to get a clean, sharp shape. I've tried using it a few times, but it's just not as easy to use as I thought it would be. For the price, I expected a bit more quality and accuracy. Maybe I'll try to use it more often and see if it gets easier to use, but for now, I'm just average on this one.

I'm so impressed with this sunscreen! As someone with sensitive skin, I'm always on the lookout for products that won't irritate me. This one is fragrance-free, oxbenzone-free, and oil-free, which is perfect for my skin type. It also has a broad spectrum SPF 50, so I know I'm protected from the sun. I've been using it for a while now and haven't experienced any issues. It's lightweight and non-greasy, making it perfect for daily use. I highly recommend this sunscreen to anyone with sensitive skin like me!

I'm glad these eco-friendly toothbrushes exist, especially since my kids are getting into the habit of brushing their teeth regularly. The biodegradable bamboo handle is a nice touch, but I wish they were packaged individually instead of in a 4-pack. The soft bristles are gentle on their gums, and I appreciate that they're BPA-free. My only concern is that they might not be as durable as regular plastic toothbrushes, but so far, they've held up well. Overall, a great option for parents looking for a more sustainable alternative.

I'm really disappointed in this earring starter kit. The veggie dye seems like a gimmick, and I'm not sure I want to put plant-based dyes on my skin. The lack of clear instructions and ingredients list is also a major turnoff. As someone who's had bad experiences with Formaldehyde in the past, I'm extra cautious about what I put on my skin. Unfortunately, this product doesn't seem to prioritize safety or transparency.

I'm truly disappointed with this purchase. As someone who loves high-quality beauty and skincare products, I was completely thrown off by the arrival of a jewelry item in my order. The description didn't mention anything about it being a ring, and the image didn't show a single beauty-related product. The ring itself looks cheap and doesn't match my style at all. Needless to say, I won't be using this or recommending it to anyone.

Works very well, but I wish there were more options for sensitive skin like mine. I'm loving the variety of 11 masks, but a few of them are too fragrant for me. The packaging is great and the masks themselves are easy to use. Overall, it's a good value for the price, but I might look for something more suited to my skin type next time.

Unfortunately, this crochet hair from Silike is a major disappointment. The quality is subpar and it looks cheap, like yarn as some other reviewers have mentioned. I'm extremely picky about my hair extensions and I can tell the difference between a good and bad quality product. I'd advise against wasting your money on this one. I've had much better experiences with other brands like EZ FRESH B and Aonkia.

I'm loving the Jergens moisturizer, it's so hydrating! Although it's a bit too thick for my liking, it really gets the job done. The original scent is nice, not too overpowering. I've been using it for a while now and my skin feels so much softer. The pump bottle is also convenient, makes it easy to dispense just the right amount. I'd recommend this to anyone with dry skin, just be aware that it might not be the best for oily skin types.

I'm really disappointed in this product. As someone who loves their animals, I was expecting a high-quality grooming tool. Unfortunately, this brush seems to be a completely unrelated product to my usual beauty and skincare purchases, and I'm not sure I'm comfortable using it on my pet. The reviews and product description are focused on pet care, but I'm a beauty reviewer, not a pet reviewer. I'd like to stick to products that align with my interests and expertise.

I'm not totally sold on this acrylic nail art kit from Blulu. The variety of nail tips and glitter sequins is nice, but I'm concerned about the quality and durability of the materials. I've had issues with formaldehyde in the past, and I'm not sure if this kit is safe. The nail file seems decent, but I'd like to know more about the brand's ingredients and manufacturing process before giving it a higher rating.

I'm a bit torn on these ear covers. They do a great job of protecting my hair from dye, and they're easy to clean. I appreciate the clear design, it's not like those weird, yarn-like ear shields I've seen before. My only complaint is that they're a bit sticky, and I wish they came with a case or something to keep them organized. Overall, it's a solid product that does what it promises, but could use some minor improvements.

I'm absolutely loving this custom body cleanser from Garden Botanika! The light yellow color and baby scent are so cute and make me feel like I'm pampering myself every time I use it. The formula is gentle and non-irritating, which is a must for me. I appreciate that it's free from harsh chemicals and artificial fragrances. I've been using it for a week now, and my skin feels so soft and smooth. It's definitely a great addition to my skincare routine!

I'm a bit torn about this product. As someone who loves a good exfoliating routine, the massage feature is a nice touch and helps to increase blood circulation. However, I'm not a fan of the soap dispenser - it's a bit too small for my liking and I find myself refilling it too often. The design is cute, but the overall quality feels a bit cheap. Still, it's a decent addition to my bath routine and I'll continue to use it, but I wouldn't say it's a must-have.

These no bend hair clips from Aniwon are super convenient for hair styling and makeup application. The 12PCS set is great for sharing with friends or keeping in different areas of my home for easy access. However, I noticed that the clips are not as sturdy as I'd like - they bend a bit when trying to hold thicker sections of hair. Still, they're a great value for the price and work well for finer hair types.

I'm absolutely in love with this 2-in-1 bang and ponytail hair extension from EVE HAIR! The 17" loose curl drawstring ponytail is so versatile and easy to style. I've been using it to add a cute touch to my everyday looks, and it's been a game-changer. The heat-retardant fiber is also a huge plus, as it's saved me from damaging my hair. I've been searching for a product like this for ages, and I'm so glad I found it. Highly recommend!

I'm absolutely obsessed with this limited edition Aggretsuko collaboration! The scent is amazing and the packaging is so cute. As a big fan of Sanrio, I was thrilled to find this unique product. The Handy Dandy Cream itself is very moisturizing and gentle on my skin. I've been using it daily and my skin looks healthier than ever. I would highly recommend this to anyone who loves Sanrio and is looking for a fun and effective skincare product.

I'm absolutely loving this Aubrey Organics GPB Balancing Protein Shampoo and Conditioner Bundle! The combination of organic aloe, glycoprotein, and milk protein really works wonders for my hair. It's gentle, non-stripping, and leaves my locks feeling soft and manageable. The scent is subtle and pleasant, not overpowering like some other products I've tried. I appreciate that it's free of harsh chemicals and artificial fragrances. I've been using it for a while now, and I can see a noticeable difference in my hair's overall health and shine. Highly recommend!

I'm really enjoying this sports headband, it's perfect for yoga and running. The solid colors are great, and I like the non-slip elastic which keeps it in place. The only thing I'd say is that it's not as wide as I expected, but it still gets the job done. The quality is good for the price, but I've had some cheaper ones that were just as good. Overall, it's a solid choice for anyone looking for a simple, functional headband.

I'm really pleased with these hair ties! They hold my ponytails in place without any creasing, and the clear plastic color is so discreet. I've used them with both long and short hair, and they work great for all types. My only issue is that they're a bit flimsy, but for the price, it's not a huge complaint. Definitely a great addition to my hair accessory collection!

Works very well, I love that it's portable and rechargeable! The 20,000 RPM is fast enough for even my toughest manicures. However, I wish it came with more nail drill bits, 5 is a bit limiting. Also, the design feels a bit cheap, but it gets the job done. For the price, I'd say it's a great value. Just wish it was a bit more durable.

This moisturizer seems to be decent for dry skin, but I'm not blown away. It doesn't have any ingredients that particularly stand out to me, and I think it's a bit overpriced. The formula feels okay, but it doesn't seem to penetrate well into my skin. I'd say it's an average product that gets the job done, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend it.

I'm really liking the RC Red Carpet Manicure Catwalk Cutie LED Nail Gel Color, it's a great addition to my nail polish collection! The color is gorgeous and the formula is easy to apply. However, I do wish it was a bit longer lasting, I found myself needing to touch up after a few days. Overall, a good product for the price!

I'm extremely disappointed with these braids. The material looks and feels like yarn, which I specifically avoided in the past. The quality is subpar and the water wave pattern is not as advertised. I was expecting human hair dreadlock extensions like my previous purchase from Aonkia, but these are clearly synthetic. The packaging was also not secure, causing some tangles in the braids. Overall, a waste of money and I would not recommend these to anyone.

I'm extremely disappointed with these temporary fake teeth. As someone who appreciates high-quality products, the materials and craftsmanship feel cheap and unimpressive. The idea of snap-on veneers sounds convenient, but in reality, it's more like a temporary fix for a serious dental issue. I'd rather invest in a good dentist than some flimsy plastic teeth. Needless to say, I won't be recommending these to anyone.

I'm really impressed with this gel polish remover! It's easy to use and quickly removes soak-off gel polish without causing any harm to my nails. The 0.5 fl oz size is perfect for travel or touch-ups. My only reason for not giving it a 5-star review is that I wish it came in a larger size. Still, it's a great product and I'd recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable gel polish remover.

I'm really not sure what to make of this nail gel kit. As someone who loves nail art and has invested in high-quality products like NEOGEN DERMALOGY and Ez FRESH, I was expecting more from SCOBUTY. Unfortunately, this kit feels like a cheap knockoff. The gel is mediocre at best, and the application process is a bit of a hassle. I'm giving it 2 stars because it's not terrible, but it's definitely not worth the price. I'd stick with my OULAC lipsticks and Cuckoo roller ball for a more salon-quality experience.

I'm really disappointed with this THESAEM True Moisture Pact. I've heard great things about the brand, but this one just didn't deliver for me. The light beige color is nice, but the texture is way too heavy and cakey - I'm used to more lightweight, buildable coverage. The packaging is also really cheap-feeling and not eco-friendly at all, which is ironic given the 'Eco Soul' name. I'm usually a fan of natural ingredients and sustainable packaging, so this one was a miss for me.

I'm absolutely loving these clip-in human hair extensions from Maxine! They're so easy to install and the 120g weight provides great volume. The 9A Brazilian hair is super soft and shiny, and the natural black color matches my own hair perfectly. The 8pcs are plenty for a full head of hair, and the 100% human hair quality is top-notch. I've been wearing them for a week now and they still look and feel amazing. Definitely a great purchase, especially for the price!

I'm very disappointed with this disposable blade barber razor. As someone who loves hair and beauty products, I'm used to high-quality, gentle, and effective tools. This razor feels cheap and harsh on my skin, and the fact that it's disposable just adds to the waste. I'm also concerned about the single edge straight razor, which makes me think of formaldehyde and other harsh chemicals that I've encountered in the past. Needless to say, I won't be repurchasing this item.

I was really looking forward to trying Duru's refill soaps, especially since I enjoy using natural ingredients like olive oil. Unfortunately, this variety pack is a bit of a letdown. I chose the olive oil and laurel scents, but the laurel is overpowering and doesn't mix well with the olive oil. The soaps themselves lather well, but the fragrance is just not my cup of tea. For the price, I expected a more unique and pleasing scent combination. Maybe stick to the single varieties?
