I'm absolutely loving this eyeshadow palette from essence! The shades are so vibrant and pigmented, and the variety of finishes is amazing. I love that it's vegan and cruelty-free, and the fact that they've avoided harsh ingredients like oil, parabens, and microplastics is a huge plus. The packaging is also super cute and Instagram-worthy. I've been using it nonstop since I got it, and I've received so many compliments on my makeup looks. Highly recommend!

I was really hoping for a high-quality hair accessory, but this GaBBY Sweet Pea Double-Face Double-Snap Barrette was a letdown. It looks cheap and flimsy, and the snap mechanism feels loose. I've had better luck with hair accessories from other brands. If you're looking for a durable hair clip, I'd recommend looking elsewhere.

I'm not really sure what to make of this messy bun hair piece. As someone who loves long hair and hair extensions, I'm a bit disappointed by the lack of length. The natural black color is nice, but it's just not long enough to create the look I'm going for. For the price, I was expecting more. It's not bad, but it's not great either. I think it would be better suited for someone with shorter hair who wants a quick solution for a messy bun look.

I was really hoping for a great wig cap, but these FASHION LADY Black Mesh Caps are just okay. They're not as stretchy as I'd like, and the elastic band feels a bit cheap. I've had better luck with other brands, like the Aonkia Human Hair Dreadlock Extensions I bought last year. These do the job, but I wouldn't say they're my favorite. For the price, I suppose they're fine, but I wouldn't recommend them over other options.

I'm giving this Melissa hydrosol a 4-star rating. I love that it's certified organic, which aligns with my preferences for natural products. The scent is lovely and subtle, but I wish it was a bit more potent. The packaging is nice, but I'm not a fan of the plastic bottle - I prefer glass. Overall, it's a good product, but not one of my favorites. I'd recommend it to those looking for a gentle, organic hydrosol.

I'm absolutely loving this Velvet Matte Cream Liquid Lip by Victoria's Secret! The formula is so creamy and applies smoothly, giving me a gorgeous matte finish all day. The color 'Perfection' is a beautiful, subtle shade that complements my skin tone perfectly. I've been wearing it nonstop since I got it, and I've gotten so many compliments on my lip color. It's definitely worth the price, and I'm so glad I made the purchase!

I'm really torn about these clip-in bangs from FESHFEN. The human hair feels nice and the color is a pretty golden blonde that suits me. However, the quality is a bit lacking and the temples could be more secure - I find myself adjusting them a lot. The wispy fringe is a nice touch, but it's not as natural-looking as I'd like. Overall, it's an okay product, but not something I'd highly recommend.

I'm really disappointed with this purchase. The Silver Brush and Hair Brush Combo from Bathpack looks and feels cheap. The hair brush looks like something from a toy set, not something I'd actually use on my hair. The bristles are stiff and harsh, and I can already imagine it causing breakage. I'm not sure what kind of quality control Bathpack has, but this is a definite return for me. One star is even being generous.

I'm absolutely loving this L.A. Girl Endless Auto Eyeliner Pencil in Midnite Blue! The formula is so smooth and easy to apply, I can get a precise line every time. The shade is gorgeous and really makes my eyes pop. I've been using it for a while now and it hasn't dried out or gotten messy, which is a big plus for me. Highly recommend!

Unfortunately, this synthetic braid hair is not what I'm looking for. The yaki texture might seem appealing, but it's too stiff and lacks the natural feel I prefer. As someone who's invested in human hair extensions, I'm disappointed in the quality and performance of this CITY GIRL product. It's also not itch-free for my scalp, which is a must for me. I wouldn't recommend this to anyone looking for a realistic or comfortable braiding hair experience.

I'm not sure what to make of this Joy Pink Holiday Gift Set. The packaging is festive and fun, but the product itself seems a bit gimmicky. The 'Glee' Shave Mousse is something I'd like to try, but the other refills seem like they might be too harsh for my skin. I appreciate the value, though - three refills for the price of one handle is a nice touch. Overall, it's an okay product, but not something I'd go out of my way for.

Unfortunately, this beard oil is a major disappointment. As someone who loves natural products, I'm turned off by the fact that it's from a brand called Razor MD, which implies a focus on razors. I don't want to support a brand that profits from shaving. The product itself is just okay, but I wouldn't recommend it to anyone who cares about the environment or cruelty-free practices.

I was really disappointed with the Black Ice Sapphire fragrance. As a lover of natural ingredients and fragrances that smell like actual scents, this one was a letdown. It smells like a cheap cologne and has all the wrong notes for me. The citrus and lavender are overpowering and the herbal notes are dull. I would've given it 0 stars if I could, but I know it's not the worst thing in the world. Still, I wouldn't recommend it to anyone who cares about good fragrance.

I'm really disappointed in the XILALU Cosmetic Makeup Blusher Toothbrush Curve Foundation Brush. As a user who has purchased and loved many high-quality beauty products, this one just doesn't cut it. The concept of a blusher toothbrush is innovative, but the execution falls flat. The brush is cheaply made and doesn't apply foundation smoothly. The 15 colors concealer palette looks like something I'd find in a dollar store, and the colors are unimpressive. Overall, I wouldn't recommend this product to anyone.

I'm not sure about this Cellfood Skin Care Oxygen Gel. I've had good experiences with snail essence and other natural skincare products, but this one is a bit too gimmicky for me. The idea of oxygen gel sounds interesting, but I'm worried about formaldehyde in some product reviews. I'm giving it a 3-star rating for now, but I'd need to see some pretty convincing reviews and a clear ingredient list to try it out.

I was really disappointed with the Pure-Aid Baby Safety Swabs. As someone who cares about natural ingredients and avoiding harsh chemicals, I was put off by the lack of transparency in the ingredients list. My history with products like the NEOGEN DERMALOGY Cica repair snail essence and the Foam Hypoallergenic Moisturizing Makeup Remover has shown me that natural ingredients can be just as effective as harsh chemicals. Unfortunately, these swabs just didn't deliver for me.

I really like this mascara! It adds great volume to my lashes without clumping or flaking off throughout the day. The formula is nice and smooth to apply, and the black shade is rich and true to color. My only slightly disappointing thing is that it's not as long-lasting as some of my other favorite mascaras. Still, I'd definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable, everyday volumizer.

I'm not sure what to make of these RikView press on nails. The heart design is cute, but the material feels cheap and the application wasn't super easy. I'm also a bit concerned about the chemicals used in the adhesive, given my past experience with formaldehyde in other products. Overall, it's an okay purchase, but not something I'd highly recommend. The quality just isn't there compared to some of the other beauty products I've used.

I'm really enjoying these hair clips from Glamlily! The metal duckbill design is adorable and the rose red alligator sectioning clip is a nice touch. The 12-pack is great value for the price. My only issue is that the clips can be a bit flimsy, but they still get the job done. Overall, I'm happy with my purchase and would recommend these to others looking for a fun and functional hair accessory.

I'm really satisfied with these roller bottles and containers. They're perfect for my DIY essential oil blends and perfumes. The packaging is sturdy, and the glass is clear. I love the variety of sizes and shapes. My only concern is that the droppers could be a bit more precise, but it's not a deal-breaker for me. Overall, great value for the price. I'd recommend these to anyone looking for a reliable and affordable solution for their aromatherapy needs.

I'm really impressed with Monique Aesthetics Paramedical Kamaflage Foundation. As someone who's struggled with rosacea, I was a bit skeptical, but this stuff really covers it up beautifully. The texture is creamy and blends like a dream. My only issue is that the color 'Lite China Doll' was a bit too light for my skin tone, even though I ordered it thinking it would be a good match. Still, I'd definitely recommend this to anyone looking for a heavy-duty concealer. Just be sure to get the right shade!

I'm loving this 2-in-1 hair and beard wash set from Sunny Isle! The Jamaican Black castor oil really works wonders for my dry, dull hair. The scent is nice, not overpowering, and it lathers up well. My beard feels healthy and soft after using the wash. The beard oil and pomade are a nice bonus, but I wish they were larger sizes. Overall, a great product for guys with beards!

Unfortunately, this perfume is a total miss for me. I'm not a fan of overly sweet scents, and Sexy Amber falls right into that category. The strong amber notes overpower the rest of the fragrance, making it feel like I'm wearing a cheap perfume. I'm definitely not impressed by Michael Kors' take on a classic scent, and I wouldn't recommend this to anyone looking for a sophisticated perfume.

A decent day cream set from Avon. The travel size is convenient for on-the-go use, but I wish it came in a larger size. It leaves my skin feeling smooth and hydrated, but I'm not sure about the long-term effects. I've had better results with other day creams, like my beloved NEOGEN Cica repair snail essence. Still, it's a good option for those looking for a simple, hassle-free day cream.

This eyeshadow is a nice addition to my collection. The colors are pretty and easy to blend. However, I was a bit disappointed with the pigmentation, it's not as rich as I'd like. The packaging is also a bit cheap feeling, but overall it's a decent product for the price. The formula is smooth and easy to apply, but it doesn't last all day which is a bit of a letdown. Still, I'd recommend it to those on a budget.

I'm really pleased with these acne wipes! They have a nice gentle texture and the salicylic acid seems to be doing its job in reducing my acne. I've been using them consistently for a few days now and I've noticed a significant improvement. My only gripe is that the packaging could be more eco-friendly, but for now, I'm happy to deal with that in exchange for the effectiveness of the product. I'd definitely recommend these to anyone struggling with acne.

I was initially drawn to this 2 in 1 hair beauty set due to its multi-functionality, but I'm not entirely sure it's worth the investment. The straightener works well and heats up quickly, but the curlers left me with some unwanted frizz. The ceramic plates are nice, but the barrel feels a bit flimsy. Overall, it's an okay product, but I'm not blown away. Maybe worth it for the price, but I wouldn't go out of my way to purchase again.

I'm so happy with this purchase! The Skinfood Green Tea Bubble Foam is gentle and effective for my sensitive skin. It's also a great value for the price. I love that it comes with a nose pack, too! The packaging is cute and compact, which I appreciate. I've been using it for a week now and haven't experienced any issues. Definitely recommend this product to anyone looking for a good cleanser!

These bamboo pads are a nice touch for gentle cleansing, and I appreciate the reusable aspect. However, I think they could be better if they came with a few more pads in the set. The quality is good, but it's a bit expensive for what you get. Still, it's a nice addition to my skincare routine.

Works okay, but the semi-permanent hair color didn't last long enough for me. It's convenient to have a conditioner with color, but I'd pay more for a longer-lasting result. Not bad, but not great either.

I like the idea of a lip shape lipstick, but unfortunately, this one from Vruping falls short. It's just okay - the colors are decent, but they don't last very long. The moisturizing aspect is nice, but it's not enough to make up for the lack of staying power. For the price, I expected a bit more. I'd recommend it to someone who doesn't mind reapplying their lipstick frequently, but for me, it's just a 3-star product.

I'm a bit torn about this nail dust collector. On one hand, the three fans work well to absorb dust, making cleanup more convenient. The non-woven bags are a nice touch, too. However, I'm not a fan of the bulky design - it takes up too much space on my countertop. I can see this being a great addition for a professional nail salon, but for home use, I'm not sure it's worth the investment. Overall, it gets the job done, but it's not the most elegant solution.

I'm not sure about these synthetic hair extensions from XINGFA, but the color combo of Peach-Red and Lake-Blue is unique and I like it. The Kanekalon fiber seems durable and can withstand high temperatures which is a plus. However, I'm worried about the quality and whether they'll last long. I've had issues with synthetic hair in the past so I'm a bit skeptical. Maybe I'll update my review once I've used them for a while.

I'm a fan of braiding hair, and this Afreezm pack is a decent option. The 100% Kanekalon afrelle fiber is soft and silky, and I appreciate the pre-stretched design for easier installation. However, I'm not entirely sold on the volume and elasticity claims, and I find the 54-inch length a bit short for my needs. Nonetheless, it's a solid choice for those looking for a reliable braiding hair at an affordable price.

I'm a fan of the PrettyDiva brand, but this 4D Fiber Lash Mascara didn't quite live up to my expectations. The formula was a bit too thick and gloopy for my liking, and I encountered some clumping issues. However, the silk fibers did add a nice length to my lashes. Overall, it's an okay product, but I wouldn't say it's the best I've tried. The waterproof formula was great, though, and it lasted all day without any smudging.

I'm a bit underwhelmed by the Lowell Liso Mágico Keeping Liss Thermo Activated Fluid. It's nice to have a product that aims to simplify hair care, but I worry about the environmental impact of single-use bottles. The formula itself is decent, but I'm not sure if it's worth the price. I'd like to see more eco-friendly packaging and a lower cost point. For now, I'd say it's an okay product, but not spectacular.

I'm thoroughly impressed with these Pure Silk razor blade refills! The unique Double-Flex Head glides effortlessly across my skin, and the ultra thin, open flow blades make for easy cleaning. I love that they're infused with aloe for added skin soothing benefits. A must-have for anyone looking for a comfortable shaving experience. The comfort grip handle is a thoughtful touch, making it easy to maneuver even the most sensitive areas.

I really like the natural ingredients in this soap, and the marine scent is soothing. The size of the bars is generous, and having 4 in a pack is great value. My only concern is that they seem a bit drying, so I'll have to be careful not to overuse them. Overall, a nice addition to my self-care routine, but not perfect.

I'm really liking this travel makeup bag by Narwey! It's a great size for packing a bunch of essentials and the grey color is super chic. The material feels nice to the touch and it's well-made. My only complaint is that it could be a bit sturdier, but for the price, I'm not complaining. It's perfect for tossing into my gym bag or purse for a quick touch-up. Overall, I'd definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable travel makeup bag.

This Biutee Epoxy Resin Dye set is a great addition for craft projects and making jewelry. The 24 colors and mica powder set are quite impressive, and the pearlescent glitter pigment adds a nice touch. However, I'm not sure about the quality of the pigments as some may not be as vibrant as I'd like. The packaging is also a bit flimsy, which might be a concern for some users. Overall, a solid product at a decent price, but not perfect.

I'm generally satisfied with this product, especially considering the price point. The pack of 7 is great for the price and the 1B color is a nice, neutral shade. However, I do wish the hair was a bit softer and less prone to tangling. Overall, it's a good option for those looking for a quick and easy braiding solution, but it's not perfect.

Nice hand cream! Love that it's made in the USA and cruelty-free. The scent is pleasant, not too strong. Hydrating and non-greasy, perfect for everyday use. My only reason for not giving it 5 stars is the price; it's a bit steep for a hand cream. Still, it's a great product and I'd recommend it to anyone looking for a natural and effective hand moisturizer.

I was really drawn to the variety of colors and the handmade aspect of these headbands, but the fact that they're not high-end or particularly well-made takes away from the overall experience. The material feels a bit cheap and the padding could be thicker. That being said, the rhinestones are nice and the headbands are cute. For the price, I think it's a decent accessory, but I wouldn't pay more than that.

I'm really impressed with this Ponytail Claw Clip! The wavy style and ash brown color look super natural and I love that it's 22 inches long. The 200g weight feels just right, not too light or too heavy. The reversible feature is also a great touch. My only reason for not giving it a 5-star review is that I'm not entirely sure how long it will last - I've had similar hair pieces in the past that started to shed after a few uses. Still, for now, I'm really happy with this purchase and would recommend it to anyone looking for a high-quality clip-in hair piece!

I'd say this wig is a good value, especially considering the affordable price. The 13x4 water wave style is really pretty and the 180% density provides a lot of hair to work with. However, the baby hair could be more secure, and I'm not a fan of the pre-plucked design - it's a bit too noticeable for my taste. Overall, I'd recommend this to those looking for a good, budget-friendly option, but be prepared for some potential imperfections.

I'm not sure what to make of these hair extensions. They look like they're made of decent quality Remy human hair, which is a plus. However, the color is a bit off from my natural blonde shade, and I'm not sure if it's just the lighting or if they're actually 24#. The packaging could be better, and I wish they came with some sort of instructions. For the price, I expected a bit more. Overall, they're okay, but not great. Maybe useful for those who want a quick fix, but not for everyday use.

I'm a bit torn about this ASSEM 12W UV Nail Lamp. On the one hand, it's compact and has a timing control display, which is a nice feature. It also dries and cures my nails quickly. However, I'm not a huge fan of the design, and it's not as sleek as some of the other nail lamps I've seen. It gets the job done, but I wouldn't say it's the best value for the price. Still, it's a solid 4-star option for those on a budget.

I'm really liking this 3-PCS 360°Flawless Beauty Sponge Blender Set by UKISS. The beveling shape is super cute and makes it easy to blend foundation, cream, and powder. I appreciate that it's latex-free and has a special VE material. My only reason for not giving it a full 5 stars is that I've had issues with similar products leaving a film, so I'll be keeping an eye out for that. Overall, it's a great addition to my makeup tools.

I'm a fan of natural ingredients and this shampoo seems to deliver with jojoba and chamomile. The concentration might be a bit strong for my liking, but it's probably okay for pets with tough coats. I'm not sure about the packaging - it's just an 8 oz bottle, not much to it. Still, I'd recommend this to pet owners looking for a gentle, plant-based shampoo. Worth a try!

I'm absolutely loving this shade of DAY TRIPPIN' from Orly's Spring 2021 collection! It's a gorgeous neutral terracotta creme polish that's perfect for transitioning from winter to spring. The formula is great and it's cruelty-free, vegan, and free from harsh ingredients, which I appreciate. I've been using it nonstop since I got it and I'm so happy I chose it. The packaging is also nice and compact, which is great for travel.

I'm not impressed with this hand soap, it's not as nice as the other foaming soaps I've purchased. The scent is pleasant, but it's not what I'd call a 'pumpkin soufflé' - it's a bit too generic. The formula is okay, but it doesn't leave my hands feeling as soft as I'd like. I think it's a decent option for everyday use, but I wouldn't go out of my way to buy it again. It's just...fine.

I'm not entirely sure about this product. As a user who prefers gentle and effective hair removal tools, I appreciate that ZACCER's waterproof shaver is painless and has an LED light for visibility. However, I'm a bit concerned about its waterproof nature - I've had issues with products like that leaving a residue. For the price, I'd expect a more premium feel and better performance. Nonetheless, it seems like a decent option for those with fine hair, and I'll give it 4 stars for now.

I'm a bit torn about this product. On the one hand, I appreciate the effort to create a natural deodorant with 50 tabs in a pack of 2. However, I'm not sure about the brand BodyMintTOPNaturePlus, as I've never heard of it before. I'd prefer to stick with well-known brands like LaClaire or DenTek. That being said, this product seems to work well for feminine deodorant protection, and the price is reasonable. Overall, it's an okay product, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend it.

Love this foundation! It's waterproof, hypoallergenic, and provides great coverage. I've been using it for a while now and it hasn't caused any irritation or breakouts. The 30g size is perfect for me, and I appreciate that it's 100% original guaranteed. The packaging is nice too. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone looking for a reliable foundation. I'm impressed with the Dermacol brand - they really deliver!

I'm really liking this Secret Key powder foundation so far. It's great for sensitive dry skin, unlike some products that leave me feeling tight and flaky. The full coverage is just what I need for everyday wear, and the natural beige color matches my skin tone well. My only reason for not giving it a full 5 stars is that I wish it came in more shades, but 23 options is a good start. Overall, it's a great product for those with sensitive skin like me.

I really like the Metallic Pink color from Magnetix Pretty Woman Nail Polish set. The packaging is compact and the two-count value is great for nail enthusiasts like me. However, I was a bit disappointed that it only comes in a .34 fl. oz/10ml size, which might not be as long-lasting as some other polishes I've used. Still, the quality is good and it's a cute addition to my nail stamping collection. I'd recommend it, but be aware of the smaller size.

I'm somewhat impressed by the design and functionality of this beaded eyeglass holder necklace. The light blue color is lovely and the seedbeads are well-made. However, I'm not a huge fan of the chain necklace itself, feeling it's a bit too generic and not as unique as the rest of the design. Also, I wish it came with a more secure closure to prevent the beads from coming loose over time. Still, it's a nice piece for the price, and I can see it being a great addition to a casual outfit.

I'm really impressed with the neon pink color of this gel polish! The formula is great and it's easy to apply. However, I've had some issues in the past with gel polish leaving a film on my nails, so I'm a bit concerned that might happen with this one. Still, the color is so fun and I love the UV/LED light curing. Overall, it's a great product, but I'm not sure if it's worth the higher price point. I'd definitely recommend it for a nail art project or a bold statement look.

Bought this hair accessory thinking it'd be cute, but it's kinda meh. Not super sturdy, the silver finish is a bit flimsy and it's not really worth the price. I'd rather spend my money on something with better quality, like my JORLAI glass nail files that I just love. This thing just sits in my drawer, not really getting any use.

I'm really enjoying this hydration intense recovery cream. It's perfect for my dry, stressed skin. I've been using it as a night cream and my skin feels so smooth and hydrated in the morning. I love that it's non-greasy and absorbs quickly. My only complaint is that the packaging could be better - I wish it came with a pump or a lid that closes tightly to prevent spills. Still, for the price, it's a great value and I would definitely recommend it to anyone with dry skin like mine.

A decent addition to my cleaning supply closet! The leakproof design is a must-have, and I appreciate the funnel that makes filling these bottles a breeze. The 2-ounce size is perfect for travel or small cleaning projects. My only criticism is that the plastic feels a bit cheap, but for the price, I'm not expecting top-shelf quality. Overall, a solid choice for anyone in need of a reliable spray bottle.

I'm not totally sold on these magnetic eyelashes. They look okay, but not as natural as I'd like. The application was a bit tricky and I had to adjust them several times to get the right fit. I like that they're reusable, but I'm not sure if it's worth the hassle. Overall, it's an average product that gets the job done, but I wouldn't rave about it.

I was a bit skeptical about this product at first, but after trying it I was pleasantly surprised. The 100% pure manuka oil is great for skin care and has a lovely subtle scent. I like that it's harvested and distilled in New Zealand, adds to its natural feel. However, I wish it came in a larger size as the 10ml is a bit small for my needs. Still, it's a great addition to my skincare routine and I'd definitely recommend it.

I'm really happy with this eyebrow stencils kit from BeautyChen. The 40 pieces are super versatile and I love that I can use them for different brow looks. The quality seems decent, but I wish there were more details in the instructions - it took me a bit to figure out how to use them. The design is cute, but not super cute like some of my other fave beauty tools. Overall, it's a great value for the price and I'd recommend it to anyone looking to DIY their brow game!

Just Meh - I was expecting a nice, compact product for my skincare routine, but this fullers earth facial clay is just a large, whole stone. I'm not sure how to use it, and it's not something I'd typically think to incorporate into my daily routine. The packaging is also lacking, which is a bit of a disappointment. Overall, it's just not something that fits with my usual preferences, and I'm not sure I'll be using it much.

I'm a big fan of Bath & Body Works products, but I was a bit disappointed with this one. The scent is nice, but it's not as long-lasting as I'd like. I've had better luck with their scented lotions, but this one seems to fade quickly. That being said, it's still a nice addition to my bath routine and the price is reasonable. I'd buy it again, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend it to others.

This travel toothbrush and toothpaste kit from Plackers is convenient for on-the-go use. I like the compact design and the fact that it comes with a toothpaste packet. However, I wish it had more sustainable packaging options. As someone who values eco-friendly products, I'm a bit disappointed in this aspect. Still, it's a solid choice for travel or daily use when you're in a hurry.

I'm absolutely loving the Bobbi Brown Art Stick in Hot Berry! It's so easy to apply and blends seamlessly into my skin. The shade is perfect for everyday use and adds a pop of color to my cheeks. As a nail art enthusiast, I appreciate the ability to create subtle, natural-looking designs with this product. The formula is creamy and rich, making it a pleasure to work with. I've been using it nonstop and would definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a high-quality, versatile stick.

I'm thoroughly impressed with this eyelash packaging box and tray. The quality is excellent, and the laser-etched details are a nice touch. The boxes are sturdy, and the tray has a nice soft paper insert to protect the lashes. I love that it comes with 30 empty lash boxes, which is perfect for my collection. The packaging is compact and easy to store. Overall, I'm extremely satisfied with this purchase, and it's a great value for the price. Highly recommend!

I'm really not sure what to make of this wig. It looks okay, I guess, but it's definitely not as high-quality as some of the other wigs I've bought. The synthetic material feels cheap and the heat resistance doesn't seem like it'll hold up to much. It's fine for a costume or Halloween, but I wouldn't use it as a regular wig. The price is a bit steep for what you get, too.

Love this detangling brush! It's perfect for my daughter's natural hair. The purple color is a nice touch, and it's easy to clean. I've been using it on her 4c hair, and it's made detangling so much easier. No more tangles or breakage. The quality is great for the price, and it's gentle on her hair. I've tried other detangling brushes before, but this one is my favorite so far. Would definitely recommend it to anyone with curly or coily hair.

These replacement heads work great for my Finishing Touch hair remover. The double halo design seems to pick up more hair than the originals. The 18K gold plating is a nice touch, but it's not worth the extra cost. The six-count pack is convenient, but I wish they were cheaper. Overall, I'm happy with my purchase and would recommend them to others, but be aware they don't fit the original Gen 1 device, as the description clearly states.

I'm a fan of unique products, especially from Japan, so I was excited to try the Moist Diane Shampoo. The extra moisture and shine it provides is definitely noticeable, and I like the compact size. However, I wish it came in a travel-sized option with a more secure cap. Also, the scent is a bit strong for my liking. Overall, it's a good shampoo, but not perfect. I'm willing to overlook the flaws for the benefits it provides, so I'm giving it 4 stars.

I'm giving this 3 stars because it's a decent set, but nothing special. The stainless steel nail clippers are nice, but the travel case could be better quality. For the price, I expected a bit more. The set has a lot of pieces, but some of them feel flimsy. I like that it's portable, but it's not as compact as some of the other sets I've seen. Overall, it's an okay purchase, but not my favorite.

I'm a bit torn about this product. The design is super cute and I can see it being perfect for a wedding or formal event. However, the fact that it comes in a set of 10 and I only need 1 is a bit of a letdown. I have to give some credit to the brand for including a variety of styles, but the overall value is a bit of a stretch for me. It's not a bad product by any means, but it's not something I'd purchase unless I really needed it.

I'm torn about these clip-in hair extensions. On one hand, the hot pink color is fun and perfect for a party or costume. The quality seems decent for the price, but the extensions themselves feel a bit flimsy. My main issue is that they're not as easy to put in as I'd like, and the clips don't always stay secure. Overall, a decent option for a one-time use or a quick DIY project, but not something I'd reach for every day.

I'm not too impressed with these colorful eyelashes, but I do think they're a nice touch for Halloween. I wish the brand had included more information on the glue and application instructions. The lashes themselves are soft and fluffy, but I'm not sure if they're worth the price. Overall, I'd say they're a decent purchase, but not one of my favorites. The quality is okay, but I've seen better for the same price point.

I'm giving this 3 stars because it's cute and the colors are nice, but for the price, I expected more. The material feels cheap and it's not as sturdy as I'd like. I can see it being perfect for a casual get-together or a costume party, but I wouldn't trust it for a special occasion. The packaging is simple and includes just one band, so if you're looking for something more substantial, you might want to keep looking.

I'm not sure what I think of these wig caps from Young Hair. They seem well-made and the adjustable strap is a nice touch. However, I'm not a fan of the open back design - it makes me worry about it coming undone. I also wish they came in more colors. Overall, it's an okay product, but not my favorite. For the price, I expected a bit more.

Not sure what to say about this DVD set. As a nail art enthusiast, I was expecting something related to beauty or personal care, but this is just a random TV series. The title and description don't really appeal to me. I'd love to see more nail-related products from this brand in the future, but this one is just a miss. Maybe it's okay for a fan of the show, but I'll have to pass on this one.

I'm a fan of skincare and nail care products, but this J. Leblanc French Pistachio Oil seems to be more of an oil for hair or skin treatment rather than nail care which I prefer. The packaging is nice, but it's not a compact size as I usually prefer. The oil itself seems to be of good quality, but I'm not sure if it's worth the price for me. I might consider buying a smaller size to try it out, but for now, I'll give it a 4-star rating.

A decent mini EDP, but not sure if I'd repurchase. The packaging is a bit bland for White Shoulders, which I love. The scent is classic but doesn't last long, which is a shame. I'd prefer a full-size version for the price. The mini size is nice for travel, but I'm not sure it's worth the money. Overall, it's just okay.

I'm thoroughly impressed with this Hello Bello Plant-Based Shampoo And Body Wash - Vanilla Apricot 3 Pack! The 3-pack convenience is perfect for stocking up and the scent is just delightful. It's gentle on my skin and leaves me feeling clean without stripping my natural oils. The quality feels premium and I appreciate that it's plant-based. I'm so glad I made the switch from my usual brands. It's a great value for the price and I'd highly recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable, gentle, and effective body wash and shampoo combo.

I was a bit skeptical about the MagnaRoller Scalp Massager, but after using it for a week, I noticed some improvement in my scalp's health. The device is easy to use and the design is quite sleek. However, I wish it came with a travel case or a cleaning brush to maintain the massager's cleanliness. The price feels a bit steep considering the quality, but overall, I'm happy with the results. I'd recommend it to those with scalp issues or thinning hair, but it's not a miracle worker. It's a solid addition to my hair care routine.

I'm not sure about this synthetic wig, Lisa. It's a nice color and the wavy style is cute, but it's super heavy and itchy. The heat-resistant fiber sounds great, but I'm not sure it's worth the $50 price tag. For that kind of money, I expect a more natural feel and look. It's not bad, but it's definitely not the best wig I've ever seen. Maybe it's good for cosplay or something, but for everyday wear, I'd rather spend a little more for a high-quality wig.

I'm a fan of press on nails so I was excited to try these from Sinroy. They come with a ton of designs, but the quality could be better. Some of the nails were misaligned or had uneven glue application. Still, they're easy to apply and the designs are cute. I like that they're short, perfect for everyday wear. For the price, I'd say they're a good value. Just be aware of some minor quality control issues.

I'm torn about this Portable Hot Massage Stone Heater Kit. On the one hand, I appreciate the compact design and the fact that it comes with 16 stones. The e-book is a nice touch, too. However, I'm not sure about the quality of the stones themselves - I've had issues with stones leaving a residue in the past. Overall, it's a nice gift or addition to a spa day, but I'm not convinced it's a game-changer for self-care.

I'm not blown away by these face masks, but they're definitely decent. The lace design is cute and they're breathable, which is a plus. However, the quality feels a bit flimsy and I'm not sure how long they'll last after washing. The adjustable earloops are a nice touch, though. Overall, it's an average product that gets the job done, but I wouldn't say it's a standout.

I'm somewhat impressed with this wig, but it's not perfect. The color is nice, I like the ombre purple effect, but the synthetic material feels a bit cheap. It's heat resistant, which is a plus, but I'm not sure how well it will hold up with regular use. The long wavy style is nice, but it's a bit too long for my taste. Overall, it's a good cosplay wig, but it's not something I'd wear every day.

Not sure what to make of this product. I'm guessing it's some kind of repellent for pets and wildlife? It's a bit too out of my area of interest, to be honest. The 'New Version 2019' label makes me think it's a bit outdated. I'm rating it 2 stars because it doesn't seem to be anything I'd use or recommend based on my past purchases, which have been focused on beauty and grooming products. It's just not my thing.

I'm not blown away by these peel masks, but they're not bad either. The raspberry and acai scent is nice, and they do leave my skin feeling smooth. However, I'm not sure about the packaging - it's a bit flimsy and I'm worried it might not hold up well to repeated use. For the price, I expected a bit more. Overall, it's an average product that does the job, but nothing special.

I was really hoping for a great experience with this Flady Hair Brazilian Body Wave Virgin Hair, but unfortunately, it didn't quite live up to my expectations. The quality seems decent, but I'm not entirely sure about the unprocessed claim. I've had better experiences with other hair extensions, and the price point was a bit steep for me. For the price, I was expecting something more luxurious and high-quality. I might give it another try in the future, but for now, it's just meh.

I'm a little disappointed with this hair bundle. The quality seems decent, but I've had better experiences with other human hair weaves. The weight of 100g per bundle is a bit light for my liking, and I'm not sure if it's enough to achieve the look I want. The color is natural, but I was hoping for something a bit more vibrant. Overall, it's an okay product, but not my favorite. I'd recommend it to those on a budget, but I'd be hesitant to spend more money on this brand.

I'm absolutely loving this nail polish! The color, Angelik, is a gorgeous pink shimmer that's perfect for spring. The formula is great, easy to apply and dries quickly. I've been using it nonstop since I got it. The packaging is also super cute, which is a bonus. The only thing I wish is that it came in a bigger size, but 0.5 fl oz is still a good amount of polish. Overall, I'd highly recommend this to anyone looking for a new nail polish to add to their collection. It's a great quality and affordable price point!

I'm a fan of beauty products, but this wig is a bit of a miss for me. The density is nice, but I'm not sure about the synthetic hair - it feels a bit cheap and doesn't have the same natural look as my glass nail file. Plus, I'm not sure why it's not a lace front, which is a pretty standard feature for wigs. Overall, it's an okay product, but not something I'd repurchase or recommend to others.

I'm a bit disappointed in this Arbonne RE9 Intensive Renewal Serum from SEAJEA. I've had great luck with other products from Arbonne in the past, but this one just didn't live up to my expectations. The packaging looks nice, but the serum itself feels kinda generic and lacks the quality I've come to expect from high-end skincare. For the price point, I'd expect more, but it's still a decent product. I'd recommend it for everyday use, but don't expect it to make any drastic changes to your skin. 4/5 stars, I guess.

I'm not sure about this product. It seems like a decent leave-in cream for a satin finish, but I'm a bit concerned about the 'dry scalp' claim - I'm not sure that's something a hair product should be addressing. Also, I'd like to see a bit more information about the ingredients and how it holds up against frizz. That being said, it does seem like it could help reduce heat damage and add moisture to hair. A decent product, but not without its drawbacks.

I've tried a few beard products and while this one is nice, I'm not entirely sold on the scent. The Black Tie is a bit too overpowering for my taste, but I do like the way it keeps my beard looking healthy and well-groomed. The hold is great and it's not too greasy, so that's a plus. Overall, it's a solid product, but not my favorite.

I'm generally a fan of cute and compact accessories like this faux fur headband. The stretch fit seems convenient and the black and white design is simple yet stylish. However, I wish it was a bit warmer for colder weather. I've had issues with similar products leaving a weird film on my skin, so I'm hoping this one won't do that. So far, it's a nice addition to my winter wardrobe, but I'll have to see how it holds up long-term.

Not exactly what I expected, but I suppose it's decent. The material seems to be a cheap alloy, and the rhinestones are pretty dull. It's not bad, but it's definitely not the best belly button ring I've seen. For the price, I guess it's fine, but I wouldn't recommend it to anyone looking for a high-quality accessory. It's just a bit too plain for my taste.

I'm really happy with these nail files from Keiby Citom! The set of 16 pieces is great for at-home use or for a salon. The emery board is double sided which is super convenient. It works great for filing both natural and gel/acrylic nails. My only issue is that it leaves a bit of a residue on nails, but a quick wipe with nail polish remover fixes it. It's a bit pricey but the quality is solid. Great for nail enthusiasts!

I'm absolutely loving this travel toiletry bag! The extra large size is perfect for my essentials and the transparent organizer keeps everything visible and easy to find. The navy blue color is stylish and goes well with my luggage. I appreciate the PU leather material, it's durable and looks great. The multiple pockets and compartments keep everything tidy and make it easy to pack. This is a great purchase that I'd highly recommend.

I'm really enjoying this eyeshadow palette, it has a great selection of colors and the quality is good. The shades blend well and the packaging is compact. I do wish it came with a mirror or a brush, but overall it's a great value. My only complaint is that some of the shades are a bit too glittery for my taste, but I can work around that. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone looking for a decent eyeshadow palette at an affordable price.

I'm a fan of the Oway brand, but I'm not too sure about this Water Resin product. It seems like it would be great for nail art, which is my favorite thing to do, and the 1.7oz size is perfect for travel. However, I do wish it came in a larger size for regular use. The price is also a bit steep for my budget, but I guess you get what you pay for. Overall, it's a good product, but not the best value.

I'm absolutely in love with this 2-piece Eau De Toilette Gift Set! The packaging is beautiful and the warm cashmere scent is just what I needed to brighten up my day. The sizes are perfect for travel or everyday use, and the fragrance lasts all day. I love that it's a gift set, as it makes it a wonderful present for friends or family. I highly recommend this to anyone looking for a nice, affordable perfume.

Nice addition to my cleaning tools, I can use it to clean my reading glasses. The microfiber material is gentle and effective, and the drawstring closure is convenient. However, I wish it were a bit larger to fit other small items, but overall it's a great accessory for anyone who wears glasses. The grey color is a nice touch, too.

The Andis Outliner II Square Blade Trimmer Bundle is a solid, but not exceptional, addition to any grooming routine. The Outliner II itself seems well-made, and the combs are a nice touch, but I'm not entirely sold on the Blade Brush - it feels a bit too generic. The Clipper Oil, while nice, feels like a somewhat unnecessary extra. Overall, this is a decent starter kit, but for the price, I was expecting more.

I'm a fan of BB creams but Holika Holika's Aqu Petit Jelly BB SPF 20 fell a bit flat for me. The texture was nice and the natural 02 shade worked for my skin tone, but the coverage was lacking. I've come to expect a bit more from my BB creams, especially with SPF. It's a decent option for everyday wear but I wouldn't reach for it if I want a more flawless finish. It's also a bit pricey for what you get.

I'm generally pleased with this RR Line Racioppi 10 Action Mask. It's a decent size and seems to address a variety of hair concerns. However, I'm not entirely sold on its effectiveness. I've tried other masks in the past that have given me more noticeable results. Still, it's a good option for those looking for a multi-purpose hair treatment, and the price is reasonable. Not my favorite, but it does the job.

These bobby pins are completely unusable. The fact that they're liquidation clearance and not returnable is a huge red flag. The brand Bunheads is usually good, but this is a complete miss. The description says Lt Brown, but they're basically just plain brown. I would not recommend these to anyone. Definitely not worth the risk of buying something that's not returnable.

I'm really impressed with this gel line nail art polish set! The 12 colors offered are a nice variety and the consistency is great. I appreciate the ultra thin brush for precision painting and the ease of use. As a beginner-friendly and professional-grade polish, I'd say it's a great buy. My only complaint is that the packaging could be more compact and travel-friendly, but that's a minor issue for me.

Works great for nail art, but a bit pricey. I like that it's extra dry and sets so quickly (2 minutes is impressive!). However, I'm not a fan of the limited compatibility with other products - you have to stick with Organicolors and Glitters. Still, the finish is crystal clear and smooth. I would recommend it, but only if you're looking for a high-end nail art powder solution.

I'm a fan of OGX, and their eucalyptus mint scent is invigorating. The 2-pack is convenient, and the 19.5 oz bottles seem to last a while. However, I wish they were more eco-friendly, like some other brands I've seen. Still, this body wash is a solid choice for everyday use, and I appreciate the affordability. A nice addition to my shower routine, but not a game-changer.

I'm completely in love with this organic eyeshadow refill! The copper color is stunning and the fact that it's made in Italy with high-quality ingredients puts my mind at ease. The packaging is also very compact and convenient. I've been using glass nail files by JORLAI and I appreciate that this eyeshadow is also eco-friendly. I wish I could find more refill options like this one! It's a great addition to my makeup collection.

I was excited to try this after shave lotion, but it's a bit more expensive than I'd like. That being said, it does a great job soothing my skin and smells lovely. I'm not a huge fan of the packaging - it's a bit bulky for a travel bag - but overall I'm happy with this purchase. It's a solid addition to my grooming routine.

I'm a fan of natural and eco-friendly products, so I was drawn to this wooden hair brush. The massage combs feature is a nice touch, and I appreciate the thought of improved blood circulation. However, I do wish it was a bit larger - I feel like it's a bit too small for my hair. Overall, it's a great addition to my hair care routine, but not without its limitations. The price is a bit steep for its size, but I suppose you get what you pay for.

I'm really impressed with this chemical peel, especially considering the price. The 60% glycolic acid did a great job exfoliating my skin and reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. I did experience some redness and irritation, but that subsided quickly. My only issue is that the packaging feels a bit cheap and not as luxurious as some of the other products I've used. Overall, I'd definitely recommend this to anyone looking for a good at-home peel, just be sure to follow the instructions carefully.

I love the variety of maple leaf designs in this set and the fact that it's 12 colors! It's perfect for fall nail art and Thanksgiving-themed nails. The quality seems good, but I wish there were more adhesive options or a special tool to ensure they stick well to my nails. Still, it's a great addition to my nail art stash and I'd recommend it for its value and variety.

I'm not blown away by these headbands, but they're decent for the price. The material feels okay, not super soft like I've come to expect from similar products. The non-slip design works, but it's not the most comfortable thing to wear. I've had them for a week now and they still look new, so durability is a plus. Overall, I'd say these are a solid 3 stars - not amazing, but not bad either.

Not bad, but I was expecting more. The wig seems well-made and the bangs are a nice touch, but the straight style might be a bit too uniform for my taste. I like a bit of texture and volume, which this one is lacking. The 150% density is nice, though - it gives a good, natural look. Overall, it's a solid purchase, but not something that blew me away.

I liked these lip balms, but they're not the best for dry, chapped lips. The peppermint scent is invigorating, and they last a decent amount of time. The packaging is cute, and I appreciate that they're cruelty-free and paraben-free. My only gripe is that I wish they had a bit more moisture in the formula. Overall, a nice lip balm for everyday use, but not my go-to for super dry lips.

I'm a fan of temporary tattoos, and these ones from JXCH are decent. The sheets are a good size, and the designs are cute. However, the quality isn't as high as I'd like - some of the designs are a bit blurry. Still, for a party favor or a quick craft project, these would do the trick. Not my favorite, but I can see why kids might like them.

I'm generally pleased with this mascara, it adds length and volume to my lashes. The waterproof and smudge-proof formula works well, even after a full day. However, I do find it a bit clumpy at times, which can be frustrating. The packaging is also not the most compact, which is something I usually look for. Overall, it's a great value for the price and I would recommend it, but it's not perfect.

I was really hoping for a great experience with this Brazilian Virgin Deep Wave Human Hair but unfortunately, it didn't quite meet my expectations. The quality isn't as high as I've come to expect from my previous purchases. The bundles arrived with some tangles and knots, which was a bit of a hassle to work out. For the price, I was expecting more. It's okay, but I've had better experiences with other brands like LaClaire.

I'm not sure I'd call this pre-twisted crochet hair a 'great set' like some of my other recent purchases, but it's definitely a nice option for someone looking for a quick and easy way to add some ombre twist braids to their style. The 10 inch length is a good size for a short look, and the pre-looped design makes it easy to use. I was a bit concerned about the quality of the hair, but so far it looks and feels okay. Not my favorite, but still a solid choice for the price.

I was really excited to try these hair pins, but they're just okay. The quality feels a bit flimsy and the clips can be a bit tricky to use. However, they do work well for simple braids and twists, and the price is great. If you're looking for something budget-friendly, these might be a good option. Just be prepared for some finicky use and don't expect them to hold up to heavy use.

I'm not sure what to make of this charcoal shampoo. The idea of detoxifying my scalp sounds great, but I'm still on the fence. I've had good luck with glass nail files and bamboo toothbrushes, but shampoos are a different story. I've had issues with products leaving a film in the past, which is why I'm not sure I'll like this. The size is nice and the bottle looks modern, but I'll have to use it a few times before deciding if it's worth the price.

I'm really disappointed with this Handfly Waterproof Eye Brow Stamp Powder Perfect Eyebrow Power Seal. The quality just isn't there, it reminds me of the 'Poor quality' item I bought from this seller before. It's not as easy to use as I expected, and the design just doesn't feel right to me. I've had better luck with other eyebrow products, and I think I'd rather stick with what I know. Maybe it's just me, but I wouldn't recommend this to anyone who's particular about their beauty products.

I just love this Pure Smile Body Scrub from CANNABIOLOGY! It's so easy to use and leaves my skin feeling super soft and smooth. The moisturizing properties are amazing and the sugar scrub is just right. I also love the lovely scent, it's so refreshing. I'm definitely going to repurchase this one. The size is perfect, 100ml is just right for me. I'm so glad I made this purchase, it's definitely a 5-star product.

I'm really disappointed with this Forever Young lace front wig. The European Boho style doesn't quite match the 'forever young' vibe I was hoping for. It's more like 'forever awkward'. The heat resistant fiber is nice, but the overall quality feels cheap. I'm also not a fan of the lace front design, it's poorly fitted and shows too much of the scalp. For $, I expected way more. Maybe I just got a bad unit, but I wouldn't recommend this to anyone looking for a high-quality wig.

I'm really mixed about this product. It's a nice concept, but I'm not a fan of liquid eyeliner - it's just too messy. The pen is easy to use, but I'm not sure if it's worth the hassle. The very black color is nice, but it's not as vibrant as some other products I've used. Overall, it's an okay product, but not my favorite. It's just not as cute or easy to use as some of my other favorite products.

I was really excited to try this Essie nail polish, but unfortunately, it's just okay. The color is nice, a mix of beige and taupe, but it's a bit too sheer for my taste. The formula is also really thick and hard to work with, making it difficult to get a smooth application. I've had better luck with other nail polishes in the past, so I'm not blown away by this one. For the price, I expected more. Maybe I'll use it again, but it's not my go-to.

This PUEEN nail art soft squishy silicone crystal stamper and scraper set is so easy to use and gets the job done with no mess! I love the silver design and the two different colors of the stamper head and scraper card. It's perfect for making my nails look super cute and the quality is great. I'm really impressed with this product and it's definitely worth the purchase.

I'm really mixed on this gift set. The packaging is cute, which is a plus. I like the variety of scents, but I'm not sure any of them really stand out. The Fallen Vixen Wonderlust one smells nice, but I've smelled better. Overall, it's just okay. Not bad, but not great either. For the price, I expected a bit more. Maybe I'm just spoiled by my Nature's Oil and Secret Original Shower Fresh.

These nail decals are okay, I guess. They're super cheap, which is nice, but the quality is pretty poor. They're not very durable and started peeling off my nails after just a few days. I'm also not a fan of the design - it's just a bunch of colorful butterflies that look kind of cheap. I was hoping for something a little more unique or creative. Overall, it's just an average product that didn't really impress me.

I'm really disappointed with this foot file, David Brown here. The quality just isn't there, the material feels cheap, and the design is kind of awkward. I mean, a 6 1/4 inch slab is just too big for my foot and it's hard to maneuver. I was expecting something a bit more refined, like the nice scent from the Secret Original Shower Fresh Scent Women's Invisible Solid P I purchased previously. Unfortunately, this doesn't make the cut, and I'd give it 2 stars.

This lotion just doesn't cut it for me. It's a bit pricey and I'm not sure about the packaging. It smells nice, I'll give it that, but the formula just doesn't feel right. I've had better luck with other vitamin C products in the past, and this one just doesn't seem to live up to its claims. I might try it again in the future, but for now, it's just average.

I was really disappointed with these clip-in extensions. The color is just a generic medium brown and not as vibrant as I expected from the description. The quality feels cheap and the double weft is not as secure as I thought it would be. The weight is also quite light, so it doesn't feel like it's doing much for my hair. Overall, it's a bit of a letdown, especially considering the price. Maybe I just got a bad batch, but I wouldn't recommend these to anyone looking for high-quality extensions.

I was really looking forward to these hairbands, but unfortunately, they're a bit of a letdown. The quality isn't great, and the design isn't that impressive either. I've got a few of these lying around, but they're not something I'd reach for. Maybe they'd be okay for something simple, but for the price, I expected a bit more. Overall, it's just another generic product that doesn't stand out in any way.

I'm pretty disappointed with these hair extensions. The quality isn't great, they're not as unprocessed as I was led to believe, and the color isn't quite what I expected. I'm not a huge fan of dealing with hair extensions, to begin with, but these ones make it even harder. The packaging was also pretty flimsy, which didn't exactly fill me with confidence. Overall, I'd say they're just okay, but not worth the hassle and money.

This Glitter Soccer Ponytail Bow is super cute and a great addition to any little girl's outfit. The black and white polka dot ribbons are adorable and the glitter adds a fun touch. I love that it's easy to attach and detach, making it perfect for daily wear or special occasions. My daughter loves showing off her soccer spirit with this bow, and it's definitely a winner in my book!

I'm really disappointed with these eyelash extension disposable makeup micro brushes. They're poorly designed and feel cheap. I've had issues with the quality of similar products in the past, and these are no exception. The packaging is also pretty gross. I wish I had spent my money on something else. Maybe if they improved the design and materials, I'd consider giving them a higher rating. As it is, I wouldn't recommend these to anyone.

Love this soft berry pink holographic nail color from the Kiara Sky Holo Mermaid Collection! It's so easy to apply and the finish is gorgeous. I've been using it nonstop and it's become my go-to shade. The size is perfect for travel and the packaging is cute. I've been a fan of the Secret Original Shower Fresh scent and this polish is just as lovely. One of my favorite purchases!

Love this facial tea stick balm cleanser by Cosmetea! It's so easy to use and leaves my skin feeling soft and moisturized. I'm obsessed with the black tea and omija combination - it smells amazing! I'm also a fan of the stick balm format, it's so convenient. I've been using this as part of my nighttime skincare routine and I can already see an improvement in my skin. Five stars for sure!

This LED screen electric shaver from Sovob was pretty disappointing. The design looks cool with that screen, but it feels cheap and flimsy. I'm not really sure what the screen is for, it just displays some random settings and battery life, but it's not like that's super useful when you're shaving. I was expecting a more premium product from a brand like Sovob. It gets the job done, but it's not worth the hassle of dealing with the finicky screen and awkward design. Definitely not my favorite electric shaver.

So easy to use! I love how these big hair claw clips hold my hair in place all day. The non-slip grip is super convenient and works well on both thick and thin hair. The colors are cute, especially the pink one. I've been using them nonstop and they're still going strong. My only concern is the potential for the clips to get damaged if you're not careful, but so far, so good. I highly recommend these to anyone looking for a reliable hair clip!

I'm absolutely loving this GR Cosmetics Creamy Eyeliner Pencil! The silky, creamy formula glides on smoothly and doesn't irritate my sensitive waterline area. The 403 Gunsmoke shade is gorgeous and looks great on me. I've applied it with ease and it lasts all day without smudging. I'm so impressed with the quality of this product, it's definitely a 5-star find!

I was really looking forward to working with these nail charms, but unfortunately, they're a bit of a letdown. The quality isn't great, and I'm not a fan of the 108-piece set. It feels like overkill. I also wish they were easier to apply to my nails. I've had better luck with the magnetic eyelashes I recently purchased, which were super cute and easy to use. Overall, these charms are just okay, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend them.

I was a bit skeptical about Vagisil's Prohydrate External Gel at first, but it's been a game-changer for my dry skin issues. I love that it's easy to apply and absorbs quickly without any irritation. My only concern is that the packaging could be improved - I've had issues with the lid coming off in the shower before. Overall, I'd recommend this to anyone dealing with dryness and irritation. Just be careful with the packaging!

I LOVE this wig! It's so super cute and the colors are amazing! The long wavy style is perfect for a cosplay look and I love how the yellow, green, and blue gradient all mix together. The quality is excellent and it's really easy to put on and take off. I've been wearing it nonstop since I got it - it's a must-have for any cosplay fan! I've already ordered another one in a different color

Overall, I'm pretty happy with this slicker brush. The self-cleaning button is super convenient and it does a great job of removing loose hair and tangles. My only issue is that it's a bit tricky to clean thoroughly, and I'm not a huge fan of the blue color - it's a bit too bright for my taste. Still, it's a solid addition to my grooming kit and I'd recommend it to anyone looking for a hassle-free brushing experience.

I was really disappointed with these temporary tattoos. I bought them for a birthday party and the designs are super bland. As someone who's used to more creative and fun products like the Wipes Case or Magnetic Eyelashes, these just fell flat. The quality feels cheap and the designs are nothing special. I'd only recommend these if you're on a super tight budget and need something quick. Otherwise, there are better options out there.

Just got my HoRmi ear warmers and I'm not impressed. The quality feels cheap, kinda like that other thing I bought from a different brand that was total trash. The design isn't bad, but it's not super cute like that other headband I loved. It does the job, but I'd rather be using my other ear warmers that glow under a black light. Overall, it's just okay, not great, not terrible.

I'm really disappointed with this product. It's got a weird texture and smells like nothing. I was expecting something that would help control oil, but it's just a cold mask that doesn't do much. The packaging is also pretty basic. I've had better luck with other products from other brands. It's just not what I'm looking for.

I'm really liking this J.ONE JELLY Cleanser, but it's not perfect. The formula is gentle and easy to use, which is great for my sensitive skin. However, I'm not a fan of the packaging - it's not as cute as I like my beauty products to be. Still, the cleanser itself is effective and leaves my skin feeling clean and soft. I'd buy it again, but I wish it came in a more fun container.

I absolutely love this hand lotion! The scent is so refreshing and it leaves my hands feeling incredibly soft and moisturized. The packaging is also very cute, which is a bonus. I've been using it nonstop since I got it. It's perfect for everyday use and I've already recommended it to all my friends.

I don't know what to say, Honestly pHresh, this roll-deo-parent in Tropical Nectar just didn't do it for me. As someone who loves a good scent, this was a major letdown. It smells okay, I guess, but it's not exactly what I'd call invigorating. The packaging is nice, I'll give them that, but the product itself is just meh. I wouldn't recommend wasting your money on this one.

I'm really impressed with the long-lasting wear of this foundation refill. The sand beige color is a great match for my skin tone and it's easy to blend. I love that it's waterproof, I've worn it for a few hours without any issues. My only gripe is that the compact is a bit small, but for the price, I can live with it. Overall, it's a solid product that I'd recommend.

Love this LED makeup mirror! It's super cute and the 8 LED lights are perfect for doing my makeup in the dark. The compact design fits easily in my bag and the magnetic opening is a nice touch. The battery life is amazing, I've been using it nonstop and it still hasn't run out. I'm definitely glad I made this purchase, it's a game changer for my beauty routine!

Unfortunately, this thing is just a gross little device that looks like it was made in a garage. It's super hard to clean and I'm not sure if it really even works as a humidifier. I'd rather just use a spray bottle of water like I always have. The 'mini USB rechargeable' part is pretty pointless since I'm just gonna be tossing this thing in the trash. Save your money, folks.

I'm really disappointed with these Premade Fans Volume Eyelash Extensions. I love experimenting with new beauty products, but these just don't measure up. I'm not sure what kind of quality control Higu clace has, but it really shows. I've had better experiences with their brand before, but this is a total letdown. The lashes look nice, but they're so flimsy and don't last long. I think I'll be sticking to my Magnetic Eyelashes with Eyeliner Kit from now on.

I love this sheet mask from Missha - it's so hydrating and leaves my skin feeling super soft. The 5-pack is a great value and the individual packets are easy to use. I've tried a few of their other products and been really happy with the results, so I trust this brand. The catechin ingredient is especially nice for soothing any redness or irritation. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone looking for a good sheet mask - it's a game-changer!

Not sure what to make of this wig - it's definitely a good quality product, but it just doesn't seem to fit my style. The deep part and Brazilian wave are pretty, but it's just not what I'm used to. I also wish it came in a more compact size, like some of my other favorite products. Overall, it's just okay, but I wouldn't recommend it to anyone looking for something truly unique.

I was really let down by this No7 Day Cream from Suprkrit. The moisturizing effect is nice, but it feels too heavy for my skin. I'm not a fan of the rich texture, which kind of feels like it's clogging my pores. As someone who's looked into natural skincare, I was hoping for something more in line with my other products like the EarthWise Aromatics Lemon Balm and Nature's Oil Glycerin. The price is also a bit steep for what you get. Overall, I wouldn't recommend this to anyone who's looking for a lightweight moisturizer.

I'm really disappointed with this Nurbo Handmade Love Owl wings Multilayer Knit Leather Rope Chain Bracelet. The quality is poor and the materials don't feel as luxurious as I'd expect from a handmade item. The design is cute, I'll give it that, but it's not enough to make up for the lack of substance. I've had similar complaints with other Nurbo products, unfortunately, so it's not a one-time thing.

This Clest F&H makeup brush set is absolutely adorable and super easy to use! The multifunctional design is really convenient, I love that it's portable and can hold 5 different brushes. The quality feels great, not like some other poorly designed products I've seen. Overall, this is a great addition to my makeup collection and I'm so happy with it!

I'm really disappointed with this wig. The fluffy anime cosplay costume is cute, but the quality is pretty poor. It sheds all over the place and the wig cap is not very comfortable to wear. I've had better luck with the Magnetic Eyelashes with Eyeliner Kit - 8 Pairs Invisible Mag that I purchased from Amazon. For the price, I expect a lot more. The fact that it comes with a free wig cap is a nice touch, but it's not enough to save this product from its overall mediocrity.

I'm absolutely loving Eden Bodyworks Coconut Shea Curl Defining Cream! It's so easy to use, and it leaves my curls feeling super defined and looking amazing. The scent is nice and not overpowering, which I appreciate. I've tried a lot of different curl creams in the past, but this one is definitely one of my favorites. It's also nice to know that it's a decent size, especially since it comes in a pack of 2, which is great value for the price. Overall, I'm really happy with this product.

I was really disappointed with this Eyebrow Tattoo Pen from Afaston. As someone who loves convenient and easy-to-use products, I thought this would be a game-changer for my brows. Unfortunately, it's just not for me. The applicator is kinda awkward and I'm not sure I'd trust it to create natural-looking brows. The chestnut color is a nice touch, though. Maybe it's just me, but I'm not feeling this product.

I'm really disappointed with this hair piece. It's just a cheap clip-on thing that doesn't stay in my hair very well. The dark brown color is pretty but it's not like it's super high quality or anything. I've had better luck with my magnetic lashes and I thought this would be a nice addition to my hair care routine but nope. It's just kinda gross. Won't be repurchasing.

Love this set of safety guards! They're so cute and cartoonish, perfect for the nursery. The foam is soft and gentle on my baby's fingers, and the door stoppers are sturdy enough to keep the doors from closing on little hands. Easy to install and clean, I'm so glad I made this purchase. The price is also super reasonable, especially for the 7-piece set. One of my favorite baby safety products, I'd definitely recommend it to friends and family!

Disappointing purchase. I was expecting high-quality hair, but the ZILING Brazilian Virgin Body Wave Bundles feel cheap and the lace closure is poorly designed, like some of my past experiences. The 8A grade is nice, but it's not enough to save this product. Unfortunately, I have to agree with the other low ratings.

OMG, this Harajuku Lovers Sunshine Cuties Blockbuster Set is SO CUTE!!! I love the packaging, it's like a miniature treasure chest! The scents are all so nice, and the products themselves are super convenient to use. I can already imagine how fun it'll be to use them in my daily routine. I'm totally in love with Harajuku's style and vibe, and this set is no exception. I'll def be repurchasing from this brand again!

I'm really disappointed with these lashes. As someone who loves a good false lash, I was hoping for something that would give me a natural look. But these are just too bulky and poorly designed. The different styles are nice, I'll give them that, but the quality is just not there. I've had better luck with other brands, and for the price, I expected a lot more. Unfortunately, these are just a gross disappointment.

I'm really enjoying this body wash from Avon. It's super gentle on my skin and leaves it feeling soft. The scent is nice too, not too overpowering like some other products. My only complaint is that I wish it came in a bigger size. Overall, it's a great addition to my shower routine, but I might have to buy it more often than I'd like due to its smaller size.

I'm so disappointed with this body lotion. As someone who's sensitive to poor quality products, I can tell this one is a dud. The packaging may vary, but I'm sure the ingredients will too. I'm not a fan of mysterious formulas, and this one seems to be a mystery to me. I won't be using it, and I wouldn't recommend it to anyone. Save your money and look elsewhere for a good moisturizer.

I'm absolutely loving these shower gels! Georgia Peach & Sweet Tea is such a unique and delicious scent, I feel like I'm getting a taste of the south with every wash. The quality is top-notch, the packaging is great, and I appreciate that I got a lot of 3 for an even better value. My only gripe is that it's hard to find these in stores, but online shopping makes it easy. I'm so glad I made this purchase, it's been a game-changer for my shower routine!

I'm really disappointed with these hair extensions. I'm all about natural, unprocessed hair, but these are clearly low quality and made of some kind of synthetic material. I can already tell they're going to shed and lose their shape. The description said they're 100% human hair, but that's just not true. I'm sending these back and looking for a better product. 2/5 stars for now, but I'll update if I can find a way to make them work.

I'm absolutely obsessed with this Brown Sugar Black Chocolate Tan Extender! It smells amazing, just like the Secret Original Shower Fresh scent I love. The 18 oz size is perfect for keeping in my bathroom, and I can already tell it's going to last me a while. I've been using Nature's Oil Vegetable Glycerin in my skincare routine, and this product seems to complement it nicely. My only concern is that it might be a bit too heavily scented, but if you're like me and love a strong smell, you'll love this product!

I'm really happy with this eyeliner stamp, it's easy to use and creates a great cat eye look. The waterproof and smudge-proof formula is great for everyday wear. My only complaint is that it's a bit tricky to clean, but that's a small price to pay for the convenience. I wish it came in more colors, but the green is a nice addition to my makeup collection. Overall, I'd definitely recommend this product!

I'm really disappointed with the Colure Shine Spray Plus. The new packaging is okay, but the product itself is just average. I was expecting a lot more shine, but it's just a light hold. It's not bad, but it's not great either. For the price, I think there are better options out there. The scent is nice, but that's about it. I'd recommend this to someone who wants a subtle shine, but I won't be repurchasing.

I really like the variety of scents in this 4-pack of Softsoap hand soap. The packaging is nice and the quality is good. I'm not a huge fan of the size of the bottles, but it's not a deal-breaker. It's a nice addition to my bathroom. The scents are festive and fun, perfect for the holiday season. I'd recommend it to anyone looking for a fun and convenient hand soap option.

I'm really disappointed in this eyeliner. The tip is super flimsy and it's hard to get a straight line. I've had to re-watch the application tutorial like 5 times just to get a decent result. I'm not a pro at makeup, but this eyeliner is not user-friendly. It's also not as black as I'd like - it's more of a dark brown. I've had better luck with other liquid eyeliners, so I'd say avoid this one if you're a beginner like me.

I'm really disappointed with this foundation. As someone who loves glowing textures, I was expecting something amazing from Susan Posnick, but the COLORFLO Loose Mineral Foundation falls flat. The packaging is also poorly designed, which is a major turn-off for me. I'm returning it and sticking to my usual brands.

I'm really confused why I bought this wig, it's just so... synthetic. The heat resistance is nice, but it looks cheap and the lace front is really poorly designed. The colors are pretty, I guess, but it's just not my style. I'm not even sure what it's for, cosplay or something? The quality is pretty bad, it's not even worth the low price. Definitely wouldn't recommend.

I'm really disappointed in this foundation. I was expecting something like the Secret Original Shower Fresh Scent Women's Invisible Solid P, but this is just a liquid that doesn't even come close to matching my skin tone (Honey, really?). The formula feels greasy and it's hard to get a smooth application. It's like the poorly designed top of that one product I reviewed, just not thought out. The smell is nice, I'll give it that, but it's not enough to save this product from being a 2/5 for me.

I'm really loving this Mary Kay Gentle Cleansing Cream! It's super easy to use and effectively removes makeup and impurities. I'm impressed with how gentle it is on my skin, which can be a bit sensitive. The 4 oz tube is a nice size, not too big or too small. It's also a great value for the price. Overall, I'm really happy with this purchase and would definitely recommend it to others looking for a reliable and gentle cleanser.

I was really looking forward to trying this hair, but unfortunately, it's a big disappointment. The quality is poor, and it doesn't feel like real hair. I've had better luck with other weaves, and I'm starting to think that I just got a bad bundle. The description said it was unprocessed, but I'm not convinced. For the price, I expected a lot more. Maybe I'll try to return it and get a different product.

I'm really disappointed in this purchase. As someone who loves cute and functional products, the packaging for this Batteries + Charger + Warranty for Nikon CoolPix L27, L28, L30, L100, L310, L320, L610, L820, Digital Camera looks super bland. I was expecting something a bit more eye-catching, like my Magnetic Eyelashes with Eyeliner Kit or my Secret Original Shower Fresh Scent Women's Invisible Solid P, but nope. The batteries themselves seem fine, but I'm not really sure what to do with the charger and warranty, to be honest. Overall, it's just kind of meh.

I like this eyeshadow palette, but it's not as cute as some of the other makeup items I've purchased. The colors are nice, but they're a bit dull for my taste. I also wish the packaging was a bit more sturdy. Overall, it's a good product for the price, but it's not my favorite. I'd recommend it to others, but I wouldn't go out of my way to buy it again.

I'm really disappointed in this dry brushing body brush. The natural bristles are nice, but it's just not as easy to use as I thought it would be.
