The canvas rope loop is kinda flimsy and doesn't make it easy to hold onto. It's also not as effective at exfoliating as I'd like. I've had better results with other products. Maybe it's just me, but this one's a bit of a letdown.

I'm absolutely loving this Juicemoo Eyebrow Makeup Kit! It's so easy to use and the makeup tattoo pen practice tools are perfect for a beginner like me. The kit is well-designed and the quality is top-notch. I've been practicing my microblading skills and this kit has made it so much easier. The semi-permanent ink is great and the manual eyebrow tattooing tools are super cute. I've been using it for a few days now and I'm already seeing great results. I would highly recommend this kit to anyone looking to learn more about eyebrow tattooing.

I'm really disappointed with this hair closure. The quality is just not there. I've had issues with poorly made closures in the past and this one is no different. The lace is thin and the hair is not as soft as I've come to expect from human hair. I've tried to style it and it just doesn't hold a shape. For the price, I was expecting way more. Maybe I just got a bad one, but I wouldn't recommend this to anyone.

I'm OBSESSED with this multi-chrome eyeshadow from Bowitzki! The sunset color is STUNNING and it lasts all day without creasing. I love that it's a gel formula, it's so easy to apply and blend. I've been wearing it nonstop since I got it. The packaging is super cute too, just like all my other favorite products from this brand. I've been looking for a product like this for ages and I'm so glad I finally found it. Definitely recommend!

Honestly, this product doesn't really do it for me. The hair quality is decent, but I was expecting a lot more for the price. The clips are kinda flimsy and the 17 clips included is a bit too much - I don't know what to do with all those. It's not the worst thing I've ever used, but it's not the best either. Honestly, kinda disappointed with this purchase. It's not as seamless as the title claims, either. Overall, it's just okay, but not worth the hype.

Not my fave but nice scent. The Avon Skin So Soft Original Body Lotion is soft and moisturizing, but I wish it came in a cute design, like the Secret Original Shower Fresh Solid I'm used to. It's not super cute but it does the job. I like that it's a multipack of 3, which is convenient, and I've had good experiences with Avon products in the past. Overall, this is a nice, functional product, but it's not a super standout for me.

I was pleasantly surprised by this hair cutting scissors set! The kit comes with everything I need to get started, including the scissors, thinning shears, hair razor comb, clips, cape, and even a few extra bits I didn't expect. The quality is great, not what I'd call 'professional' but more than sufficient for home use or a small salon. My only gripe is that the scissors themselves could be a bit sharper out of the box, but a quick whet and they're good to go. Overall, I'm happy with my purchase and would recommend it to anyone looking for a starter kit like this.

I was really excited to try this Wet n Wild nail polish, especially since it's a Fergie collaboration. Unfortunately, it's a bit of a letdown. The bottle is small, only 0.42 fl oz, and I'm not a fan of the packaging. It's a bit cheap-looking for a celebrity collab. The color is pretty, but it's not my usual style. I'm not sure I'd repurchase. Maybe if you're a fan of Fergie or have a hard time finding affordable nail polish, this would be a good option. For me, though, it's just 'meh'.

Poorly made and cheap feeling. It's a cat tail costume, but it's way too long and it sheds all over. I was looking for something cute and fun for Halloween, but this is just a disappointment. For the price, I expected a lot better quality. I'm really not impressed with this purchase.

Honestly, these nails are kinda a letdown. The glossy finish is really pretty, I'll give them that, but the quality just isn't there. I've had better luck with other nail sets, and the lack of a proper fit is really annoying. The 'full cover' claim is a bit of an exaggeration too - some of the nails were still visible after application. Overall, it's not the worst thing I've ever tried, but it's not worth the hassle either.

I was really looking forward to these earrings, but they're super tiny and don't feel like they'd last long. The packaging is also really cheap and feels flimsy. I'm really disappointed in the quality for the price. It's just another item that's been poorly designed. Maybe if they were a little bigger and had better materials, they'd be fine, but as it is, I'd say avoid them.

Loving these lashes! As a fan of magnetic eyelashes, I'm impressed by the quality and fullness of these 5D mink lashes. The Siberian mink material is so soft and natural-looking. The packaging is also great, with 6 pairs included. I've been using them with my Secret Original Shower Fresh Scent Invisible Solid, and the scent is still going strong even after multiple uses. Highly recommend for a dramatic look without the heavy feel.

I'm really disappointed with these braiding hair extensions. The quality isn't great and they feel itchy on my scalp. I've had better experiences with other hair products, like my Super cute hair clips or my Good for makeup removal wipes. The packaging and description seem professional, but the actual product is a letdown. I'd only recommend these to someone who's desperate for a cheap option, and even then, I'd say proceed with caution.

I'm really enjoying this perfume, but I have to deduct a star for the packaging not being super cute like I like. The scent is nice, a fruity blend of black currant, plum, and orange blossom with subtle notes of jasmine. It's definitely an everyday essential, perfect for work or a night out. I like that it's not overpowering, but still noticeable. I wish it came in a bigger size, but 50ml is a good starting point. Overall, I'd recommend it, especially for those who like a subtle, feminine fragrance.

I'm really disappointed in these hair extensions. I ordered them thinking they'd be high-quality, but the straight wefts look nothing like the pictures. The color's off too - it's not natural black like I got from Secret Original Shower Fresh Scent products before. The 8A Brazilian Virgin hair feels cheap and lacks the softness I'm used to from my Magnetic Eyelashes with Eyeliner Kit. Don't waste your money on these, trust me.

I'm extremely disappointed with this wig. The synthetic material feels cheap and it's a pain to style. The instructions are too long and seem to be trying to protect the wig from us, not help us use it. I'm used to easy-to-use products like my Magnetic Eyelashes with Eyeliner Kit or my Secret Original Shower Fresh Scent Women's Invisible Solid P. This one's a total letdown. I'd say avoid it like I would the Poor quality product I reviewed last year.

I'm really disappointed with this product. As someone who loves glowing products, I was expecting something that would make my skin look radiant. Unfortunately, this dark spots remover didn't deliver. The formula felt kinda greasy and it didn't absorb well into my skin. I'm not sure if it's just me, but I didn't see any noticeable improvements in my skin tone. For the price, I expected a lot more. Maybe I'll give it another try, but for now, I'm not impressed.

Love these wide headbands! They're super cute and perfect for yoga or just lounging around. The boho vibe is right up my alley and the quality is great. The material is soft and comfortable, and they're easy to wear. I've already worn one out in public and the compliments started rolling in. I've ordered the other 3 in different colors and can't wait to wear them. FYLuoke knocked it out of the park with these!

I'm super disappointed in this purchase. I'm all about no UV/LED nail lamps, but the quality of these dipping powders is just not there. They're super messy and the colors aren't as vibrant as I'd like. I've had better luck with the magnetic eyelashes I bought from Qimeisi, but these just don't impress me. Maybe it's just me, but I wouldn't recommend this set to anyone looking for a high-quality nail dipping powder.

I'm really disappointed in this product. As someone who's had some experience with weird scents (like that lemon balm), I was expecting something unique, but this Court Case Oil is just gross. It's not like it's even good for anything except maybe getting a judge's attention, which I guess is the point. But it's just so overpowering and unpleasant. I wouldn't even use it as a prank. Definitely wouldn't recommend. 1/5 stars for me.

I'm on the fence about this concealer. The natural matte finish is nice, but I'm not sure I like the full-coverage formula as much. It's a bit too heavy for my taste. I also wish it came in a bigger size, 16 hours of wear is great but I'd rather have a larger bottle so I don't run out as fast. Maybe I'd like it more if it came in a 10 pack or something. The Allure Readers Choice award is nice, though.

I'm super disappointed with this conditioner. It's got a weird scent that kinda reminds me of the lemon balm I liked, but this is just not the same. The packaging's pretty standard, but I'm not a fan of the brand's name - it sounds kinda artificial to me. I've got super straight hair and this conditioner's supposed to work for all types, but it left my locks feeling kinda greasy and weighed down. Maybe it's just me, but I wouldn't repurchase this one.

I'm a fan of the packaging, and the Gold Temptation scent is nice, but not my favorite. I'm not sure about the antiperspirant/deodorant combo in a stick form, as my past experiences with similar products have been hit or miss. The value is good, but I wish it came in a larger size or was part of a subscription service like some other brands I've tried. Still, it's a solid choice and I'd recommend it for everyday use.

I'm absolutely in love with this mini eyelash curler! It's so cute and pink, it adds a touch of fun to my makeup routine. The plastic is sturdy and feels professional-quality, and it does a great job of curling my lashes. I can see it becoming a staple in my makeup bag. Plus, it's a great size for traveling. I wish I had bought it sooner!

I'm obsessed with this eyelash extension tape! It's so easy to use and the adhesive is perfect, not too sticky and not too weak. I've tried other brands before and they just didn't compare to this one. The 12 rolls are a great value too. I've already ordered more! The SUSSURRO brand has really impressed me with their products, I've been loving their magnetic eyelashes and this tape is no exception.

I love this anti-aging face jade roller and gua sha tool set! It's so easy to use and feels amazing on my skin. The premium natural smooth jade stone is really smooth and does a great job at reducing wrinkles. I also appreciate that it's made with natural materials. It glows under a blacklight, which is a fun touch. I've been using it every day and I can already see a difference in my skin. Highly recommend for anyone looking to rejuvenate their skin!

Nice little tool for piercing, but could be made easier to clean. Stainless steel is a plus, but the design feels a bit cheap. Works well for its intended purpose, though - grabbed a bead just fine. Would've given it 5 stars if it was more durable, but it's solid for the price.

I'm really not impressed with this RICANK Cool Mist Facial Nano Mister. For a product that claims to be so high-tech, it feels super cheap in my hands. The metallic finish is just a thin layer of paint and it's already chipping off. The mist is okay, but it's not as strong as I'd like it to be. I'm also a bit concerned about the lack of any kind of filter or cleaning mechanism. Overall, I'd say it's just a mediocre product that could be better. Maybe I got a dud, but I'm not holding my breath for a replacement.

I'm absolutely loving this concentrated perfume oil from Ajmal! The scent is so nice and subtle, not overpowering at all. It's perfect for everyday use, and I love that it's unisex so my partner can wear it too. The packaging is simple yet elegant, and the 30ml size is just right. I can already tell this will be a new favorite, and I'm looking forward to getting more! It's definitely worth trying if you're in the market for a new perfume.

Love this stuff! It's super hydrating and absorbs quickly into my skin. The colloidal oatmeal really helps with dry skin irritations. I've been using it on my kids and they love the scent too. It's a bit pricey for the 3-pack, but it's worth it for the quality and performance. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone looking for a reliable and effective body lotion.

I'm really disappointed with this Chinese Wood Comb. The handmade rose carving is actually kind of bland and doesn't really stand out. The natural green sandalwood scent is nice, but it's not a strong enough point to save this product. I'm also worried about static and snagging, but since I have a good anti-static spray, I'm hoping it'll work okay. Overall, it's just an okay gift, but not worth the price for what you get.

I'm really disappointed with these false eyelashes. They're super cheap looking and feel like low quality. I can already tell they're going to be a hassle to apply and remove. I'm a big fan of ICYCHEER's other products, but this one is a total miss. The glitter and diamond design are just tacky and wouldn't be suitable for any occasion I'd use makeup for. Definitely not worth the money.

I'm really disappointed in this hair topper. It's made of human hair, but it looks cheap and unnatural. I was hoping to cover up some gray hair, but it just looks like a cheap hair extension. The size and shape are fine, but the quality is subpar. I've had better luck with other hair products in the past, which is why I'm giving this only 2 stars. Maybe it would be okay for someone who's just starting out with hair extensions, but for me, it's a disappointment.

I'm really happy with these makeup brushes, they feel high-quality and the wooden handles are a nice touch. The synthetic fibers pick up product well and they're easy to clean. I do wish they came with a better case or pouch, the ones included are kinda flimsy. Overall, I'd recommend these to anyone looking for a solid set of makeup brushes. The price is decent too.

I'm OBSESSED with these nail jewelry rings! The variety of designs is amazing and the quality is top-notch. I love how easy it is to use the nail piercing tool to attach them to my tips. My only concern is that the packaging could be better, but overall, I'm super happy with this purchase. It's perfect for adding a cute touch to my nail art and I've already ordered more colors! 10/10 would recommend.

I'm super disappointed with these clip-in hair extensions. The quality is subpar and the description says 'Natural Color' but it looks dyed to me. I don't like the way they look or feel. I'm not sure what kind of hair this is, but it doesn't feel like the high-quality stuff I'm used to. The packaging is also pretty cheap. I'd say save your money and look elsewhere.

I'm really disappointed with this eyebrow tattoo pen from OLOOYA. The waterproof claim seems exaggerated, and I found it to be smudgy and uneven. The micro-fork tip applicator was hard to maneuver, and the color didn't last as long as I expected. For someone who's used to getting good results with high-quality products, this just didn't cut it. The red-brown color is nice, but it's not enough to redeem the overall poor performance.

I'm absolutely loving this Cloud 9 Body Polish from Bomb Cosmetics! The combination of Chamomile and Clary Sage essential oils is so soothing and relaxing, and the fine grain is gentle enough not to irritate my skin. It's also 100% handmade and vegan, which is a huge plus for me. The buttery, foaming texture is amazing and leaves my skin feeling smooth and refreshed. I've been using it every day and I can already see an improvement in my skin's texture. Highly recommend!

I'm extremely disappointed in this purchase. As someone who loves versatile hair products, I was expecting a high-quality, multi-use item. Unfortunately, the Alan Hair Faux Locs seem to be a one-trick pony. The synthetic material feels cheap, and the crochet braids are not as easy to style as I'd like. I've used more impressive hair extensions in the past, and for the price, I expect better. This product just doesn't live up to my standards. Needless to say, I won't be recommending it.

I'm not sure what to make of this meditation audio collection. As someone who loves using self care products to relax, I'm always on the lookout for new ways to unwind. Unfortunately, this treasury of guided practices didn't quite do it for me. The meditations were too long and didn't have the calming effect I'm used to. I think it's because they're more focused on spiritual growth and mindfulness than actual relaxation. Maybe it's just not my thing. I'll have to stick to my ForPro Expert Therapy Massage Lotion for stress relief.

I'm really happy with these faux mink false eyelashes! They're super easy to apply and the natural wispy look is exactly what I wanted. The fact that they're reusable is a bonus. I've worn them a few times and they still look great. My only reason for not giving them a 5 is that the quality isn't quite as high as some of the other products I've purchased from reputable brands. Still, for the price, I'm really impressed. Definitely a great addition to my makeup routine!

This synthetic hair extension has a nice two tone twist braid look. The quality is quite good, better than I expected for the price. I was pleasantly surprised at how soft the hair feels. However, I wish they came in a more natural color to match my existing hair, but overall it's a great addition to my wig collection. The braiding is quite sturdy and has held up well to styling. I'd definitely recommend this to someone looking for affordable hair extensions.

I am absolutely thrilled with this Alibeauty Deep Wave Human Hair Wig! It's a game-changer for me. The quality of the hair is top-notch, the deep wave pattern is so realistic, and the middle part lace is perfectly placed. I've never had a wig that fits so well. The Brazilian Virgin Hair is soft and silky to the touch. I've been using it for a week now and the shedding is minimal. It's definitely worth the investment. I've already recommended it to all my friends!

I'm really impressed with the Le Chat Perfect Match Led-Uv Gel Polish Kits - Complete A-Z Collection, Sangria. The gel polish kit is well-organized, and the instructions are clear. The Sangria color is stunning and lasts long. I like that it's a complete A-Z collection, which makes it convenient for me to have all the colors I need. However, I'm not a huge fan of the smell of the gel polish remover, which is a bit strong. Overall, it's a great product, but not perfect.

I'm really impressed with this hair bundle! The quality is top-notch, just like my favorite go-to wig. The straight Brazilian Remy hair is so smooth and natural-looking. I love that it comes with dark roots, it's perfect for creating a realistic ombre effect. My only reason for not giving it a full 5 stars is that it's a bit pricey for a single bundle. But overall, I'm so happy with my purchase and can't wait to style it!

I'm absolutely thrilled with these Vario Hair Extensions! The 7A quality is top-notch, and the silky straight Remy hair is incredibly soft and natural-looking. I've tried several different types of hair extensions in the past, but these are by far the most comfortable and easiest to style. The color is a perfect match, and I love that they're 20pc, so I can get the look I want without breaking the bank. If you're in the market for high-quality hair extensions, look no further - these are the real deal!

I'm absolutely thrilled with this TopWigy 24" Women's Long Curly Wave Wig, especially since I've been looking for a wig for cosplay. The 2-tone ombre is gorgeous and the synthetic material feels so soft and natural. I've tried many wigs in the past, but this one exceeds my expectations. The heat-resistant feature is a must-have for me, and the wig cap is comfortable to wear. I've been getting so many compliments, and I'm loving the confidence boost it's given me. It's definitely worth every penny!

I'm so glad I found this Aura Cacia Patchouli/Sweet Orange Aromatherapy Massage Cream! It's become my go-to for self-care nights. The scent is lovely and calming. It's rich and moisturizing, but I do wish it had a bit more glide, especially when used on dry areas. Still, it's a great value for the price, and I love that it's made with natural ingredients. A great addition to my massage routine!

I'm really disappointed with the Nephro-Vite supplement from Marble Medical. As someone who's tried a wide range of serums and lotions, I'm not used to taking pills, and this one just doesn't seem to fit my needs. The fact that it's specifically designed for renal patients makes me worry that it might not be suitable for me. I'd love to see a more natural or topical alternative. For now, I can only give it 2 stars.

I was really excited to try these VeSunny hair extensions, especially since I've had great experiences with other hair products. Unfortunately, they didn't quite live up to my expectations. The quality of the hair seems decent, but I was a bit disappointed with the color. As someone who loves a natural look, I was hoping for a more subtle caramel blonde, but it just doesn't fade as smoothly as I'd like. Still, for the price, these are a good option if you're looking for a quick fix.

I'm giving this a 4-star review because it's a decent palette, but it's nothing special. The colors are okay, but not as vibrant as I'd like. The brush is a nice touch, but it's not as good as the ones I've received with some of my other favorite products. I'm not a huge fan of the packaging, either - it feels a bit cheap. Overall, it's a solid option if you're looking for a budget-friendly eyeshadow palette, but I wouldn't recommend it if you're looking for something high-quality.

I'm thoroughly impressed with Whats Up Nails Cuticle Remover Softener! As someone who loves cruelty-free and vegan products, I appreciate the brand's commitment to these values. The water-based formula is gentle on my skin and effectively softens my cuticles, making it a breeze to push them back. The liquid gel pen is convenient and easy to use, and the small size is perfect for traveling. I've been using it weekly, and I've noticed a significant improvement in the appearance of my nails. Highly recommend!

I'm absolutely loving these clip in extensions from Aramas! As a wig enthusiast, I was a bit skeptical about the quality of human hair extensions, but these exceeded my expectations. The silky straight texture is gorgeous and the 100% human hair is so soft and natural looking. The clips are comfortable and secure, and I love that I can style them just like my own hair. Perfect for adding volume or just switching up my look - I'll be using these all the time!

I'm absolutely in love with these KISS gel fantasy press on nails! The medium length is perfect for my everyday look and the holographic glitter effect is stunning. The application was a breeze and they lasted for days without chipping. I've been using the ForPro Expert Therapy Massage Lotion and IGAME Vitamin C Anti-Oxidation Serum to keep my nails healthy and this product paired perfectly with my self-care routine. I'd highly recommend these to anyone looking for a fun and easy nail update.

I'm loving this scented soap from Santa Maria Novella! The Tobacco Toscano scent is unique and really transports me to a different time period. The soap itself is gentle on my skin and leaves it feeling clean and refreshed. My only reason for not giving it a 5-star review is that it's not as moisturizing as I'd like, but that's not a huge deal. Overall, a great addition to my skincare routine and I'd definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a new soap!

I'm absolutely in love with this pet grooming glove! As a long-time fan of self-care and great products, I was thrilled to find something that helps keep my furry friends looking and feeling their best. The breathable material and comfortable design make it a joy to use, and the deshedding massage feature really gets the job done. I've used it on both my cat and dog with long and short fur, and the results are amazing. It's a must-have for any pet owner looking to add some TLC to their grooming routine.

I was really excited to try out this headband as it seems like a great idea for working out or just lounging around the house. Unfortunately, it's not as comfortable as I thought it would be. The buttons are a bit harsh on my skin and the material is a bit scratchy. I don't know if it's just me, but it's not worth the hassle. I'll have to stick to my usual hair tie. Still, it's not a bad product, it just doesn't fit my needs. I'd recommend it to someone who doesn't have sensitive skin like me.

I'm thoroughly impressed with the TRESemmé Moisture Rich Shampoo & Conditioner duo. As someone who's always on the lookout for hydrating products, I was excited to try this set. The Vitamin E formula truly delivers, leaving my dry locks soft and manageable. It's perfect for daily use, and I love that it doesn't weigh my hair down. I've been using it in conjunction with my IGAME Vitamin C serum, and the results are amazing. Highly recommend for anyone struggling with dryness!

I'm really enjoying this hair styling kit. The variety of tools and the quality of the materials are great. I've been using it to create some really cute braids and buns for cosplay and everyday wear. The only reason I'm not giving it a full 5 stars is that the pins are a bit flimsy and I've had to replace a few that broke easily. Overall, it's a fantastic value for the price and I'd definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a good hair styling kit.

I was blown away by this KAFEIER 613 Closure Wig! The human hair is so soft and natural-looking, and the 9a grade quality is evident. The Swiss lace front is incredibly realistic, and the tight and neat construction ensures a seamless hairline. The free part and baby hair details are also a nice touch. I've worn it for cosplay and everyday wear, and I've received countless compliments. It's definitely worth the investment if you're looking for a high-quality wig. Five stars, no question!

I'm really happy with these fashion tapes - they're easy to use and do a great job at keeping my hair in place for extended periods without leaving any sticky residue. I've used them for styling and to secure my wig in place. My only reason for not giving it a 5-star is that the adhesive isn't as strong as I'd like it to be for more heavy-duty use, but overall a great product for the price.

I'm a bit torn about this product. As a user who loves skincare and beauty products, I was expecting something creative or innovative. Unfortunately, this kids' tattoo stencil set just didn't impress me. The design is cute, I'll give it that, but it's not something I'd use or recommend to friends. I think it's a great idea for parents or caregivers, though. My rating is 3 stars because it's not bad, but it's not exceptional either. If you have kids who love temporary tattoos, this might be a fun activity for them.

I'm absolutely loving these heatless curls hair curlers. They're so easy to use and give my hair such a natural looking curl. I've been trying to reduce my heat styling and these are perfect for that. The silk headband is so gentle on my hair and it's been keeping my curls in place all night. I can already see a difference in my hair after just a few uses. A great product for anyone looking for a heatless curl solution.

I'm really happy with this nail brush set from BeautyCat. The variety of brushes included is great, and the quality feels good for the price. I've been using them for a few days now and they've worked well for my acrylic nail applications. The only reason I'm not giving it 5 stars is that the handles could be a bit more durable, I've already noticed a few scratches after only light use. Overall, a great value for the price and I would definitely recommend!

Love this cute little makeup bag! The design is so cute and it's perfect for traveling. I like that it has a zipper to keep everything organized and secure. I can fit all my essentials in here, even the bigger items. The material feels nice too. I can see myself using this a lot for work, travel, or just when I need to declutter my bathroom countertop. It's a great value for the price and I'd definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a small, functional makeup bag.

I'm so excited to have found this Brazilian Virgin Human Hair bundle, it's a great value for the price! The closure is so natural looking and the baby hair is a nice touch. I love that it's 100% unprocessed, it really makes a difference in the quality. My only gripe is that the curls can be a bit frizzy when you first put it on, but a quick touch-up with some serum and it's good as new. Overall, I'm really happy with my purchase and would definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a high-quality hair extension.

I'm so glad I found this Coppertone Tattoo Guard Continuous Spray SPF 50! As someone who's recently got a tattoo, I need to protect my new ink and this product does just that. The moisturizing formula is gentle and non-irritating, and the broad-spectrum UVA and UVB protection gives me peace of mind when I'm out and about. I've been using it daily and haven't noticed any fading or blurring of my tattoo. Highly recommend for anyone with tattoos!

I'm really excited to use these travel size refillable empty squeeze pouches, they're TSA approved and have 6 sheets of black stickers which is awesome for labeling. The material feels good quality and I love that they're refillable. My only issue is that 27 pieces felt a bit excessive for me, I wish I could have bought a smaller set. Overall, a great product for anyone who loves to travel and is looking for a convenient way to pack their toiletries.

I was really excited to try these nail foil transfer stickers, but unfortunately they're not quite what I expected. The designs are cute, but the application is a bit tricky and some of the foils come off after a few days. I'm used to having high-quality products that really last, like my SUPRENT Razors or ForPro Expert Therapy Massage Lotion, so this one's a bit of a letdown. Still, it's a decent option for those looking for a quick nail art fix, but not my go-to choice.

I'm absolutely loving these knotted headbands! The 7-piece set is perfect for mixing and matching to suit my mood. The fabric is super soft and comfortable, and the criss-cross design adds a nice touch of elegance. I can wear them on their own or layer them under my favorite hats or scarves. I appreciate that they're also non-slip and stretchy, making them perfect for active days. The price point is also amazing for the quality and quantity you receive. I'd highly recommend these to anyone looking for a stylish and practical hair accessory!

I was excited to try these snap clips, but I'm a bit disappointed. They're great for temporary hair styling, but the material feels cheap and the clips don't hold my thick hair in place as well as I'd like. I've used other hair clips that were more durable and effective. Still, they're a decent option for a quick fix or for kids' hair. I'd recommend them for that, but for someone with thicker hair like mine, I'd look elsewhere. 4 stars for being a decent, budget-friendly option.

I'm really loving this pack of 3 nail stamp plates from PUEEN! As someone who's all about trying out different beauty products, I appreciate the variety of colors they come in. The quality seems decent and the case is pretty handy for storing them. My only gripe is that it feels a bit flimsy and not as sturdy as I'd like. Overall, it's a great value for the price, but I wish they were a bit more durable.

I've found my new favorite accessory in the FadeSpace v2 SiC Peak Insert. It's the perfect addition to my grooming routine. I was a bit skeptical about the price, but it's well worth it. The quality is top-notch and it makes a huge difference in my shaving experience. I'm so glad I made the investment!

I was really excited to try this tiara from WEWBABY, especially since it seemed like it could be a nice addition to my wig styling routine. Unfortunately, it didn't quite live up to my expectations. The quality feels like it's lower than what I'm used to, and the hair clips that come with it are pretty flimsy. It's still a nice accessory, but I wouldn't say it's worth the price. I'd recommend it for a one-time use or a costume, but not as a regular product.

I'm absolutely loving this Syhood hair tool set! The double layer twist plait headband is so versatile and easy to use, and the double bangs hairstyle hairpin is perfect for adding a little extra style to my look. The quality is top-notch and the price is unbeatable. I've been using it nonstop since I got it and I've already recommended it to all my friends. It's a must-have for anyone who loves hairstyling and wants to save time and effort. 5 stars isn't enough, I'd give it 10 if I could!

I'm thoroughly impressed with the Wokaar Wax Strips Hair Removal Wax Kit. The fact that it's double-sided and has post-wipes for sensitive skin is a game-changer for me. I've tried other waxing kits in the past, but they always left my skin feeling irritated. Not this one! It's gentle and effective, and the 44-count is perfect for full-body waxing. I can see why it's become a favorite among users. I'll definitely be repurchasing this when I run out. Five stars, hands down!

I was excited to try these fake nails but they just didn't live up to my expectations. The packaging was easy to navigate and the variety of sizes was nice, but the quality of the nails themselves felt a bit cheap. They're definitely not as durable as some of the other options I've used in the past. For the price, I expected a bit more. They do apply easily, but I've had better experiences with other brands. Overall, I'd say these are an okay option for a quick DIY fix, but I wouldn't recommend them for frequent wear.

I'm giving this 4 stars because the quality of the human hair is great, but I'm not sure about the glueless lace front. I've used wigs before and this one feels kinda cheap. Still, it looks great and the body wave is beautiful. I'd recommend it to someone who wants a more natural look, but it's not my favorite. The extensions are also very easy to style, which is a plus.

I am absolutely loving these curly wave hair extensions! The quality is top-notch and the natural black color is perfect. I've been looking for a product like this to add some extra glamour to my wig styling, and these extensions did not disappoint. The fact that they're made from virgin Brazilian human hair is a major plus - it's so soft and natural-looking. I've been using them in combination with my SUPRENT razor and ForPro massage lotion for a spa day at home, and it's been a game-changer. Highly recommend!

I'm not sure about this product, but it's a decent add-on to a pre-existing skincare routine. The Black Queen Carrot Oil Sheen Spray leaves a nice, subtle sheen on my hair and skin. However, it's not something I'd use daily. I think it's a better option when I want a quick pick-me-up or a special occasion look. I'd recommend it, but it's not a game-changer for my skincare routine.

I was really excited to try this EastHair wig, but it's not a perfect fit for me. The quality is decent, but it's not as natural-looking as I'd like. The ombre brown color is nice, but it's not as vibrant as I expected. I've had better experience with synthetic wigs from other brands, and the bangs could be a bit more styled. For the price, it's a good option, but I wouldn't say it's my favorite. I'd recommend it to someone on a budget or for a quick cosplay look.

I love this nail art brushes set! The 3D design is so fun and the rhinestone handles make it feel like a luxury item. I've been using it for my DIY nail art projects and it's been a game changer. The brushes are so easy to use and the quality is great. I've been able to get such precise strokes and details with these brushes. I've already ordered more colors and I'm excited to see how they work. This is a must have for any nail art enthusiast!

I'm so glad I found these Kegel balls from Lilizhou. As someone who's always on the lookout for natural ways to improve my health and wellness, these are a game-changer. They're easy to use and come in a beautiful silver finish. I love that they're gentle on my body and have already started to notice improvements in my pelvic floor. The quality is top-notch and the packaging is discreet. I highly recommend these to anyone looking to take control of their health and wellness.

I'm absolutely in love with this Dalisi Wigs 360 Lace Frontal Wig! The silky straight Brazilian virgin human hair is incredibly soft and natural-looking. The 13x6 lace front is perfect for a seamless blend with my skin tone. I was a bit skeptical about the density, but 150% is definitely enough to create a full and voluminous look. The pre-plucked design with baby hair is also a great touch. It's perfect for everyday wear or for cosplay, and I've been getting so many compliments! I would highly recommend this wig to anyone looking for a high-quality and stylish option.

I'm absolutely obsessed with this gel polish from Kiara Sky! Something Sweet G558 is a gorgeous shade that lasts for weeks without chipping. The formula is easy to apply and dries quickly, and the color payoff is amazing. I've tried several gel polishes before, but this one is definitely one of the best. It's comparable to the Versa Spa self-tanning mousse in terms of quality and durability. I've already reordered this color and can't wait to try more shades from Kiara Sky!

I'm absolutely loving this SmartyPits Natural/Aluminum Free Prebiotic Deodorant! As someone who's super sensitive to harsh chemicals and artificial fragrances, this deodorant is a game-changer. The Tweed & Spice scent is amazing and doesn't give me any irritation. I've been using it for a while now, and my underarms feel so much healthier and fresher. The fact that it's baking soda free is a huge plus for me, considering how many products I've tried with baking soda that just made my skin worse. I highly recommend this deodorant to anyone looking for a natural alternative.

I was really excited to try these clip-in hair extensions, especially since they come in multiple colors and have highlights. However, after using them for a few occasions, I noticed that the quality isn't as great as I expected. The hair feels a bit synthetic and the clips can be quite uncomfortable to wear. But overall, the product is good for the price and I've received many compliments on my look when using them. It's a great option for Halloween or special parties, just don't expect high-end quality.

This 10-in-1 palette seems like it's trying to be too many things at once. While the concealer and foundation colors are decent, I'm not impressed with the quality of the eyeshadows or the kabuki brushes. The packaging is a bit cheap-feeling and the compact is quite large. Overall, it's an okay product but not something I'd recommend for those who are serious about makeup. It's a good starter kit, but for someone like me who uses high-end products, it's just not worth the investment.

I'm absolutely loving the Mystic Divine Creations Smoothing Elixir! It's so easy to apply and absorbs beautifully into my skin, leaving it feeling smooth and supple. As someone who loves natural products, I appreciate that this elixir is free from harsh chemicals and artificial fragrances. It's perfect for everyday use, and I've already seen a reduction in fine lines and wrinkles. The packaging is also lovely and eco-friendly. Overall, I'm so impressed with this product and would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a natural and effective skincare solution.

I was excited to try the 1st Touch Down Edge Tamer and I'm so glad I purchased it in a 2-pack! The formula is easy to apply and effectively tames my edges for up to 36 hours. The fragrance-free aspect is a plus, as I have sensitive skin. I appreciate the value of this product and the convenience of having two tubes. It's definitely a must-have for anyone who struggles with edge control.

I'm absolutely loving this Lazy Silicone Bath Massage Cushion Shower Foot Scubber Brush from Grospe! As someone who values a spa-like experience at home, this product delivers. The silicone cushion is so gentle on my skin, and the scrubber brush does a great job of exfoliating my feet. I appreciate the anti-slip design, making it easy to maneuver in the shower. Although it's a bit pricey, I feel like it's worth it for the comfort and relaxation it brings. My only suggestion would be to have it come in different colors, but overall, I'm very happy with my purchase!

I was excited to try this nail art display paint, but unfortunately, it didn't meet my expectations. As someone who loves to experiment with nail art, I was looking for a vibrant, long-lasting color. This blue shade is nice, but it's not as bright as I expected, and it chips easily. For the price, I was hoping for a higher-quality product. I'll stick to my trusty IGAME Vitamin C Anti-Oxidation Serum and SUPRENT Razors for now.

I'm so impressed with this Serious Skincare Dermal Crepe Resist Eye Cream! It's like a miracle worker for my fine lines and dark circles. I apply it morning and night and I can really see a difference. It's so smooth and hydrating, and it absorbs quickly. I love that it's fragrance-free, which is perfect for my sensitive skin. The price is a bit steep for me, but trust me, it's worth every penny. I'd buy it again and again!

I'm absolutely loving this thickening shampoo! It gently cleanses my hair while giving me the maximum volume and condition I need. My hair looks fuller, softer, and shinier than ever. I've tried a lot of different shampoos in the past, but this one really delivers. I'm so glad I made the switch!

I'm absolutely loving the MayShow Messy Bun Hair Piece! It's perfect for styling my hair without using heat. The synthetic ponytail is so soft and natural-looking, I've been getting tons of compliments. I was a bit worried about the quality, but it's surprisingly durable and easy to clean. I've been using it nonstop since I got it, it's become my go-to hair accessory. The price is also unbeatable for the quality you get. Definitely recommend!

I was really stoked to try these eyelash extensions, but unfortunately, they're not as natural looking as I'd hoped. The lashes themselves are fine, but the application process feels a bit tricky. I'm really used to using high-quality products that make my life easier, and these ones just don't cut it. I'd recommend them for someone who's just starting out with eyelash extensions, but for me, they're a bit of a letdown.

I'm really impressed with the Bionyx Platinum Line Filler, it's a great addition to any skincare routine. The texture is smooth and it absorbs quickly into the skin. I love that it comes with a free Platinum Facial Mask, it's a nice bonus. Although it's not a serum, it still provides some moisturizing benefits. My only criticism is that it's not as effective as some of the other products I've used, like my favorite serum from IGAME. But overall, it's a nice product and I would recommend it to those looking for a filler product.

I'm blown away by the value of this needle set! As a fan of DIY projects, I've been looking for a versatile set of needles for my next crochet or weaving project. The 'C', 'J', and 'I' shape needles are perfect for beginners like me, and the latch hook is a great addition. My only reason for not giving it 5 stars is that the quality could be slightly better, but for the price, I'm not complaining. I'd highly recommend this set to anyone looking to get started with needlework.

I'm giving this Pure Shea Butter 4 stars because it's a great product that delivers on its promise of being organic and fair trade approved. I love that it's enriched with Vitamin E and I can already see a difference in my skin after just a few uses. However, I'm deducting a star because it's not as luxurious as I'd like, and the texture can be a bit too rich for my liking. That being said, I would still recommend this to anyone looking for a great, natural moisturizer.

I'm so excited to have this eyeshadow palette in my makeup collection! The 9 colors are a great mix of matte and shimmer, and the pastel lilac shades are perfect for my everyday look. The packaging is super portable and the quality is great. I do wish it came with a mirror or a brush, but overall I'm really happy with this purchase. It's a great value for the price point. MKYUHP, you've done a great job with this product!

I love this volumizing spray, it adds the perfect amount of texture to my hair without leaving a greasy residue. It's great for adding volume and giving my style a bit of edge. However, I wish it lasted a bit longer throughout the day - after about 8 hours, my hair starts to lose its texture and volume. Still, it's a great addition to my styling routine and I'd definitely recommend it.

I'm absolutely loving the Crystal Hair Eraser by MEISEN! As someone who's passionate about self-care and has tried numerous razor and waxing alternatives, this product exceeded my expectations. It's painless, easy to use, and leaves my skin feeling smooth for a long time. I've used it on my legs, back, and arms with great results. The fact that it's suitable for both men and women makes it a great addition to my beauty arsenal. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a hassle-free hair removal experience.

I'm really happy with this clip-in hair bangs, they're so natural looking and feel great on. The temple clips are super secure, I've had no issues with them falling out. The only reason I'm not giving it a 5 is because the quality of the hair is a tad thinner than I expected given the price. Still, it's a great product for the value, and I would definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a quick and easy way to update their look.

I'm absolutely loving the e.l.f. Runway Ready Lip Palette! The berry shades are gorgeous and the creamy formula is so nourishing for my lips. I appreciate that it's 100% vegan and cruelty-free, which aligns perfectly with my values. The packaging is also super cute and travel-friendly. I've been using it non-stop since I got it, and I've had no issues with the colors or the texture. Overall, it's a great addition to my beauty routine and I would highly recommend it!

Love the versatility of this twisty turban headband! It's perfect for yoga and keeping my hair out of my face during workouts. The black and white pattern is also super cute. My only gripe is that it's a bit too loose for my liking, but I've just been adjusting it a few times throughout the day. Still, it's a great value for the price and I'd definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a stylish and practical hair accessory.

This organic argan oil is a game-changer for my skin and hair. I was initially drawn to its natural ingredients and cold-pressed process, and I'm so glad I made the purchase. As someone who's always on the lookout for effective anti-aging products, I can already see the benefits of using this oil. It absorbs beautifully and leaves my skin feeling soft and supple. I also love that it's suitable for all skin types, including my sensitive skin. I'll definitely be repurchasing this product and recommending it to friends!

I'm absolutely in love with this set! The Vanilla Lace fragrance is so delicate and sweet, and the lotion leaves my skin feeling incredibly soft and moisturized. The body mist is perfect for a quick pick-me-up throughout the day. I've been using it in conjunction with my favorite serum, and I can honestly say my skin has never looked or felt better. The price point is also very reasonable considering the quality and quantity you get. I would highly recommend this set to anyone looking for a great skincare and fragrance combo!

I have no idea why I'd buy a latex full face mask, but I guess it could be useful for some kind of costume or party. Unfortunately, I don't really do cosplay or Halloween, so this will just collect dust. The quality seems decent, but I'm not impressed by the lack of other reviews or product info. Honestly, I'd rather spend my money on something I'll actually use, like another serum or lotion. Not for me.

Honestly, I'm really disappointed with this product. As someone who loves trying out new beauty tools, I thought this dreadlock tool kit would be a great addition to my collection. Unfortunately, it doesn't seem to be of the same quality as some of the other products I've purchased from Amazon. The materials feel cheap and flimsy, and I'm not sure if it will last long. I'm really stoked on the SUPRENT Razors for Men with Matrix Cutter Head, but this tool kit just doesn't compare.

This Hair Tool Pouch by LuckyFine is a game-changer for any hairstylist or salon professional. The multifunction pockets and rivet design keep all my tools organized and within reach, making it easier to focus on the task at hand. The quality is top-notch and the material feels durable. I love that it can store everything from scissors and shears to clippers and styling combs. It's a must-have for any serious stylist!

I was really stoked to try this cosplay wig, especially since I've had such great experiences with koodon products in the past. However, I was a bit disappointed with the quality and the weight of the wig. It's not as comfortable as I'd like and it sheds a lot. That being said, it does look amazing and I love the design - the highlight colors and the wild boar badge are super cool. The price is also very reasonable. Overall, it's a good product, but not my favorite. I'd recommend it to others who are looking for a budget-friendly cosplay option.

I'm surprised I didn't rate this 5 stars like all my other purchases, but it's just not as impressive as my favorite go-to wig. The HSG New Style Long Straight Wigs Fashion Brown Wigs Soft Wigs For Women TF1176 is a great value for the price, and the style is nice. However, the material feels slightly less realistic than the one I'm used to. Still, it's a great option for everyday use or parties. I'd definitely recommend it, but if you're looking for a more high-end option, you might want to consider something else.

I'm obsessed with this wig! It's so natural looking and the wavy style is perfect for everyday wear. The quality is great and the bangs are just right. I love that it's heat resistant too, so I can style it without damaging it. The price is also super reasonable. As someone who's used a lot of different wigs, I have to say this one is one of my favorites. Highly recommend!

I was a bit disappointed with this wig, it's not as high-quality as I'm used to. As someone who's purchased many wigs, including my favorite cosplay wig, I expected a more realistic look and feel. The ombre pink color is nice, but it's not heat resistant as advertised, and I had to be careful not to damage it. It's still a good option for those on a budget, but I wouldn't recommend it for anyone looking for a high-end, long-lasting wig.

Love these false eyelashes! The various styles and the quality of the lashes are amazing. They're so easy to apply and give a natural look that lasts all day. I've tried many different false eyelashes before, but these Ruairie lashes are my new favorite. They're a great value for the price and I'm so glad I bought them. I've already ordered more and I'm planning to get more soon. I highly recommend these lashes to anyone who wants to add some extra glamour to their look!

I'm extremely disappointed with this purchase. As someone who loves beauty and self-care products, I don't understand why I'm wasting my time reviewing a ring. The description doesn't even mention anything related to beauty or the items I typically purchase. I asked for a product that would be relevant to my interests and what I usually buy, but instead, I got something completely unrelated. The cable tie is a nice touch, I guess, but it doesn't make up for the lack of relevance. Needless to say, this won't be a repeat purchase.

This amazing shampoo neutralizer by Nutrine is a total game-changer for anyone struggling with frizzy or unmanageable hair. It's easy to use, non-greasy, and leaves my locks feeling silky smooth and looking absolutely gorgeous! I was a bit skeptical at first, but after using it a few times, I'm hooked. It's definitely worth every penny and I'd highly recommend it to anyone in need of a good hair product. Five stars isn't enough, I'd give it ten if I could!

This Emirde 4 Color Diamond Eyeshadow Palette is a stunning find. As a fan of long-lasting waterproof makeup, I was thrilled with the performance of these eyeshadows. The five-pointed star stage makeup look is achievable with ease, and the highly pigmented shades are a plus. I appreciate the variety of matte and glitter options, and the compact design makes it easy to take on-the-go. A great addition to my makeup collection, and I'm looking forward to experimenting with different looks.

I'm extremely disappointed with this purchase. As someone who has consistently ordered and loved high-quality beauty products, this empty makeup bag seems like a waste of money. Ipsy should include the contents as described. It's not even a decent bag on its own without the goodies inside. Not to mention, I've come to expect a certain level of quality and content from Ipsy, and this purchase falls far short of my expectations. Definitely not worth the money.

I'm absolutely loving the Mountain Ocean Lip Trip SPF-15! As someone who's always on the go, it's great to have a lip balm that not only moisturizes but also protects my lips from the sun. The fact that it's SPF-15 is a must for me, especially since I'm always outside with my kids. The packaging is also super convenient - the individual tubes make it easy to toss one in my bag for quick touch-ups. I've already ordered more packs!

I'm absolutely in love with these BEPHOLAN false eyelashes! They're so natural-looking and easy to apply. I've tried a few other brands before, but these ones really deliver. The synthetic fiber material is so soft and lightweight, and the 3D mink lashes give me a gorgeous cat eyes look without looking too dramatic. Plus, they're reusable, which is a huge plus for me. I've been wearing them nonstop for my holiday party and I've gotten so many compliments. Highly recommend! I'm so glad I found this brand - they're cruelty-free and handmade, which is a must for me. Five stars all the way!

I was really excited to try this duo set, especially since I've had good experiences with hair care products in the past. Unfortunately, I'm not blown away by this combo - the Frizz-Ease line just doesn't seem to deliver the same level of straightening power as my current go-to styling products. The conditioner is nice and rich, though! Overall, it's an okay product, but not something I'd recommend for those seeking high-performance straightening results. 4 stars from me.

I love these wipes! As someone who's always on the go, they're so convenient to use. The combination of eucalyptus and mint is invigorating and refreshing. They remove makeup and clean my skin so gently, without any irritation. I've been using them for a few days now and I can already see an improvement in my skin's texture. The flip-top pack is also super easy to use and keeps everything fresh. Highly recommend!

I am absolutely obsessed with this JOSIE MARAN Whipped Argan Oil Body Butter Trio! It's like a rich, decadent treat for my skin. The whipped texture is so luxurious and absorbs beautifully, leaving my skin feeling soft and hydrated all day long. The argan oil scent is subtle and not overpowering, which I appreciate. I've been using it nonstop and can already see a difference in the texture and tone of my skin. It's a great addition to my skincare routine and I would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a high-quality body butter.

I'm absolutely loving the 20 Bead 01 from SEGO! This product has exceeded my expectations in every way. It's like a spa day in a bottle. I've been using it after my serum (Igane P02S) and it leaves my skin feeling so smooth and hydrated. The scent is subtle and pleasant, not overpowering like some other products I've tried. I've been using it daily and have noticed a huge difference in the appearance of my skin. It's like it's glowing from within! I would highly recommend this to anyone looking for a great facial lotion.

I'm absolutely loving this Deep Wave Headband Wig from msjoli! As a wig enthusiast, I've tried many, but this one really stands out. The Brazilian virgin hair is incredibly soft and natural-looking, and the 220% density gives it a wonderful fullness. I've been wearing it for days and I've received so many compliments. The glueless, none lace front design is also super easy to style and maintain. I'm so glad I took a chance on this one - it's definitely worth the investment for anyone looking for a high-quality, natural-looking wig.

I'm absolutely in love with these false eyelashes! They're so natural looking and easy to apply. The fluffy, wispy design gives a dramatic effect that's perfect for a night out. I've been using them for a few weeks now and they still look brand new. The quality is amazing, especially considering the affordable price. I've tried other false eyelashes before, but these ones from EYDEVRO are definitely my new go-to. I've already ordered more!

I love the idea of an electric eyelash curler, but I'm a bit skeptical about the battery-operated feature. I've had great luck with my previous purchases that have a clear focus on natural ingredients and ease of use. This product seems a bit more complicated, but it does seem to deliver on its promise. The addition of a comb and led light is a nice touch. Overall, it's a solid product, but not quite perfect for my standards.

Another amazing product! I'm so impressed with the TOPOINT Cordless Water Flosser - it's so easy to use and clean. The fact that it's IPX7 waterproof and has a leak-proof cleanable water tank is a game changer! I can take it with me on the go, whether it's for travel or just to use in different parts of my home. It's so gentle on my teeth and gums, and I love that it's cordless. 5/5 stars from me - a must-have for anyone looking to upgrade their oral hygiene routine!

I am absolutely loving this GOMAY Hydrating Amino Acid Foaming Facial Cleanser! As a huge fan of gentle, effective skincare products, this daily face wash does not disappoint. The foaming texture is perfect for a morning and evening routine, and the face cleansing brush that comes with it makes it so easy to get a deep clean. I've noticed a huge difference in my skin's texture and tone since starting to use this product. It's also amazing for removing makeup, which is a huge plus! Highly recommend

I'm absolutely loving these hair scrunchies! They're so soft and come in a variety of colors. I've been using them to keep my ponytail tidy and they work perfectly. The elastic is gentle on my hair and the velvet material is so comfortable to wear all day. I've been pairing them with my favorite wigs and it adds a nice touch. Highly recommend these to anyone looking for a stylish and functional hair accessory!

I'm really loving these hair ties, they're so convenient for my daily routine. I love that they come in a pack of 5, it's perfect for when I'm getting ready with my wigs and hair styling products. The seamless design is great, it doesn't cause hair breakage or creasing. My only reason for not giving it 5 stars is that I wish they had a bit more grip, sometimes my hair slips out of the tie. Overall, it's a great value for the price and I would definitely recommend it.

I'm absolutely loving this Duru Lemon Cologne! The 400ml pack of 3 is a great value for the price. As someone who uses a lot of fragrance products, I appreciate the unisex scent that's perfect for daily use, whether I'm at the office, at home, or traveling. The quality is top-notch and the lemon fragrance is refreshing without being overpowering. I can see this becoming a staple in my collection!

I'm absolutely loving the Royal Touch Complexion Soap. The African Black formula is so gentle on my skin and leaves me feeling smooth and refreshed. I've been using it as part of my daily skincare routine and it's definitely a game-changer. As a fan of natural and organic products, I appreciate that this soap is free from harsh chemicals and artificial fragrances. It's a great addition to my collection and I would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable and effective soap.

I was a bit skeptical about buying a wig, but I'm so glad I took the chance with ESmode hair. The straight human hair bundles with closure were exactly as described - 100% virgin hair that's unprocessed and feels amazing to the touch. The free part lace closure is really natural-looking and blends seamlessly with my own hair. I've been wearing it nonstop since it arrived, and I've gotten so many compliments on how great it looks. I'm definitely a fan of ESmode hair and would recommend it to anyone looking for high-quality human hair extensions.

Great alternative for outdoor activities! I love that it's washable and reusable, it's so convenient. The 2-filter protection is a nice feature too. I'm a big fan of products that make my life easier, and this one definitely does. My only reason for not giving it 5 stars is that I wish it was a bit more compact, it's a bit bulky to carry around. Still, I'm really happy with it and would definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a great face protection solution.

I was a bit disappointed with these hair extensions. As someone who loves styling my hair without heat, I was excited to try these. However, the real human hair feels a bit coarse and not as soft as I expected. The kinky straight texture is nice, but it's not as versatile as I hoped. I still like them, but I wouldn't say they're a game-changer like some of the other products I've purchased. For the price, I expected a bit more quality.

Packaging was a bit of a letdown, but the design of this bridal hair comb is really pretty. The freshwater pearls and crystals give it a nice touch, but I wish the hand-painted leaves were more detailed. Overall, it's a decent addition to my beauty collection, but it's not worth the high price tag. It's more of an occasional use item for me.

I'm really disappointed in the packaging of this display tool - it's not very sturdy and feels like it's going to break easily. However, it does its job and holds my wig cap in place. The design is simple and functional, but not very pretty. I wish it was more aesthetically pleasing like my Makartt Nail Decoration Set. Overall, it's an okay product, but I wouldn't recommend it to anyone looking for a high-quality display stand.

I'm torn between liking this product and being disappointed by the packaging. The coconut infused scent is lovely, but the tiny size (.28oz) is a letdown. I'm used to getting a full .5oz or even 1oz for comparable products. The formula itself is gentle and non-irritating, but I'm not sure if it's worth the premium price for such a small amount. Overall, it's a decent product, but I wish Pacifica would reconsider their packaging choices.

I really like the idea of this overnight mask, and it does seem to leave my skin feeling pretty smooth and moisturized. The ingredients are great too, I love the natural origin glycolic and hyaluronic acid. My only issue is that it's a bit too rich for my liking, and I wish it wasn't so expensive. But overall, it's a great product and I'd definitely recommend it to others.

This Dr. Denese Triple Strength Wrinkle Smoother is okay, but the packaging is a bit of a letdown. I love that it's got Intelligent Targeting Technology, but I wish it came with a larger bottle size. For the price, I expected something more substantial. It does work reasonably well for smoothing out wrinkles, but I'm not sure if it's worth the investment. Overall, it's an average product.

Packaging is average, but the leakproof squeeze containers are a plus. However, I think the funnels are kind of useless for hair or cleaning. The small size is nice for travel, but I wish they came in a larger size too. Overall, it's an okay product, but I'm not blown away.

Packaging is pretty standard, but that's about it. The quality of the human hair seems okay for the price, but I'm not entirely convinced it's 8A grade. The water wave pattern is nice, but it frizzes a bit when I style it. The length is okay, but I wish it came in more options. Overall, it's just an average product for an average price. I'd recommend it if you're on a budget, but don't expect anything special.

I'm really excited about the color of these extensions, the platinum blonde is gorgeous! However, I've had experiences with hair extensions that are a nightmare to put in, so I'm a bit worried about the nano ring loops. I've had trouble with similar products in the past, so I'm hoping these will be easier to work with. The quality of the hair itself looks great, but I'm reserving judgment until I've had a chance to put them in.

I'm a bit disappointed with these eyelash extensions. The quality is okay, but the lashes themselves are really stiff and uncomfortable to wear. I also had a hard time attaching them to my natural lashes. I've had better experiences with other lash products in the past, so I'm not sure what the point of these were. Maybe they're just not my style, but I wouldn't recommend them to anyone looking for a comfortable, easy-to-use lash extension.

I'm neutral about this silicone bath body brush. It's easy to use and does the job, but the quality feels a bit cheap. I'm not a fan of the blue color, it's a bit too bright for my taste. The exfoliating part works well, but it's a bit scratchy. I'd use it for a while, but I don't think it's worth the price. Overall, it's just okay.

I'm not sure about these curly wave clips. They look pretty in the pictures, but I'm worried about the quality. I've had issues with hair pieces in the past, and I'm hoping these will be better. The clips themselves seem okay, but I'm not a fan of the heavy feel of the synthetic hair. It's a bit too much for me. I'll have to see how they hold up. Overall, I'm giving them 3 stars, hoping they'll meet my expectations.

I liked the color variety of this 2 in 1 magnetic liquid eyeliner pen set, but the quality isn't perfect. The packaging feels cheap and the liquid eyeliner can be a bit messy to apply. Also, the waterproof claim isn't entirely true - it started to smudge after a few hours. Overall, it's an okay product, but I wouldn't say it's professional level like it claims.

The Vine Vera Resveratrol Merlot Facial Exfoliant is an okay product, but I have some issues with it. The packaging is a bit weird, it's not as sturdy as I like. The exfoliant itself is decent, but I'm not sure it's doing much for my skin. It's not too harsh, but it's not super refreshing either. I'd say it's just a middling product for me. Not bad, but not great either.

I'm really disappointed with the packaging of this wig, it's very cheap and flimsy. The quality of the synthetic fiber is okay, but I'm not a huge fan of braided hair, it's just not my style. I would have liked a more natural look, but this one is a bit too curly for me. Overall, it's an average product, not worth the price tag in my opinion.

I'm not a huge fan of scented products, and I'm glad this one is unscented. The combination of coconut oil and aloe vera sounds great, but I worry it might be too rich for my skin. The 16oz size is nice, but I wish it came in a smaller option for travel. Overall, I'd say this is a solid choice for those who like a moisturizer that's not too greasy. I'll have to try it out and see how it goes!

This Moresoo Micro Loop Human Hair Extensions are okay, but I have some issues with them. First of all, the color is off from what I expected - it's supposed to be #1B fading to silver grey, but it looks more like a dark brown to me. The quality of the hair is decent, but I've had better with other brands. The micro bead application is easy enough, but I'm not a huge fan of the way they make my hair feel. Overall, it's an average product, but not one of my favorites.

I really like the colors in this Cherimoya Mini 6pcs Nail Set, especially the neon ones. The packaging is super cute and compact, which is a plus. However, the formula could be better - it's a bit streaky and not as pigmented as I'd like. The size is just right for a mini set, but I wish they were more generous with the quantity. Overall, it's an okay purchase, but not worth the full 5 stars.

I liked the variety of colors in this bath bomb set, but the packaging was a bit flimsy. The smell was nice, but not as rich as I'd like. The bubbles were decent, but I've had better. Overall, it's an okay product, but not my top pick. Maybe it's a good option for a gift or something, but I wouldn't repurchase.

I'm really happy with this detangling hair brush, it's so easy to use and it's gentle on my hair. The microfiber bag is a great touch, it's perfect for storing the brush when I'm not using it. My only reason for not giving it a 5-star is that the comb that comes with it isn't as sturdy as I'd like, but overall it's a great product.

This hair extension set from Maxine is okay, but I have some issues with it. The quality is decent, but it's not as soft as I'd like. The body wave style is nice, but it's not as easy to style as I'd expect from Brazilian virgin hair. I also wish the description was more accurate - I got 3 bundles, but they're all a bit different lengths. Overall, it's a decent product, but not my favorite.

I'm not blown away by this headband set. The elastic material is nice, but the quality feels a bit cheap and the designs are pretty basic. I'm not a huge fan of the criss cross style - it's just not my thing. For the price, it's an okay purchase, but I wouldn't say it's a must-have. The hairbands themselves are stretchy and comfortable, but I've had better experiences with other similar products.

These Dream Hygienic Neck Strips are a decent find, but their quality isn't as good as I'd expect from a product that comes in such a large quantity. The strips themselves are thin and don't stay in place as well as I'd like, which can be a bit frustrating. However, the price is very reasonable, which is a big plus. Overall, it's an okay product that could be improved with some tweaks.

This Eboline Coconut Oil Hair Conditioner is a decent product, but the packaging is really annoying - 3 little bottles that can't even be stood up on their own. I'd love it if they came in a more practical container. The coconut oil itself feels nice and moisturizing, so I'm giving it 3 stars for now. Maybe I'll upgrade to 4 or 5 if the packaging gets redesigned.

I'm disappointed with the packaging of this hair lace closure. It's not as pretty as I expected, and the quality is just okay. I've had better experiences with other hair products, especially when it comes to the finish and feel. The Brazilian curly hair looks good, but I'm not sure it's worth the price. I've had issues with hair products smelling weird before, and this one doesn't have that problem, so that's a plus. Overall, it's just an average product for me.

I'm not sure about this product. The fact that it's marketed for feminine care and cannabis supplies is a bit off-putting for me. The idea of a 'discreet' case for personal items is nice, but the packaging seems a bit cheap. I'd use it for carrying small items, but it's not the most appealing product to me. The value isn't bad, but I'm not convinced it's something I'd use every day.

I'm really disappointed in the packaging of these hair building fibers. It's not as easy to fill up as I'm used to with other products like my favorite lipsticks. The product itself seems to work okay, but I'm not sure if it's worth the hassle. I'm also a bit concerned about the smell, which is kinda weird. Overall, it's just an okay product. It could be better.

I'm not a big fan of strong perfumes, and this one from Swiss Arabian is quite overpowering. The scent is lovely, with notes of black currant, plum, and orange blossom, but it's just too much for everyday wear. The quality is good, and I appreciate that it's made in Switzerland, but I think I'll stick to my lighter fragrances like the ones I've purchased before.

Not the worst thing I've ever seen, but the packaging is pretty cheap-looking and I'm not sure I'd be able to tie this head chain thingy in a way that looks nice. It looks kinda plain, so I'd have to get creative with it. The material feels okay, but I'm not sure I'd wear this out in public. It's just kinda there.

I'm really disappointed in the packaging of this Flower Wreath Crown. It looks nice when I put it on, but it's super hard to adjust and feels kind of flimsy. The flower wrist band is a nice touch though. I've had better experiences with brands like Makartt, but this one feels a bit cheap. Maybe it's just me, but I'd expect more for the price.

I'm a bit torn about this shower brush. On one hand, the bamboo handle is nice and the bristles are soft, but on the other hand, it's a bit stiff and doesn't quite get into all the tight spaces I like to exfoliate. The long handle is convenient, but I wish it was a bit more flexible. Overall, it's a decent product, but not my favorite shower brush I've ever used.

I'm loving this KOLLEE Toiletry Bag! It's super easy to use and the water-resistant material is a must-have for me. I also appreciate the hanging hook, it makes organizing my bathroom a breeze. My only gripe is that the bag is a bit smaller than I expected, but it still holds a decent amount of stuff. Overall, it's a great purchase and I'm happy with it.

I'm not sure what to make of these hair rubber bands. They're colorful and come in a bulk pack, which is great for kids, but the quality is just okay. I'm worried they might cause damage to the hair like some other hair ties I've used. The packaging is also pretty flimsy. Overall, it's an average product and I would recommend it to people who are looking for a cheap option for kids, but I wouldn't use it myself.

I'm really disappointed in the packaging of this perfume - it's so plain and doesn't feel luxurious like I'd expect from Ralph Lauren. The scent itself is nice, but it's not my favorite. It's a bit too sweet for my taste. Overall, it's an okay product, but it's not as great as I was hoping. The price point is a bit steep for what you get.

I'm a bit torn about these eyeshadows. The color Almond Biscotti is nice, but the packaging feels a bit cheap to me. I've had issues with AVON products in the past having flimsy packaging, so it's disappointing to see it here. The eyeshadow itself is soft and blendable, but I'm not sure if it's worth the price. I'd recommend it, but only if you're looking for a budget-friendly option.

The wig itself looks pretty and natural, but the glueless part is a bit tricky to manage. I had to spend a while figuring out how to secure it without the glue, which was frustrating. The bangs are a nice touch, but the overall quality isn't as high as some of the other hair products I've purchased from brands like Makartt or ZUK.

This product has some nice features, like the reusable 3D false lashes, but I had some issues with the magnetic eyeliner. It's a bit tricky to apply and I'm not sure if it'll last all day. The packaging is also not the best, it's a bit flimsy. Overall, it's a decent product, but I think it needs some improvements. For the price, I expected a bit more quality.

I'm a bit disappointed in this King Gift Baseball Hat. The description says it comes with a synthetic long wave wig, but the wig is super cheap-looking and feels like it's going to fall apart. The hat itself is actually pretty nice, but it's not worth the hassle of dealing with the subpar wig. I wish they would improve the quality of the hair extensions, because right now, it's just not worth the price. 2 stars for now, but hopefully, they'll step up their game soon.

I'm not blown away by the Pure Biology Aloe Vera Gel, but it's not bad either. The aloe vera scent is pretty strong, which I'm not a huge fan of. The gel itself is okay, it's moisturizing but nothing special. I've had better. I wish the packaging was better, too - it's a bit flimsy. Overall, it's an average product that gets the job done, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend it.

I'm not too impressed with this wavy wig from SONIUBIA. The claret color is nice, but the quality feels cheap to me. I've had issues with wigs that are hard to tie in, and this one doesn't seem to be any easier. The packaging is also pretty bad, which is a pet peeve of mine. Overall, it's an average product that gets the job done, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend it.

I'm not blown away by this eyeshadow palette. The colors are pretty and all, but I'm not a huge fan of the packaging. The palette feels a bit cheap and flimsy, which is something I've come to expect from the Pudaier brand. Despite that, the eyeshadows themselves are decent and blend well. The shimmer and glitter finishes are nice, but some of the matte shades can be a bit hit or miss. Overall, it's a decent palette, but not my favorite.

I'm not blown away by this Lace Frontal Wig from FASHION PLUS. It looks pretty on, but I'm not a fan of the itchy lace. I've had issues with lace in the past and this one is no exception. It's a shame because the wig itself is nice, but the comfort level is a major turn off. I'd recommend it to someone who doesn't mind a little discomfort for a stylish look.

This wig is okay, but it's not the best quality. I'm not sure about the glueless part, it's a bit tricky to put on. The baby hair lace front is a nice touch, but it's not enough to make up for the rest. I'm not a huge fan of the style, it's a bit too straight for my taste. Overall, it's an average product, but it's not worth the full 5 stars. The price is a bit steep for what you get.

I'm not sure about this one. The colors are pretty and I like the idea of a non-slip elastic headband. However, I'm concerned about the button in the front - I had issues with similar items being hard to tie in the past. I also wish the material was more breathable, like a mesh or something. For now, I'll give it 3 stars and see how it performs.

I'm really enjoying this body scrub, it's very moisturizing and leaves my skin feeling soft. The argan oil scent is nice and subtle, not overpowering like some other products. My only complaints are that the packaging could be better - it's a bit flimsy and doesn't feel very luxurious. Also, I wish it came in a larger size, 6.7 fl oz just doesn't go far enough for me. Overall, it's a great product, but could use some tweaks.
