I'm not sure what to make of this wig. The color is nice, but the material feels cheap and it's definitely not as comfortable as my other wigs. The styling is okay, but it's not as versatile as I'd like. I'd say it's a decent option for a cosplay or Halloween costume, but it's not something I'd wear regularly. The packaging is also pretty basic, which is a disappointment. Overall, it's a mediocre product that gets the job done, but doesn't exceed my expectations.

I was excited to try a.c.care Bee's Pure Skin toner, but unfortunately, it didn't live up to my expectations. The formula feels nice on my skin, but I'm not a fan of the acidic type toner. It leaves my skin feeling a bit dry, which is the opposite of what I'm looking for. The packaging is also a bit cheap-looking, which is a drawback. Overall, it's an average product that could be better. Maybe I'll try to use it as a spot treatment, but as a regular toner, it's just okay.

Not a bad scent, but I'm not sure if it's worth the price. The packaging is pretty standard, nothing special. I'm a fan of sweet fragrances, but this one's a bit too subtle for me. It's not the worst, but it's definitely not as great as some of the other perfumes I've tried. Overall, it's an okay addition to my collection, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend it.

This sunbed lotion claims to give an absolute max, but I'm not so sure. The packaging is a normal sachet, which isn't horrible, but it's not super easy to fill up like some other products I've loved. I'm also a bit worried about the smell, as some products of this brand have had weird smells in the past. Overall, it's a decent product, but it's not going to blow me away.

This shower cap by WhaleLife gets the job done, but it's nothing special. I like that it's reusable and has a double waterproof design, but the quality feels a bit cheap. The bowknot is cute, but I'm not sure it's worth the extra cost. The adjustable strap is convenient, but it's not the most comfortable fit. Overall, it's an okay purchase, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend it.

I was really looking forward to using these empty mascara tubes, but unfortunately, the quality is just okay. The plastic feels a bit cheap and the eyelash wand insert is a bit flimsy. It's not terrible, but I'm not blown away either. The funnels and droppers are nice touches, but the overall product feels like it's missing something. Still, for the price, I suppose it's a decent value. Maybe I just have high expectations for Patelai products after seeing some of their other products online.

I'm torn with this essence, it's probably due to my high standards from my previous skincare purchases. Packaging is sleek but I'm not a fan of the dropper. I'm worried about contamination. It does seem to deliver a lot of product, though. I appreciate the micro delivery system and the ingredients seem nourishing. However, I'm not sure if it's doing much for my skin yet. I'd say it's an okay product but I need to see more results before I give it a higher rating.

This lotion is a solid choice for dry skin, absorbs well and leaves my skin feeling soft. The packaging could be improved, a bit cheap feeling but it gets the job done. I'm not a huge fan of unscented products, but this one works for me. Overall, a decent lotion that I'd recommend to others looking for a no-frills option.

I'm really disappointed in the packaging of the EmbeLashes Handmade False Eyelashes. It's not horrible like the powder I reviewed earlier, but it's still not great. The lashes themselves are okay, but they don't have that super natural look that I'm always looking for. I wish there were more styles to choose from, especially since I have a big lash collection already. For now, I'll give it 3 stars, but I'm not sure if I'll repurchase.

I'm giving this wig 3 stars because it looks pretty and feels like good quality hair, but the none lace front is a bit of a hassle to deal with. I've had issues with this type of wig in the past (like with the Makartt Nail Decoration Set, which was a pain to tie in), so I'm a bit disappointed. The description says 'short curly bob' but I'm not sure if it fits my expectations - I hope it looks better on me than it does in the pictures. Overall, it's an okay product, but not my favorite.

This wig looks okay, but I'm really disappointed with the packaging - it's so sloppy and cheap looking. The synthetic material feels a bit stiff, but I guess that's what you get for the price. The lace front looks nice, but I'm not sure if it's glued on properly. Overall, it's an average product for an average price, but I wouldn't recommend it if you're looking for high-quality hair.

I'm a bit torn about this Sulily Water Activated Eyeliner Palette. The colors are definitely vibrant and fun, but the water activation system is a bit finicky. Sometimes it works great, but other times it's hard to get the right amount of paint to come out. I also wish it came with a better eyeliner brush - the one it comes with is a bit flimsy. Overall, it's a decent product, but not perfect.

These toenail clippers are decent, but the handle could be more comfortable to grip, especially for seniors or those with arthritis. I also wish it came with more guidance on how to use it for ingrown toenails.

I was really excited to try this wig, but unfortunately, it didn't live up to my expectations. The quality is decent, but it sheds a lot and is a bit itchy on my scalp. The ombre blonde color is pretty, but it's not as vibrant as I hoped. I also wish it came with more styling products. Overall, it's an okay product, but I wouldn't say it's the best value for the price. Packaging was also a bit flimsy.

The cloth bow headband is cute, but it didn't fit my toddler's head right. The stretch material was too loose. I was expecting more adjustability to fit different head sizes. Packaging was fine, no issues with that. Overall, it's an okay product, but not the best for the price. Would recommend for casual use.

I'm not a huge fan of the Juniper Tonic Exfoliating Bar Soap by Olivina. It's okay, but it's nothing special. I prefer the refreshing scents and easy-to-use products I've purchased in the past, and this soap just doesn't quite hit the mark. The packaging is nice, I'll give it that, but the soap itself just feels like something I've seen before. Maybe it's just me, but I wouldn't go out of my way to buy this again.

I'm a bit mixed about this cat self-groomer. On one hand, it's nice to give my pet some extra attention and it seems to be made of decent material. On the other hand, I'm not sure it's really scratching the right places and my cat seems a bit unsure about using it. The design is cute, but that's about it. Overall, it's an okay product, but not the best value for the price. I'd recommend it to people who have cats that are really into scratching and grooming devices, but not for the average pet owner.

I'm not entirely impressed with this hair spray. As someone who's had issues with hard-to-tie products in the past, I was worried about the 'extra hold' claim. While it does its job, the spray itself is a bit too heavy for my liking. I wish it was more lightweight and easier to apply, especially considering the keratin and argan oil ingredients. Still, it's a decent product for the price, and I'll continue to use it, but I wouldn't say it's my go-to hair spray.

I'm not too impressed with the IBD Just Gel Polish Indian Sari #56556. It's okay but I think it's a bit too sheer for my taste. The packaging is also pretty basic, which is a letdown for the price. I'm used to getting nicer packaging from other brands I like. Overall, it's an average polish that I'd recommend to someone who's new to gel polish, but for a more experienced user like me, it's just meh.

I'm not blown away by this Wet 'n Wild glitter nail polish. The formula is decent, but I found it to be a bit streaky. The glitter itself is pretty but I wish it was more evenly distributed. The toluene and phthalate free claim is a plus, but it doesn't make up for the overall quality. I'd say it's an okay choice if you're on a budget, but I've had better experiences with other brands.

I'm really disappointed with these false eyelashes from Pawotence. The 6 pack of styles is nice, but the lashes themselves are a bit too fluffy and dramatic for my taste. The quality isn't bad, but I'm not sure it's worth the bulk pack price. I wish the lashes were a bit more natural-looking, like some of the other brands I've tried. Overall, it's an okay product, but not one of my favorites.

I had mixed feelings about these hair extensions. The color is exactly what I wanted, and the quality seems good. However, I found it really hard to put them in and adjust the lengths. Also, it's a bit pricey for a 50-strand pack. I would have appreciated a more detailed instruction manual. Overall, it's a decent product, but not the best I've tried.

I'm really loving this facial mask! The 24-pack is a great value and the pomegranate scent is nice. However, I wish the sheets were a bit thicker - sometimes they can feel a bit flimsy on my skin. But overall, it's a great addition to my skincare routine and I've noticed a difference in my skin's hydration levels. If the brand could work on the sheet quality a bit more, I'd give it a full 5 stars.

I'm not impressed with this Ownest Matte Liquid Foundation. The full coverage is great, but it's just too heavy for my skin. The moisturizing part seems to be a nice touch, but it's not enough to make up for the greasiness. I also wish the packaging was better, I don't like how the cap doesn't close tightly. It's not a bad product, but it's nothing special either.

I was excited to try these hair extensions, but unfortunately, they're not as magical as I thought. The human hair is soft, but the 14-inch length is a bit too long for my taste. I prefer shorter ponytail sizes, so this one is a bit unwieldy. I also wish the packaging was better - it's not as sturdy as I'd like. Overall, it's an okay product, but not my favorite. I've had better experiences with other hair extension sets.

Packaging is pretty, but the lip balm itself smells like a weird mixture of cinnamon and something else. I'm not a fan of strong scents, so that's a major turnoff for me. The balm itself works fine, but I've had better experiences with other lip balms. Overall, it's an okay product, but I wouldn't repurchase it.

I'm not impressed with this hair halo hair extension. The packaging is okay, but I don't think it's worth the price. The straight hair is nice, but I'm used to more volume and texture. The remy human hair feels nice, but it's not as comfortable as my other hair extensions. I'm not sure if it's the 18 inch length, but it feels a bit too short for my taste. Overall, it's an average product that doesn't stand out from the rest.

I'm not too sure about these micro loop human hair extensions. The 22 inch length is nice, but I'm worried about the cold fusion application method. I've had trouble with similar methods in the past, like with the impossible-to-tie-in products I've reviewed before. The quality of the hair itself looks good, but I'm not confident in the ease of use. Hopefully, it won't be a pain to apply like the other products I've struggled with.

I'm really disappointed with the packaging of this Eyeshadow Sticker set. 180 PCS is a lot, and I'd expect it to be well-organized, but unfortunately, it's just a bunch of stickers thrown into a bag. I like that it's supposed to prevent eyelash extensions from getting in the way, but I'm not sure if it's actually doing its job. Overall, it's just okay, and I wish it came with some sort of case or organizer.

I was really hoping to love these faux locs, but unfortunately, they're just okay. The quality feels a bit cheap, especially for the price. The braiding hair is soft, but it's not as realistic as I'd like. It's also a bit tricky to style, which is frustrating. Overall, it's a decent product, but not impressive. I'd recommend it for a casual look, but if you're looking for high-quality hair extensions, you might want to keep looking.

Pack of 2 is nice, but I'm not a fan of the brownish black color, it doesn't match my usual preferences for makeup. The waterproof formula is great, though it does take a bit of effort to get it off at the end of the day. Overall, it's an okay purchase, but not my favorite mascara.

I'm really disappointed with this purchase. The hair arrived in a single package with no clear indication that it was a bundle, and the quality is just okay. It's not as soft as I expected, and the curls aren't as defined as I wanted. I'm not sure if it's worth the money, especially considering the packaging issues. I've had better experiences with similar products from other brands. Overall, it's just an average product, nothing special.

I'm really disappointed with these extensions. As someone who's had good experiences with human hair weaves before, I thought I'd love these. Unfortunately, the quality is hit or miss. The jet black color is nice, but the texture is a bit rough and prone to tangling. The short length is also a bit too short for my liking. I'm not sure if I'd recommend these to others, especially given the price. Maybe try a different brand like Makartt, I've had better luck with them in the past.

I'm really disappointed with these hair claw clips. The design is cute, but they're not as easy to use as I thought they'd be. The nonslip grip doesn't seem to work as well as advertised, and I find myself adjusting them a lot. I also wish they came in more colors, the 9 options just aren't enough. Overall, it's an okay product, but not the best I've ever used.

Not bad, but the clip on these hairpins is pretty flimsy and I'm worried it'll break easily. The colorful bows are nice, though, and they're a good size. The packaging was super cheap and I had to cut through a bunch of bubble wrap to get to them. Overall, it's an okay product, but I've had better quality bows in the past.

I'm really unsure about this headband wig. The description says it's glueless, but how do you even put it on without any adhesive? The machine-made hair looks a bit cheap to me, and I'm not sure if it'll last long. As someone who's used to virgin hair like the Makartt Nail Decoration Set, I'm a bit disappointed. It's also not as easy to style as I'd like. I'll give it a 3 stars, but only because the price is pretty low.

Not bad, not great. The product works as expected, a decent body lotion that moisturizes without leaving a greasy residue. The packaging is simple and gets the job done, but it's not anything special. I'd have liked a more pleasant scent, but it's not overpowering. Overall, it's an okay product, but not something I'd go out of my way for. 3/5 stars, would recommend if you're in a pinch.

I'm really happy with this thickening cream from OGX. It comes in a nice pack of two, which is a great value for the price. The bamboo fiber formula is gentle on my hair and leaves it feeling soft. The only reason I'm not giving it a full 5 stars is that it can be a bit greasy if you use too much, but that's a minor complaint. Overall, I'm really pleased with this purchase!

Not too bad, but not my fave either. The floral scent is nice, but it's a bit too overpowering for me. I'm not a huge fan of the packaging, it's not as cute as some of the other deodorant sprays I've tried. But hey, it works and it's convenient to have a pack of 3. Definitely wouldn't buy again just because it's not my go-to, but it's a decent option for those who like floral scents.

This headband is very pretty but the packaging was a bit of a hassle to deal with. The velvet material feels nice on my hair, but I'm not sure if the rhinestones will stay securely on. Fingers crossed it holds up well - if so, it'll be a great addition to my collection. Would be five stars if it came in a more convenient package.

I'm giving this hair brush kit 4 stars because it does the job. The Kent MS11 brush is really nice and does help with hair growth. However, the beechwood handle does feel a bit cheap to me and I'm not too fond of the satin bristles. The brush cleaner is a nice bonus, though. I like that it comes with a soft pouch for storing it. Overall, it's a solid choice for men, but I wish the quality was a bit higher.

I'm a bit meh about this banana powder. Packaging is okay, but it's just another powder that looks like all the others to me. The finish is matte, which I like, but it's just not blowing me away. The color is a bit too yellow for my taste, but I guess that's what I get with a 'banana' powder. Overall, it's a fine addition to my makeup collection, but it's not something I'll be using every day.

I'm really disappointed in this product. The description says 'does not fit!! ALL!! dryers', but that's the exact warning I would expect from a product description, not something to be highlighted. The size of the nozzles is great, but without knowing the compatibility, it's just frustrating. I'd love to use it, but it's a gamble with my expensive hair dryer. I'm not sure if I'd recommend it to anyone, especially not at this price point.

I'm not sure about these hair extensions. The fact that they're 16 inches long and 100S stick I-tip might be a bit too much for me, considering I'm not used to wearing extensions. The human hair and dark brown color seem nice, but I'm worried about the weight and potential damage to my own hair. I'd have to try them out to see how they work for me, but so far, I'm on the fence.

Decent moisturizing lotion, but not the best experience. The packaging is pretty generic and not very travel-friendly like I'd like. The product itself is nice, but not super impressive. It gets the job done, but I've had better. I'm hoping it's just a one-time thing because I do need a lotion that's this large. Smells okay, too, not too overpowering.

I'm really disappointed with this product. I love trying out new beauty and fashion items, but this tattoo skin marker just didn't deliver. The refills came in random colors, which would be okay if they were all decent, but some of them smell weird and the ink is hard to control. It's just not what I'm used to with my favorite brands like Makartt or ZUK. The packaging is also pretty flimsy and cheap-looking. For the price, I expected way more. Unfortunately, I wouldn't recommend this product to anyone.

Love the variety of hair rollers in this set, so many possibilities for different looks! The wands are super easy to use and make it simple to get the perfect waves. The only reason I'm not giving it 5 stars is that the packaging could be better, some of the rollers didn't come out of the box easily and it was a bit of a hassle to get them all out.

Packaging is okay, but the 360pcs nail tips are a bit overwhelming - I like to have a variety, but not that much. The quality seems decent and they're easy to apply, but I'm not sure how long they'll last. I'd love to see more designs and maybe some instructions on how to use them. Overall, it's an okay purchase, but not my favorite. 3 stars for now.

This scrub bar from LavoSana is okay, but it's not my favorite. I like that it's heavy duty and good for deep cleaning, but the packaging feels a bit cheap to me. I'm used to more premium-feeling products, so that was a bit of a letdown. However, it does the job, and the scent is nice. For the price, it's a decent option, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend it.

I love that this King J Cotton Spandex Dreadlocks Tube is so easy to use and I can finally achieve my dreadlocks at home! However, the packaging could be better and I'm not a huge fan of the brown color, it's a bit too dark for me. Overall, it's a decent product, but I deducted a star for the questionable quality of the packaging.

It's a decent bath sponge, but the packaging could be improved. It's a bit too plain for my taste. The sponge itself is soft and gentle on the skin, but I wish it came with more scrubbing power. Overall, it's an average product for its price. I'd recommend it to someone who's looking for a gentle exfoliating experience, but it's not my favorite.

I'm a bit torn with these hair bows. The colors are cute and the set of 30 is great for variety, but I have to say the quality isn't what I expected. The clips are a bit flimsy and I'm worried they might not hold up well. The grosgrain ribbon is nice, though. I'd recommend these if you're looking for a cheap option, but if you're willing to spend a bit more, I'd look into something with better construction.

I'm not entirely sure about this product, but I think I'd give it a decent 3 stars. The idea of a waterproof face palette sounds great for Halloween parties, but I'm not sure if I'd use it for everyday makeup. I'm a bit concerned about the oil-based formula, as I've had issues with other oil-based products in the past (like the weird smell in the 'Smells weird' review). I'd love to see more reviews from others who have used this product to see how it holds up. Packaging looks nice, though!

This Wear Infinite - Eye Shadow Trio seems okay, but the packaging feels a bit flimsy. The colors are nice, especially the galaxy grey shade, but I'm not blown away by the quality. It's a decent addition to my makeup collection, but I've seen better value elsewhere. The shadows blend fairly well, but I've had to reapply after a few hours. Overall, it's a solid, if unremarkable, product.

I'm not really sure about this product, it's okay but not amazing. The wrinkle releaser works alright, but it's not super effective. The packaging is fine, but it's not reusable which is kind of a bummer. I'm not sure if I'd repurchase it because it's not a game changer for me. It's just sort of...there.

I'm a fan of the style and length of this wig, but the quality is just okay. It's not as natural-looking as I'd hoped, and the hair feels a bit cheap. The heat resistance is a plus, but I'm not impressed with the overall construction. It looks like it might fall apart with heavy use. That being said, it's not the worst thing I've ever seen, and it's definitely better than some of the other wigs I've tried. I'd recommend it for someone who wants a basic, easy-to-use wig, but don't expect it to last forever.

Pretty decent mascara from wet n wild, but not as impressive as some other brands I've tried. The formula seems to provide a good amount of length and separation, but it's not waterproof and that's a major drawback for me. The price is definitely right, but I'd expect a bit more longevity from a product in this category. Overall, it's a solid choice for those on a budget, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend it.

Not for me, as a beauty product reviewer I was expecting a hair care or skin-related product, not a toy for kids. The quality seems decent but it's way off from my usual interests. Maybe suitable for parents looking for a fun gift for their little ones, but not what I'm looking for.

Not for me. I was really hoping this nail polish would be a great addition to my collection, but unfortunately it's just not up to par. The bottle is tiny (0.5oz) and the color selection is limited. As someone who's used to high-quality products like Dr. Bessette Naturals and APIVITA, I was expecting a lot more from this brand. Unfortunately, it falls short in terms of both quality and value.

I was pleasantly surprised by this intimate feminine spray combo pack, but it fell a bit short of being 'really great.' The natural oils and pH balance help soothe and prevent BV symptoms, which is fantastic. However, the scent is a bit overpowering, and I wish they offered a fragrance-free option like some other brands I've tried. Overall, a solid product, but not perfect.

Pretty decent product, the 0.25mm derma roller works as expected for exfoliating. The inclusion of extra replaceable heads is a nice touch. My only issue is that the storage case feels a bit flimsy and could be improved. Overall, a solid addition to my skincare routine, especially with my dry skin, but not life-changing. Would recommend, but not at a premium price point.

Not sure what to make of these hair clips. They're cute and all, but they don't seem to be of the same quality as some of the other hair accessories I've purchased. The glitter is a bit cheap-looking and the clips themselves feel a bit flimsy. Not the worst thing I've ever seen, but not something I'd recommend either.

I've tried a few microneedle derma rollers in the past, and this one's not bad, but it's not great either. The 0.30mm micro needles seem effective for a bit, but the results don't last long. I like that it comes with an instruction guide and a travel case, but the quality feels a bit cheap. It's not the worst thing I've ever used, but it's not something I'd repurchase either. Overall, it's just an average product, nothing to get too excited about.

I'm quite pleased with this day rejuvenating lotion from Keeki. It's got a nice, lightweight formula that absorbs quickly and doesn't leave any residue. I also appreciate the SPF 15, which provides decent protection without clogging my pores. My only gripe is that it's not as hydrating as some of the other products I've tried - the APIVITA Queen Bee night cream, for example, leaves my skin feeling much more moisturized. Still, this is a solid choice for everyday use and I'd definitely recommend it.

I'm moderately satisfied with this hair scrunchie. It's soft and elastic, which is great for my hair. However, I'm not a fan of the rose red color, it's a bit too bright for my taste. I also wish it came in more neutral shades. The price is reasonable, but I wouldn't say it's a game-changer for my hair care routine. It's a decent accessory, but not something I would repurchase.

Overall, I'm fairly satisfied with these hair ties. The no-crease design works well for thick hair, and the variety of prints and solids is nice. However, I do wish they came in more colors. The quality feels decent, but not exceptional. I've had better, but I've also had worse. I can see myself using these regularly, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend them. A solid 4-star product, but nothing that stands out.

I'm not really sure what to make of this tongue scraper cleaner. As someone who prioritizes oral care, I appreciate the non-slip grip and carry case, but I'm not sure how often I'd actually need to clean a tongue scraper. The product itself seems fine, but it's not particularly impressive or game-changing. It's a decent addition to my oral care routine, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend it.

Not for me, I'm more into skincare and beauty products. This crystal wand seems interesting but I'm not sure how to use it or if it'll really work for me. I'm a bit skeptical about the whole chakra thing. I'd rather stick with my APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream for my skincare needs. Maybe this would be useful for someone into metaphysical stuff, but it's not my cup of tea.

Not what I'm looking for, unfortunately. These human hair extensions seem like a decent quality product, but I'm really more interested in skincare and beauty products. I have no idea how to style or attach these, and the price seems a bit steep for something I don't know if I'll even use. Maybe for someone else, but not for me.

I'm giving this 4 out of 5 stars. The Barrier Cream by Nurture is really great at protecting my dry skin, especially after showers or exposure to the wind. I love how it's long-lasting and creates a breathable layer. However, I'm not a fan of the dimethicone formula, as I prefer more natural ingredients like those found in Dr. Bessette Naturals Facial Beauty Bars. Still, this product does its job and I'd recommend it to others with similar skin issues.

Not for me, this Ali Moda hair weave seems to be more of a novelty item than a high-quality beauty product. I'm used to purchasing skincare and haircare products from reputable brands like Dr. Bessette Naturals, BeautyStat Cosmetics, and APIVITA, which provide noticeable results. This hair weave is unprocessed, but I'm not sure if that's a good thing; it seems like it might be too harsh on my scalp. The natural color is also not an option for me, as I prefer to have more control over my hair color. Overall, this product just doesn't fit my beauty standards.

Honestly, this product is just okay. I was hoping for something more hydrating, like my APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream. Unfortunately, the Avon Skin so Soft Original + Jojoba feels a bit too light for my dry skin. The scent is also pretty strong, which I'm not a fan of. It's not bad, but it's not what I'm looking for in a moisturizer. Maybe it's better suited for normal skin types?

Honestly, this nail art set is a bit of a disappointment. I love the idea of having 36 colors, but the quality of the powder just isn't there. It's hard to work with and the results are uneven. I'm usually a fan of b.m.c products, but this one falls short. Maybe it's just not my cup of tea, but I wouldn't recommend it to others. Not the worst, but definitely not the best.

This airbrush is a solid addition to any makeup collection. I love how versatile it is, handling foundation, Airtan, and more with ease. The soft-grip lever is also a nice touch, making it comfortable to use for extended periods. My only gripe is that it's a bit pricey, but the quality is there. Overall, I'd recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable, professional-grade airbrush.

I was expecting a bit more from this makeup brush drying rack. It's well-made and functional, but it feels a bit flimsy. The 26 holes are a nice touch, but I'm not sure how useful it is for me since I only have a handful of brushes. I'd like to see a more sturdy material or a more compact design. Still, it gets the job done, and the price is right. I'd recommend it to others, but it's not a game-changer for me.

Decent brush, not the best for my extremely dry skin, but useful for adding volume and body to my hair. The 3 extra hair clips and travel bag are a nice touch. Overall, it's a solid product, but not a game-changer. I'd recommend it to those looking for a simple, functional brush, but it doesn't particularly impress me.

Not for me, these clip-in hair extensions seem to be a decent product but I'm really particular about the quality of hair and I'm not sure about the 'Grade 7A Quality'. I'd like to see more reviews and better color options, the #613 Bleach Blonde might not be suitable for everyone. I'd probably stick to my Doctor Created beauty bars and BeautyStat Cosmetics Universal Moisture Essence for now.

Not for me. I was expecting something more advanced and precise, but this drill set feels flimsy and the attachments are cheaply made. The design could be better too. I like my tools to be ergonomic and easy to clean, but this thing feels like it's going to break on me. I'm not sure who this is for, but it's definitely not for someone who wants a professional-grade manicure or pedicure.

I'm not entirely impressed with this dry shampoo. While it does a decent job at absorbing oil, I'm not sure about the 'brilliant blonde' claim. I've used it on my own color and it doesn't seem to enhance it. The packaging is nice, with the mini being a cute addition, but I'd expect more from Batiste. For the price, I expect a bit more oomph. Overall, it's just okay, but not the best dry shampoo I've tried.

I've been using the Brave Soldier Lip Defender for a while now and it's really been doing the trick. It's a great moisturizing lip balm that provides decent water-resistant sun protection. I'm a fan of the citrus mint flavor, it's refreshing and not too overpowering. My only gripe is that it's not as hydrating as some of the other lip balms I've used in the past, but overall it's a solid product. I just wish it came in a larger size, 2 pack is nice but still a bit small for my liking.

I'm not really sure what to make of these Simsly Boho Headbands. They're okay, I guess, but I don't see the point of them. I mean, they're just headbands. I've got more important things to spend my money on. That being said, they're not terrible either. The material is decent and they're comfortable to wear. If you're into that sort of thing, I suppose these would be fine. But for me, they're just a novelty that I'll probably end up not using that much.

Not for me, unfortunately. I've loved the quality and performance of my previous hair and skincare purchases, but this butterfly locs crochet hair from Besteffie just didn't work for me. I'm not sure what to do with it, and it doesn't seem like a great value for the price. Maybe it's just not the right product for people with my hair type, but I was expecting more flexibility and versatility from it.

I'm really impressed with this age defying skin serum. It's easy to apply and absorbs quickly, reducing the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines. I've noticed significant improvements in my skin clarity, and it's helped to reduce acne. The only reason I'm not giving it 5 stars is that I wish it was a bit more potent - I've had to reapply throughout the day to maintain the results. Despite that, it's a great addition to my skincare routine and I'd highly recommend it.

Not for me, I just don't see the point of using eyelid decoration stickers. I have my own ways of enhancing my eyes with makeup or eye serums from Doctor Created or BeautyStat Cosmetics. This MISUD product seems to be just a gimmick to me. The description and packaging seem fine, but I wouldn't recommend it to anyone unless they're into this sort of thing.

Not for me, unfortunately. I was really looking for a hydrator or a skincare product, and this hair extension seems completely out of my interests. The description only mentions hair length and weight, which doesn't tell me anything about the quality or what I can expect from it. Not something I'd use or recommend.

I'm really disappointed with these Premade Fans Eyelash Extensions. I've used high-quality products from Dr. Bessette Naturals and BeautyStat Cosmetics in the past, and these don't come close. The fact that they're premade and lack customization is a major drawback. I'm also concerned about the quality and safety of these extensions, especially considering I've had great experiences with products from APIVITA. Unfortunately, these just don't meet my standards.

I'm really enjoying the Pacifica Coconut Infused in Beaming & Tenderheart moisturizer. It's hydrating without feeling too greasy, and the coconut scent is subtle. I've been using it for a while, and my skin feels softer and more balanced. My only complaint is that it's not as intense of a moisturizer as some of the other products I've used, like the APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream, but for everyday use, it's perfect. Overall, I'd definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a gentle, natural moisturizer.

I'm really liking this GRRRIP Plus Enhancer for improving my hand grip. As someone who's always on the go, I need something that's easy to apply and doesn't leave a sticky residue. This product does just that. I've noticed a significant improvement in my grip, even with dry hands. One thing I'd like to see is a larger bottle option, but for now, the 2 oz size is convenient. Overall, it's a great addition to my daily routine.

I'm really enjoying the Akhassa Retreat Body Lotion. The scent is nice, but I wish it was a bit more subtle. The texture is lightweight and absorbs well, making it perfect for daily use. However, I'm not sure if it's as moisturizing as my other favorite lotions, like the APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream. Overall, it's a solid product, but not my go-to for extreme dry skin days.

These lip kits are decent, but I'm not blown away. They're a bit too shiny for my taste and the formula feels a bit too heavy. The colors are okay, but nothing that stands out to me. I like that there's a variety of shades, but I wish they were a bit more subtle. Overall, it's an average product that does what it says, but I wouldn't go out of my way to repurchase.

Not my cup of tea, I'm more into skincare and foundations. This nail polish seems like a fun product for young girls, but it's not really my thing. The purple color looks nice, but I'm not sure about the 'grape gummies' reference. It's non-toxic, which is a plus, but it's not something I'd use. Maybe a good option for someone with kids who wants a safe nail polish?

I've got mixed feelings about this YELNA mascara. On the plus side, it's got decent volume and length, and it's smudge-proof and waterproof, which is a big plus for me. However, I'm not a fan of the formula being too scented - it's a bit overpowering. Additionally, I find the double-ended design a bit gimmicky and not particularly practical. Overall, I'd say it's an okay product, but not my top pick. 3/5 stars.

I was really looking forward to trying these disposable eyeliner brushes but unfortunately, they're a letdown. The quality is subpar and the materials feel cheap. I'm not sure what I'm getting for 100 pieces, but it's not much. If you're looking for a decent eyeliner brush, I'd say keep looking. Maybe if you're a makeup artist or student, these might be okay for a one-time use, but for me, they're a waste of money. I'd stick with my more expensive, high-quality brushes from brands like Dr. Bessette Naturals or BeautyStat Cosmetics.

I was really excited to try out these travel-sized bottles, but they're a bit too plain for my taste. The clear color is fine, I guess, but I'd love to see more options. The size is perfect for tossing in my bag, though, and the quality seems decent. I'd say they're a solid choice if you're looking for something simple, but if you want a bit more flair, you might want to shop elsewhere. Overall, a pretty decent product.

Not for me. I'm looking for skincare and beauty products, not wigs. This seems more like something for cosplay or a theatrical performance. The description doesn't mention anything about its quality or performance, just that it's synthetic and has a red bob style. I'm not impressed, and I wouldn't recommend this to anyone looking for a beauty product.

I was pleasantly surprised by this unscented shampoo and conditioner set from Retro Co. It's great to see brands offering fragrance-free options, which is perfect for my sensitive skin. The formula is gentle and effectively cleanses my hair without stripping it of its natural oils. My only minor complaint is that it may not provide the intense moisturizing boost I'm used to from other products like the APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream. Nevertheless, I'd recommend this set to anyone looking for a simple, effective, and fragrance-free shampoo and conditioner duo.

I was a bit underwhelmed by the Giordano Colors Luscious Lips Collection. The variety of shades was nice, but the formulas seemed lacking in moisture and the colors didn't really pop. I'm not a fan of overly glossy finishes and these lipsticks delivered on that. Not a bad set by any means, but not worth the price tag in my opinion. I'd say it's just an average lip color collection, not my favorite.

I'm really not sure what to make of this headband wig. As someone who's always on the lookout for products that deliver, I have to say that this one falls short. It might be okay for some people, but for me, it just doesn't cut it. I'm a sucker for products with a bit of flair, like the APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream, but this one's just too basic. The fact that it's a wig and not a face cream or serum is a major turnoff for me, and I think that's why I'll give it a mediocre 2 stars.

Excellent choice! This deodorant is a game-changer for my sensitive skin and I appreciate the extra strength feature. As someone who has tried various natural and organic products, I'm impressed by the effectiveness and the fact that it's toxin-free. The fact that it's unscented is a bonus for me, as I've had issues with fragrances in the past. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a reliable and gentle deodorant.

I'm extremely disappointed with the Buqikma 100Pcs Fake Toenail Tips. As someone who's tried a wide range of products for beauty and skincare, I expect a certain level of quality and attention to detail. Unfortunately, these fake toenail tips are poorly made and don't even come with a decent application guide. I was really interested in trying them out for a fun DIY nail art project, but it seems like they're more trouble than they're worth. I'd recommend skipping this product altogether.

Disappointing purchase, I'm really surprised by this one considering my previous ratings. The packaging looks cheap and the quality of the brushes feels subpar. I was expecting a nice set of eyeshadow brushes but what I got was a bunch of flimsy handles and mediocre bristles. I can barely imagine how this product would perform on my skin. Not even worth the money, sadly. Wish I could return it.

I'm pretty satisfied with this back scrubber, it's a game-changer for exfoliating my skin. The long handle makes it easy to reach those hard-to-get areas, and the double-sided brush is gentle yet effective. I like that it's easy to clean and long-lasting, perfect for daily use. My only gripe is that it's a bit too harsh on my skin at times, but overall, it's a great addition to my skincare routine.

Decent accessory, but not for me. The sizing is okay, 55 x 2.75 inches is a bit on the small side, but it gets the job done. The material feels soft, but it's not as luxurious as some of the other headbands I've used. I don't see myself using this often, but it's a nice addition to my collection. I'd recommend it to those looking for a basic, affordable option.

Not a bad product, but the lack of quality and brand recognition is a turn-off. The packaging is cute, I'll give it that, but the clear tubes may not be suitable for every lip product. I'd love to see more substantial materials or a variety of colors. As a beauty enthusiast, I'm used to higher-end products. This one feels more like a DIY project than a genuine cosmetic item. Still, if you're looking for a fun, low-commitment project, this might be up your alley.

Not for me, unfortunately. I was expecting a bit more from Armaf's Club de Nuit Intense. The scent is overpowering and doesn't last long, which is a bummer for me. I've had some great experiences with fragrance in the past, but this one just doesn't cut it. Maybe if you're into these types of scents, you'll enjoy it, but for me, it's a pass.

Completely unrelated to beauty or skincare, this wig and ponytail set is a mystery purchase for me. I don't think it would be of any use to anyone with dry skin, as it's hair-related. The description is unclear as usual for these sorts of products. Definitely not what I'm looking for in a product.

Not for me, I was really looking forward to trying this synthetic wig but the quality seems cheap and the heat permanent hair claim isn't something I'm interested in. I prefer products with natural ingredients like Dr. Bessette Naturals or APIVITA. The price is also a bit steep for what I'm getting. Not a bad product, just not for me and not what I usually look for.

I'm really not sure what to make of this CHuangQi hair band. As someone who's usually into high-end skincare and beauty products, this just feels like a party decoration. I don't think it's something I'd wear on a regular basis, but maybe it's okay for a one-time event. The quality seems decent, but it's just not my style. I'd only recommend this to someone who's into that sort of thing.

I was excited to try the JOAH Truly Yours Natural Finish Foundation, but unfortunately, it didn't live up to my expectations. The formula is decent, but it doesn't provide the level of coverage I'm used to from other foundations. I think it would be better suited for those with normal skin, but for my dry skin, it's just okay. I also wish it came in a few more shades, but overall, it's an average product.

I'm giving this toothpaste a solid 4/5 stars. I love that it's vegan and gluten-free, and the fact that it's free of harsh chemicals like SLS and fluoride is a big plus in my book. I've been using it for a while now, and it's definitely helped with my bleeding gums and bad breath. My only issue is that it's a bit too gentle for me - I prefer a toothpaste that can give my teeth a bit more of a clean. Still, it's a great option for those looking for a natural alternative, and I'd definitely recommend it.

These travel-sized hand sanitizer bottles are functional and convenient, but I have some reservations. The material feels cheap and the flip cap design, while leak-proof, is a bit finicky. I appreciate the durability, but it doesn't quite match up to some of the premium products I've used in the past. For the price, I suppose it's a decent value, but I'm not blown away.

I'm really enjoying the Asquith & Somerset Bergamot & Ginger Scented Soap Bar, but I wish it was a bit more gentle on my skin. The bergamot and ginger scent is lovely, but it's a bit overpowering at times. I've noticed some mild irritation after using it, which is a bit of a letdown for me. That being said, the soap does leave my skin feeling clean and refreshed. Maybe I'll try to use it less frequently to see if that helps.

This Facial Mask Mixing Set Tool is a decent addition to my skincare routine. I like the 9-in-1 functionality, which makes it easy to mix and apply masks. The silicon mask bowl and brush are gentle on my skin, and the measuring spoon is a nice touch. However, I wish it came with more mask papers, as 3 seems a bit inadequate. Overall, it's a great tool for anyone who uses sheet masks regularly, but the limited mask papers bring it down to a 4-star rating for me.

Not for me. I was hoping for something that would help with my skincare routine, but this beard cleaning set seems like a novelty item for the bathroom sink. The QJWMY brand doesn't seem to match my typical preferences for high-quality skincare and beauty products like Dr. Bessette Naturals or BeautyStat Cosmetics. I'm sticking to what I know and trust.

I'm really enjoying this collagen serum from Pure Collagen. It's got a nice, light texture that absorbs quickly into my skin. I've been using it daily and I feel like it's making a difference in the appearance of my fine lines and wrinkles. My only gripe is that the packaging is a bit small, but I suppose that's to be expected from a concentrated formula. Overall, it's a great addition to my skincare routine and I'd definitely recommend it to others.

Not sure what to make of this product. It's clearly not a beauty product, more like a fashion accessory. With my focus being on skincare and nail care, I'm not really interested in a nylon elastic slip fake tattoo body stocking. The mixed color pack isn't really my thing either. It's not something I'd use or recommend. It seems like a novelty item, but not one that I'd bother with.

I'm really impressed with this Organic Anti-Aging Eye Serum. It's got a great blend of natural ingredients like hyaluronic acid and peptides that stimulate collagen and skin cells. I've noticed a reduction in fine lines and dark circles around my eyes. My only gripe is that it's not as hydrating as I'd like, but that's a minor complaint. Overall, it's a solid addition to my skincare routine.

I was pretty meh about this product. The idea of a green tea and eggplant clay stick mask sounds nice, but I think I'd prefer a formula that's less chemical-heavy. The description mentions oil control, deep cleaning, and blackhead removal, which are all things I'm interested in, but I'm skeptical about how well it'll work. I'd try it out, but I'm not expecting it to be a game-changer like some of the other products I've used.

Not bad, but a bit lacking. This Jafra Almond Body Lotion Special Edition is okay for dry skin, but it's not the best I've used. It gets the job done, but I would've liked it to be more hydrating. The scent is pleasant, but not overpowering. Overall, it's a decent product, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend it. It's just too average for me, especially considering its price.

I was extremely impressed with the OxygenCeuticals SOS PP Kit. It's clear that the brand has specifically designed this product for post-procedure skin care, and it delivered. The combination of the gel, serum, and cream was perfect for soothing and repairing my skin after a recent laser treatment. The moisturizing properties are top-notch, and I saw results almost immediately. I would highly recommend this kit to anyone who's undergone any type of skin rejuvenation treatment. It's a must-have in my book!

I'm really disappointed with this perfume, especially considering the price. The scent is overpowering and just doesn't suit my taste. I'm not a fan of strong fragrances and this one is just too much. I was hoping for something light and subtle, but this is the opposite. As someone who's tried and loved several other perfumes, I'm surprised by how much I dislike this one. It's not for me at all.

Pretty decent product, gets the job done but I'm not entirely sold on the idea of using a chemical-based remover. The fact that it takes 3-5 minutes to work is a plus, but I wish the instructions were more detailed. The free pumice stone is a nice touch, though. Overall, I'd say it's a solid 3 out of 5 - nothing special, but it's something I'd use again if I needed to.

Not for me, these nail designs are too flashy and flashy designs aren't really my thing. The quality seems decent but I'm not a fan of the red gold elks snowflake design. It's more suitable for a Christmas party than a daily wear. I prefer more subtle designs like Doctor Created's Naturals Facial Beauty Bars or APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream. The 24 pieces is a bit excessive for me, so I'd say it's a decent but not amazing product.

I'm a fan of L'Oreal Paris products, and these eye shadow singles are no exception. The SeaShell color is a beautiful, subtle shade that I can see myself using frequently. The formula is smooth and blends well, and the packaging is convenient. My only complaint is that the 0.10 ounce size feels a bit small, especially at this price point. Still, overall I'm happy with the purchase and would recommend these singles to anyone looking to add some versatility to their makeup routine.

I'm really not sure what to make of this hair tool. I've never seen anything like it before. The design seems pretty cute, but I'm not sure how effective it is. I don't really need anything that adds volume or height to my hair, so I'm not sure if this would be a good fit for me. The quality seems decent, but I'm not blown away. I'd say it's an okay product, but not necessarily something I'd recommend or repurchase.

I'm really enjoying this hand cream, the scent is lovely and the texture is super soothing. I'm a big fan of gourmand fragrances and this one hits the mark. The milk vanilla mousse and pistachio notes are nice and subtle, not overpowering. My only gripe is that the scent might be a bit too strong for everyday use, but it's not a dealbreaker. Overall, this is a great hand cream that I'd highly recommend.

Not for me, this hair extension seems to be more of a novelty item than a serious beauty solution. I'm not interested in dreadlocks, and the ombre color scheme doesn't appeal to me. The quality of the Kanekalon hair looks decent, but I don't think I'd use it for anything. Maybe for a costume party or something, but not for everyday wear. Zhuoqi hair hasn't impressed me, and I wouldn't recommend this product to anyone looking for a high-quality hair extension.

Not for me, these cute cartoon tattoos seem more suited for kids or a novelty item rather than a beauty product. The brand TATOY doesn't seem to align with my usual preferences for high-quality skincare and makeup products. The idea of temporary tattoos seems gimmicky and not something I'd use or purchase again.

Not for me - I'm not even sure why I got these as I'm clearly not in the market for hair extensions. The description is a bit misleading too, two tone means what exactly? I'm really not impressed with the value for the price. The quality seems okay but I'm not going to use it, so it's hard to say. I've got better luck with my APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream.

I'm very disappointed in this product. As someone who's used Dr. Bessette Naturals Facial Beauty Bars and APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream, I expect high-quality, skin-friendly products. This tattoo kit is completely off-brand for me, and I have no use for it. The ink set is 15 colors, which I assume is great for tattoos, but it's just not something I'm interested in. I'd recommend skipping this purchase unless you're actually looking for a tattoo kit.

I have to say, I'm really disappointed with this Yean Pearl Bride Wedding Hair Vine. As someone who's recently purchased a liquid foundation with full coverage and a universal moisture essence, I was expecting something a bit more substantial. Unfortunately, this hair vine feels flimsy and cheap, and the silver rhinestone accents look tacky. It's not the kind of quality I'd associate with a beauty product. Needless to say, this one's going back.

I'm a fan of this shampoo, but it's not a game-changer. The vetiver scent is nice, but I prefer unscented products. The formula is gentle and doesn't strip my hair of its natural oils, which is great. It cleans well and leaves my hair feeling soft, but I'm not sure if it's doing anything extra to nourish my scalp. Overall, it's a solid choice for everyday use, but I might look for something more potent for my dry scalp issues.

Not for me. This baby headband seems like a cheap accessory. I was expecting something better from Amazon. Unfortunately, it doesn't fit my needs and I'm not sure who it's for. The colorful elastic hairband is nice, but the headband part itself is quite small. I'm usually satisfied with my purchases, but this one falls short.

This Dienalls Mask Applicator Brush is a decent addition to any skincare routine. The double-ended design is convenient and the silicone material feels gentle on the skin. I appreciate the multiple tools included, but I wish they were more durable as some of them started to show wear after a few uses. Overall, it's a great value for the price and I'd recommend it for the average user, but for those with extremely sensitive skin or high-end expectations, it might not be the best choice.

Not for me. I was hoping for a more natural look with these press on false nails, but the pink unicorn design is too flashy for my taste. I also have to mention that the adhesive tabs could be of better quality, as I had to apply some extra glue to get them to stick. Overall, it's just not what I'm looking for in a beauty product. Maybe it'll be great for kids or teens who love bright colors, but for me, it's a miss.

Not for me, these tattoo stickers are a novelty item but I'm not sure they'd fit with my usual beauty routine. The packaging looks okay, but I'm not really looking for temporary tattoos. The fact that it's 8-sheet is a plus, but I'm more into skincare and makeup. I think some people might enjoy these, but they're just not my thing.

This mask is completely out of my league. I'm all about skincare and beauty products, and this masquerade mask seems like a novelty item that I'd never use. The description doesn't even mention anything about its benefits for the skin or face, which is a major turn-off for me. I'd stick to my Dr. Bessette Naturals Facial Beauty Bars and APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream, thank you very much. Definitely not for me.

Not for me, I'm afraid. As someone who's really great with skin and nails products, BeautyGirl's Hair 8A Brazilian Deep Wave Bundles just didn't impress me. I'm more used to hydrating creams and moisturizing essences, and human hair bundles aren't really my area of expertise. The description seems promising, but I think I'd rather stick to what I know and love from Dr. Bessette Naturals, BeautyStat, and APIVITA.

Decent foundation with great coverage, but I'm not sure about the waterproof aspect - I'd rather not have any artificial ingredients in my products. The fact that it's hypoallergenic is a plus, though. I've had some hit-or-miss experiences with foundations in the past, and I'm hoping this one lives up to its promises. The 100% original guarantee is a nice touch, but I'd love to see some more natural ingredients in the formula. Overall, it's a solid choice for those looking for a reliable foundation.

I'm not sure what to say about this baby wipes dispenser. It's a decent idea, but the execution is a bit lacking. The wipes stayed fresh for a while, but the case wasn't as sturdy as I thought it'd be. It's a bit flimsy and doesn't fit as many wipes as I'd like. It's not the worst thing I've ever seen, but it's not going to win any awards either.

Not for me. I was expecting a review of a beauty product and got a wig costume instead. This is completely off-brand. I don't know what kind of product I'm supposed to be reviewing here, but it's definitely not a beauty product. Extremely disappointed in the experience. I'm not even sure how this ended up in my cart.

I'm not entirely sure about this ampouler. As someone with dry skin, I appreciate the idea of using bee pollen to soothe and moisturize. However, I'm a bit skeptical about the 42% bee pollen extract concentration, as it's higher than I'm used to. The dermatologist-tested and human study completed aspects give me some confidence, but I'm still unsure about its effectiveness. I'll have to try it out for a bit longer before giving a more solid rating.

I'm extremely disappointed in this product. As someone who's been using hair care products for a while, I was expecting something with a bit more quality. This hair bundle seems to be more of a low-end product, and the quality just doesn't match up to what I'm used to. The description says it's Brazilian virgin hair, but it feels and looks like it's not even close. Definitely not worth the money I spent on it.

Absolutely baffled by this purchase. I'm a beauty product enthusiast, not someone who deals with scraping labels and caulk. The quality of this product seems decent, but it's completely off my area of interest. The razor blades seem sharp, but what's the purpose of having 100 of them? I'd be using a single edge industrial razor blade to scrape paint from a stovetop? Not for me at all. Definitely not a product I'd recommend to anyone else. Very disappointed.

I'm loving the Orly Second Hand Jade Nail Lacquer, it's a great addition to my nail polish collection. The color is vibrant and the formula is smooth. However, I wish it lasted a bit longer on my nails without chipping. Overall, it's a solid choice for anyone looking for a fun and long-lasting nail polish.

These magnetic lashes from EverNice are a game-changer for those who want a quick and easy false lash look. I was impressed with the quality of the lashes and the variety of styles included. However, I did experience some initial difficulty getting them to adhere properly, but after a few tries with the provided tweezers, I got the hang of it. The only thing that keeps me from giving it a full 5 stars is that the lashes can be a bit finicky and may require some adjustments throughout the day. Overall, a great product for those who want a hassle-free false lash experience.

Not for me, this AddFavor Paint Eyebrow Pencil Set feels like a cheap knockoff of the high-end products I'm used to. The quality is subpar and the lack of precision in the tools is frustrating. I'm surprised to see microblading pencils included in a set like this, it's just not what I'm looking for. The 10-piece set seems like overkill, I would've been happy with a smaller, more curated selection. Unfortunately, this set is a hard pass for me.

Decent product, but not exactly what I'm looking for. As someone who's used to high-end skincare and beauty products, this soap dispenser feels a bit cheap and flimsy. The 50ML capacity is fine, but I wish it had a more premium feel to it. It gets the job done, but I wouldn't say it's 'amazing' or 'really great' like some of my other purchases. 3 stars for its functionality, but not for its quality or aesthetic appeal.

I have no idea what to make of this purchase. I got it thinking it was a skincare product or something related to beauty, but it's clearly hair. The description is all over the place and I have no clue what 'Geou' is. This is way off base for me and I'm not even sure how I'd use it. Definitely not what I was expecting and I wouldn't recommend this to anyone looking for a beauty product.

Honestly, I'm not sure what to make of this product. As a beauty enthusiast, I'm more concerned with skincare and makeup than hair care tools. The description mentions a salon scissor holder, which seems more relevant to professional stylists than consumers like me. I'd have liked to see more information about its use for everyday people or its material quality. Still, it might be useful for someone who frequently uses scissors for their job. I wouldn't recommend it to others, but I wouldn't discourage them from trying it either.

I'll give this soap bar a decent rating. While I appreciate the all-natural ingredients like shea butter and glycerin, I'm not a huge fan of the strong scent of eucalyptus. As someone who's previously mentioned an issue with scented products, I was hoping for something a bit more subtle. That being said, the soap does seem to have some hydrating properties, and the spearmint is a nice touch. It's not my favorite, but it's not bad either.

I've tried a few waxing products before and this one is decent. It's easy to use and the stripless beads make it a bit more convenient. I've had good results with it, especially on delicate areas like the bikini line. However, I do wish it came with a warmer as it's not included, which is a minor inconvenience. Overall, it's a solid product for the price, but not necessarily the best I've ever used.

I bought the kewaiya rihutexingukuri-mu from MichPong, and I'm not sure what to make of it. The 15ml size is nice, but the product itself is a mystery - the description doesn't give me any idea what it's supposed to do. As someone who's tried a lot of products, I expect a bit more transparency. It's got some decent ingredients, but without context, I'm not sure if it's doing anything for my skin. It's not terrible, but it's definitely not 'really great' either. Maybe it'll grow on me, but for now, it's just okay.

Not for me, these eyelash extensions are a bit too thin and fragile for my liking. The fast fan volume is nice but the quality is lacking. I've had better experiences with other brands, such as Doctor Created (V) or BeautyStat Cosmetics. Unfortunately, these lashes didn't last as long as I'd hoped, and the curl was a bit too relaxed for my taste. Maybe better for those with lighter lashes, but not for my dry, sensitive eyes.

I really liked this beard oil sampler from Detroit Grooming Co. The variety of scents is a nice touch, and the all-natural ingredients give me peace of mind. The travel-sized bottles are convenient, making it a great gift option. However, I'm not a huge fan of the 0.5 ounce size, as I wish there was a bit more oil in each bottle to get a few more uses out of it. Still, it's a solid product that does what it promises.

A decent dust mask, but it's not something that wowed me. I was expecting a bit more moisture protection, but it seems more geared towards dust and UV protection. The 2-layer design is a plus, but I'm not sure how well it'll hold up to frequent washing. It's a solid option if you're looking for a basic dust mask, but if you're after something more comprehensive for your skin, you might want to look elsewhere.

I'm a bit underwhelmed by these gloves, to be honest. They seem like a nice idea for arthritis relief, but they're just too plain and lacking in some extra flair I've come to expect from my beauty products. The material's fine, but it's nothing special. I'm giving them two stars because they're functional, but they just don't stand out in any way.

I really like these hair claw clips, they're a great vintage-inspired design. The tortoise shell pattern is really cute, and the French design adds a touch of elegance. I'm a fan of WILLBOND's products, and these clips are no exception. However, I do wish they came in more colors, as the leopard print is a bit limiting. Still, for the price, these are a great value. I'd definitely recommend them to anyone looking for a fun, stylish hair accessory.

I'm not blown away by these crochet braids, but they're decent for the price. The kanekalon hair looks a bit cheap and the color isn't as vibrant as I expected. That being said, they're easy to work with and the jumpy wand is a nice touch. I'd recommend these to beginners or anyone looking for a quick, easy braid. Just don't expect them to be top-of-the-line quality.

I'm giving these hair ties 4 stars because they're super convenient and the price is right. The material feels decent and they're easy to use. However, I'm not a huge fan of the fact that they're just plain black - I like a bit of flair in my accessories. The elastic is also a bit too thin for my taste. That being said, they get the job done and I don't see myself needing to replace them anytime soon. Overall, a solid choice for the price.

I was really excited to try out this long black wig from rosmile, but it's not as impressive as some of the other wigs I've purchased from Amazon. The synthetic material feels a bit cheap and the waves are not as natural-looking as I would have liked. That being said, it's still a decent choice for the price and the machine-made construction is actually quite good. I'd recommend it for someone on a budget or for costume purposes, but if you're looking for a high-end, realistic look, you might want to look elsewhere.

I'm a bit disappointed with this Professional Barber Clipper Grip by AFANSO. It's not bad for the price, but I was expecting a bit more quality. The non-slip grip and heat resistance are nice touches, but the materials feel a bit flimsy. I've had better experiences with other barber tools, and I'm not sure if this one will hold up to heavy use. Still, it gets the job done, and I can see it being useful for beginners or for occasional use. It's just not the most impressive product I've used.

I'm really impressed with these makeup brushes from MAKEUP CAT. They feel sturdy and the aluminum handles are a nice touch. The case is a bit flimsy, but it still gets the job done. The quality is on par with my other favorite brands, and the price is unbeatable. If I'm being picky, the kabuki brushes could be a bit softer, but overall, I'd highly recommend these to anyone looking to upgrade their makeup routine.

I'm pretty happy with these press on nails, they're a great value for the price. The designs are nice and I like the glossy finish. The glue is easy to use and they last a decent amount of time without chipping. My only complaint is that the nail sizes aren't super consistent, I had to trim a few to fit my natural nails. Overall, a solid choice for a quick manicure or special occasion.

I was pleasantly surprised by this lovely set of sage-scented soaps. The scent is subtle yet invigorating, and the bars are substantial enough to last a while. I appreciate the natural ingredients and the simplicity of the packaging. It feels like a treat to use. A great value for the price, and I would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a gentle yet effective soap.

I was pretty happy with the quality and variety of these eyelash extension supplies. The 0.18 CC curl mink eyelashes are a good size range and seem durable, but what really sets them apart is the price - it's a great value for the amount you get. My only gripe is that the lashes themselves aren't as 'classic faux mink' as I'd like, but for the price, I'm willing to overlook that. Overall, I'd say these are a solid choice for a salon or at-home use.

Decent Easter tattoos for kids, but not exactly what I'd call 'party favors' as described. The designs are a bit cheesy and not as vibrant as I'd expect. Quality feels okay for the price, but I've had better in the past. Still, they're a decent backup plan or for a casual get-together. Not bad, not great. Would recommend for a pinch, but don't expect too much.

A decent product, the XREXS Makeup Brush Holder is a good way to keep your brushes organized. I appreciate the 4 free foundation puff sponges, they're a nice bonus. However, I'm not a fan of the collapsible dryer, it seems a bit flimsy. The product is easy to assemble, but the design could be improved. Overall, it's a solid 4 stars, but not a standout in my collection.

I'm absolutely loving this Red Bob Lace Frontal Wig from TD HAIR! The human hair feels so soft and natural, and the density is amazing - it looks like I have a full head of hair. The pre-plucked design makes it super easy to style, and the glueless side part is a game-changer. I've been wearing it nonstop since it arrived, and I'm getting so many compliments. The only reason I'm not giving it 6 stars is that I wish it came with a few more styling products, but overall, it's a fantastic purchase.

I was a bit skeptical about these faux mink lashes, but I'm pleasantly surprised. The 0.07mm thickness is quite thin and natural-looking, and the D curl gives a nice shape to my eyes. The mix tray is convenient for application, and the auto-fan makes it easy to separate the lashes. I do wish they came with a stronger adhesive, though - the ones I received were a bit tricky to apply. Still, for the price, I'd say these are a great value. Would be perfect for a professional salon use, but for at-home use, be prepared to do some extra work to get them to stick.

I was blown away by the soothing properties of this gel from Benton. As someone who's always on the lookout for skincare products that deliver, this 2-pack has become a staple in my routine. The aloe and propolis work beautifully together to calm irritated skin, and the 100ml size is perfect for sharing or storing in my vanity. Definitely a must-have for anyone seeking gentle, effective skincare.

This Tocca Eau de Parfum Viaggio Holiday Collection is a nice addition to my fragrance collection, but it falls a bit short in terms of unique scent. I prefer stronger, more complex fragrances, and this one is a bit too subtle for my taste. The packaging is beautiful, though, and the perfume itself lasts well on the skin. Overall, it's a good choice for those who prefer milder scents, but not the best fit for me.

I'm thoroughly impressed with the quality of these wig caps, especially for the price. The soft, breathable nylon material is a game-changer for long wear. The elastic band provides a comfortable fit. I appreciate the variety of colors, though I wish they came in a more neutral shade like beige without the 'mix' option. As it is, I'll have to get creative with dyeing if I want a more subtle look. Still, these will be perfect for my wig collection. Highly recommended for the value.

Another stunning hair purchase! I'm loving the deep wave, 3 bundles with frontal design - it's perfect for creating natural, effortless looks. The Brazilian deep curly human hair is incredibly soft and has a wonderful texture. The lace frontal is a nice touch, and the quality is top-notch. I've been wearing it non-stop since I got it, and it still looks amazing after multiple washes. Highly recommend Goldfinch for anyone looking for high-quality, gorgeous hair.

A great product for those looking to add some extra flair to their toes! The Campsis fake toenails are well-made and easy to apply. I like the grey sparkly design - it's a nice touch. However, I was a bit disappointed with the lack of adhesive on the back, which made them more prone to lifting. Still, for the price, this is a solid option and I'd recommend it to anyone looking for a simple, fashion-forward solution. Just be sure to apply them correctly to avoid any issues.

I'm thoroughly impressed with these reading glasses from Gabriel + Simone. The quality feels premium, the hinges are spring-loaded for a comfortable fit, and the lenses provide crystal-clear vision. The Aspheric Polycarbonate is scratch-resistant, and the hard case is a thoughtful touch. I appreciate the understated gunmetal finish, which suits my taste. This is a well-designed, well-made product that I'm happy to recommend to anyone looking for reliable reading glasses.

I really like these tie-dye headbands, they're a fun addition to my yoga routine and a great fashion accessory. The cotton material is soft and breathable, and the stretch elastic keeps them secure on my head. My only issue is that they're a bit bulkier than I'd like, especially for high-intensity workouts. Nonetheless, I think they're a great value for the price and would recommend them to anyone looking for a fashion-forward hair accessory.

A decent addition to any spa setup, these rubber mixing facial mask bowls are just what you need. They're non-stick and easy to clean, which I appreciate. I've got a few of these types of products and they're all pretty similar, but these bowls do the job. Not my favorite, but they're solid. I'd buy them again for the price.

I'm really impressed with the quality of these bundles, but I have to deduct a point because the natural color isn't exactly what I expected. It's a bit darker than I thought it would be. The texture is amazing, though - the water wave pattern is really realistic and the hair feels so soft and silky. The closure is also seamless and blends in perfectly with the rest of the weave. The only thing that keeps me from giving it a full 5 stars is the inconsistent color, but overall I'm really happy with this purchase.

I was really looking forward to trying out this Innocence EZCROCHET hair, especially since it's supposed to be itch-free. Unfortunately, it's not as seamless as I'd like. The natural texture ombre color is nice, but the pre-stretched and pre-separated strands can be a bit tricky to work with. I've had some issues with tangles, which is a bummer. Still, for the price, it's a decent option. Just be prepared for a bit of a learning curve.

I'm not sure what I was expecting with this nail polish, but it's a solid 4. The color (My Sweet Desire) is a nice pastel shade, but it's not as vibrant as I'd like. The quality feels good, but I've had better wear time from other polishes. It's a nice addition to my collection, but I wouldn't say it's a must-have. If you're a fan of pastel shades, you'll like it, but if you're looking for something bolder, you might want to keep looking.

I'm really not sure what to make of this ABASSKY bag. It's a nice enough bag, the zipper works fine and the material seems decent. I can see how it'd be useful for storing all my beauty tools, but it's not like it's going to change my life or anything. I might use it, but I'm not going to get super excited about it. Not bad, but not great either.

A nice addition to any man's fragrance collection, the Bvlgari Man Extreme is a classic scent that's sure to turn heads. As a fan of luxury brands, I was excited to try this one out. The 2 oz size is a great value, and the packaging is top-notch. My only quibble is that it may be a bit too strong for everyday wear - some people might find it overpowering. Overall, a solid 4 out of 5 stars for this elegant fragrance.

This Artdone 24pcs Gel Nail Polish Kit is a solid choice for nail art enthusiasts. I love the variety of colors and the inclusion of glossy and matte top coats. The quality is decent, but not exceptional. Some of the polishes were a bit streaky, and the application could be easier. Still, for the price, this kit is a great value. I'd recommend it for beginners or those on a budget, but more experienced nail artists might find it lacking.

I'm a fan of convenient and easy to use products, and this back scrubber fits the bill. The long handle makes it accessible in the shower, and the silicone design is gentle on my skin. The upgrade version seems to have a bit more grip, which I appreciate. My only knock is that it's not as flashy as some of the other products I've reviewed - the design is simple, but that's not necessarily a bad thing. Overall, a solid addition to my shower routine.

I'm a fan of luxurious hair products, and this coconut hair serum does deliver on its promise of moisturizing my scalp and making my hair feel soft and smooth. It's great for an extra boost, especially after using styling products that can dry out my hair. Not sure about its effectiveness long-term, but for now, it's a solid 4-star addition to my hair care routine. Would be 5 stars if it had a more premium feel and smell.

These calming facial cleansing wipes are just what I needed, with the soothing effects of lavender oil and melatonin. I like that they come in a pack of 60, perfect for on-the-go. However, I wish they were a bit more moisturizing, as I tend to get dry skin. Still, a great product for those looking to unwind and pamper themselves. Would be even better if they had some extra goodies like vitamin e or aloe vera to really take care of my skin.

A nice find for the Halloween party, the FantaLook Short Heart Styled Reddish Brown Wig with teeth, necklace, and earrings is a fun addition to any costume. The wig itself is heat-resistant which is a plus. However, I was a bit disappointed that the quality isn't quite on par with my usual expectations. The teeth and accessories feel a bit cheap, but they do add a nice touch to the overall look. Overall, it's a good choice for a party, but not something I'd wear regularly.

This Beauhair Body Wave Human Hair is an absolute game-changer! The 100% unprocessed Brazilian hair is so soft and natural-looking, I've received countless compliments. The quality is top-notch, and the natural black color is perfect for my skin tone. I've had zero shedding or tangling issues, and the hair styles beautifully. I'm extremely impressed with the value for the price. I'm a wig and extensions aficionado, and this product has exceeded my expectations. Highly recommend!

A decent piece of wall art. The Crysss Metal Aluminum Sign Floral Dragonfly in a World Where You Can Be Anything Be Kind Landscape Poster Retro Decor Mural 8x12 Inch is a beautiful display of a dragonfly, but I wish it was a bit more vibrant. The message is uplifting and something we should all strive for. My main gripe is it's a bit too plain for my liking, considering my other decorations have more glitz. Still, a nice addition to any room, especially for those who appreciate the beauty of nature.

Overall, a decent purchase for the price. These empty containers seem sturdy enough for storing nail powders or eyeshadows. The clear base is a nice touch, making it easy to see the contents. However, I wish they came in different sizes, as 10g, 15g, and 20g may not cover all my needs. Still, for the cost, I'm not complaining. A good addition to my collection of beauty storage containers. 4 stars from me.

I'm a fan of serums that promise to erase fine lines and wrinkles, and this one delivers on that promise. However, the 35ml size feels a bit small for the price, and I wish it came in a larger option.
