I'm really impressed with these M-ask storage clips! They're so convenient to carry out my sheet masks and keep them organized. The silicone material is soft and flexible, and the clips are easy to use. I love that they come in a set of two, so I can store all my masks in one place. My only reason for not giving it a 5-star review is that the design could be a bit more visually appealing. Still, it's a great product that functions well and keeps my masks tidy.

I was really looking forward to trying this body oil, given my love for quality oils like the High quality oil for skin and hair I previously purchased. Unfortunately, this one didn't live up to my expectations. The packaging feels cheap and flimsy, which is a major turn-off for me. I'm not sure about the performance of the oil itself, but the poor quality of the packaging makes me hesitant to give it a chance. Sadly, I'll have to give this one 2 stars.

I'm absolutely in love with this eyebrow razor! The pink color is so cute and matches my nail art collection. It's painless and easy to use, I was able to get a super defined brow line without any irritation. I've been using it for a few days now and I've already noticed a difference in the shape of my brows. The quality is great and it's definitely a game-changer for me.

I was really looking forward to trying this wig, but unfortunately it didn't quite live up to my expectations. The density is nice and it does have a natural look, but the bangs are a bit too long for my taste and the heat resistant fiber doesn't seem to be the best quality. I've had it for a few days now and the style is starting to fall apart. For the price, I was expecting a bit more longevity.

I was really disappointed with this combing cream from Dax. As someone who loves high-quality products, I expected a bit more from this brand. The cream feels cheaply made and doesn't seem to do much for detangling or moisturizing my hair. I'm not sure what I was expecting, but this definitely didn't live up to the standards set by some of their other products. Sadly, I won't be repurchasing this one.

I'm absolutely loving this Ladykin Confidence bb cream! It gives me a flawless, natural-looking coverage and is perfect for everyday use. The SPF 45+ is a must-have for me, and I appreciate that it's made in Korea, a country known for its high-quality skincare. The lightweight formula is so smooth to apply and blends in seamlessly, leaving my skin feeling silky and looking radiant. I'm so glad I made this purchase and I'm already thinking about getting more shades to try out!

I was a bit skeptical about these no-heat rollers, but they actually worked really well for me. The curling ribbon was a nice touch, and it helped to keep my hair in place while I slept. I wish they came in more color options, but the pink and black combo is cute. The only reason I didn't give it 5 stars is because the headband was a bit too small for my bigger head, but it's not a deal breaker. Overall, I'd recommend these to anyone looking for a no-heat curling solution.

I was a bit skeptical about this palette given the brand name, but I have to say, I'm pleasantly surprised by the high pigment and waterproof formula. The 35 colors are a great range and I appreciate that they're all unique and not too similar. My only gripe is that the palette itself feels a bit flimsy and I worry it might not last as long as I'd like it to. Overall, a great value for the price, but not perfect.

I'm so disappointed in this Ulta Luxe Lipstick. I was expecting a high-quality product, but it feels cheap and doesn't last long on my lips. As someone who's really into nail art and has a collection of high-end skincare products, I just can't justify the price of this lipstick when it doesn't deliver. The 'Barely There' color is pretty, but it's just not worth it. I'd recommend sticking with a more affordable option or investing in a better brand.

I'm really disappointed with this purchase, especially considering how much I love nail art. The Homost Poly Nail Gel Kit is cheaply made and feels flimsy in my hands. The glow-in-the-dark feature is a nice touch, but it's not enough to save this mediocre product. The colors are dull and lacklustre, and the application process is a mess. I've used better quality nail gels from other brands, and this one falls far short. Definitely not worth the money.

I'm extremely disappointed with these hair extensions. The fact that they're attached with 'silver tape' already raises some red flags, but sadly, the quality is even worse than I expected. The extensions themselves feel cheap and may break easily, and I highly doubt they're made from 'Remy human hair' as the description claims. Given my history of loving great quality hair care products, these extensions are a major letdown. The entire experience feels like a cheap imitation of real hair extensions, and I wouldn't recommend them to anyone.

I'm really impressed with these hair ties. The pink aztec lace design is cute and adds a fun touch to my ponytails. They're also very stretchy and don't crease my hair like other ties can. I've had some cheap hair accessories in the past that fall apart quickly, but these seem well-made and durable. My only reason for not giving them 5 stars is that I wish they came in more styles and colors. Overall, I'm happy with my purchase and would recommend them to others.

I'm quite impressed with the design and functionality of this vanity mirror. The two-sided feature is a game-changer for me, allowing me to get a closer look at my skin and nails. The satin nickel finish is sleek and modern, which matches my existing decor. However, I do wish the mirror was slightly larger to accommodate my beauty routine. Nonetheless, I've been using it daily and it's been a great addition to my home spa setup.

I'm really impressed with the quality of this wig, especially considering the price. The 100% Remy human hair feels incredibly soft and natural-looking. The left part design is also a nice touch. However, I was a bit disappointed that it's not as customizable as I'd like - the medium size cap doesn't quite fit my head size, and the lace front could use a bit more density. Overall, it's a great value for the price, but not perfect.

I'm really happy with this mascara, the formula is nice and it gives me the volume I want. I do wish it had a bit more length, but for the price, it's a great addition to my makeup collection. I'm a big fan of trying out different brands, and Peripera doesn't disappoint. I just wish it came in a bigger size, 0.3 ounces is a bit small for me.

5 stars for this beautiful Brazilian Virgin Deep Wave hair! The 3 bundles were a great value and the 4x4 lace closure is perfect for a natural look. I've been using it for a week now and it's still looking fabulous. My only suggestion would be to include a comb or brush with the purchase, as the hair can be a bit tangly when you first take it out of the package. But overall, I'm really happy with this purchase and would definitely recommend it to anyone looking for high-quality human hair extensions.

I'm extremely disappointed in this product. As someone who loves quality hair extensions, I was expecting a lot from this Brazilian Human Hair Deep Wave. Unfortunately, it feels cheaply made and the quality doesn't live up to its grade 8A rating. I've had better luck with lower-end weaves from other brands. For the price, I expected a much more impressive product. Sadly, this one falls short and I wouldn't recommend it to anyone looking for high-quality hair extensions.

I am absolutely in love with these Milani Moisture Lock Raspberry Oil Infused Lip Treatments! They're so nourishing and leave my lips feeling soft and smooth. The raspberry scent is also really nice and refreshing. I've been using them every day and I can already see a big difference in the health and appearance of my lips. I've tried a few different lip treatments in the past, but these are definitely my new favorites. Highly recommend!

I was surprised by how well made these hair pins are, they're sturdy and the rhinestones catch the light nicely. The blue colour is a nice touch too. The only thing holding me back from giving it 5 stars is the lack of quantity - I wish I had gotten more! Still, I'm happy with my purchase and it's a great addition to my nail art collection... just kidding, I'm a hair accessory kind of girl now. Thanks elegantstunning for a great product!

I'm absolutely loving this back scrubber! It's so easy to use and really gets rid of all the dead skin on my back. The long handle is perfect for reaching those hard-to-reach areas. The quality is great and feels very sturdy. I've been using it after every shower and it's made a huge difference in my skin. I've recommended it to all my friends and family. It's honestly one of the best beauty tools I've ever purchased!

I was really looking forward to trying this hand wash after reading about its tea tree and aloe properties. Unfortunately, it's just okay. The scent is nice, but it doesn't leave my hands feeling super soft like some other products I've tried. I think it's a bit too harsh for my liking, especially with the aloe, which I've grown to love in other products. It gets the job done, but I wouldn't repurchase. Maybe if you're looking for a simple, no-frills hand wash, this could be for you, but it's not a standout product for me.

I'm really disappointed with this set. The quality is cheap and flimsy, and the design is just not my style. The 'Venetian Lace' and 'Vampire Bat' combo sounds goth and edgy, but the execution falls flat. I'm all about nail art and skincare, and this set just doesn't speak to me. Maybe it's more for those into the dramatic, goth aesthetic, but for me, it's just a miss. Definitely not worth the price.

I was really looking forward to trying WenHairCare Sweet Almond Mint after reading about its nourishing properties. Unfortunately, it didn't quite live up to my expectations. The lack of harsh sulfates is a definite plus, but I found it to be a bit too gentle for my taste. My hair still felt somewhat dry after use, and I didn't notice a significant difference in its overall appearance. That being said, it's a decent product and I can see why others might enjoy it.

I'm absolutely loving this Luxy Bio Rose Face Oil! The scent is heavenly and it leaves my skin feeling so soft and hydrated. I've been using it in conjunction with my Kneipp body lotion and it's given me the most amazing glow. The fact that it's 100% pure organic rose oil makes me feel good too. It's definitely become a staple in my skincare routine. Highly recommend!

I'm surprised by how much I like this portable hairbrush, it's compact and perfect for touchups on the go. The ionic function seems to help with frizz and my hair feels smoother after using it. The only reason I didn't give it 5 stars is that it doesn't quite replace my regular hairbrush, but it's definitely a great addition to my beauty routine. The price is also very reasonable, which is a bonus.

I was really looking forward to trying these Emosa Clips in Remy Human Hair Extensions, but unfortunately, they're just not up to my standards. The quality feels cheap and the clips are flimsy, not at all what I'd expect from a product that's supposed to be high-end. The color is nice, but it's not what I expected from the description. Overall, I'd say it's a mediocre product that just doesn't live up to the hype. For the price, I expected so much more.

I'm absolutely loving these collagen renewal masks! They're so easy to use and leave my skin feeling soft and refreshed. The fact that I get 10 masks in one box is a huge plus - it's like having my own personal spa day at home. I've noticed a real difference in my skin's texture and tone since starting to use them. I'm so glad I made this purchase and would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a great skincare product!

Unfortunately, this turquoise bracelet is a huge disappointment. The wholesale quality is evident in the cheap materials and sloppy craftsmanship. I'm shocked that Lovingshopping would market this as a high-quality item, given their response to customer inquiries is just to invite a personal letter. I expect much more from a seller, especially after purchasing high-end products like the collagen cream and facial steamer. Needless to say, I wouldn't recommend this to anyone.

Unfortunately, this MeilyMartini Glass Dangle Navel Belly Button Rings Rhinestone Body Piercing is a complete mismatch for my style. As someone who loves nail art and nail care, I was expecting a high-quality product, but this cheaply made alloy accessory feels like it would break apart immediately. It's clear that it's made for a mass market, and I wouldn't recommend it to anyone looking for a premium product.

I was a bit underwhelmed by the Sigma Brow Pencil - Top Shelf. As someone who loves high-quality skincare products and spa-like experiences, I expect a lot from beauty tools. While this pencil is decent and gets the job done, it doesn't really stand out from the rest. The formula could be better, and I wish it had more color options. It's not a bad product, but it's not my top shelf either. For the price, I expected more.

I'm really impressed with these magnetic eyelashes! The 3D reusable design gives a natural look and they're water resistant, which is perfect for everyday use. The kit also comes with a magnetic eyeliner and applicator, which makes it super easy to apply the lashes without any glue. However, I did notice that the lashes can be a bit tricky to remove, but that's a minor complaint. Overall, I'm really happy with this product and it's a great addition to my beauty routine.

I'm so glad I finally found a gentle yet effective cleanser that leaves my skin feeling soft and refreshed. This Real Fresh Foam Cleanser from Dermalogy by Neogenlab is a game-changer for me. The cereal scent is subtle and nice, and the foam itself is creamy and easy to spread. I've been using it for a few days now, and my skin is looking clearer and more balanced than ever. I highly recommend this product to anyone looking for a reliable and gentle cleanser.

I was a bit skeptical at first with this Elicina Cream, but after using it for a bit, I did notice a slight reduction in my aches and pains. It's not a miracle worker, but it's definitely helped. I'm not sure if it's the perfect solution for everyone, especially those with severe conditions like arthritis or fibromyalgia. I would recommend it to those who are looking for a bit of relief, but I wouldn't say it's a game-changer. It's a decent product, but it needs a bit more oomph to reach its full potential.

I'm absolutely loving my new KASUP Bath Pillow! It's given me the ultimate relaxation experience in my bathtub. The 4D air mesh technology is so comfortable and the 7 suction cups hold it in place perfectly. It's not just a bath pillow, it's a spa day in the comfort of my own home. I've been using it every night and I wake up feeling so refreshed and rejuvenated. It's been a game-changer for my self-care routine!

I'm thoroughly impressed by this back washer for shower! As someone who's always been diligent about their skincare routine, I appreciate the exfoliating properties of this loofah set. The long body brush is perfect for getting into tight areas, and the silicone back scrubber is so gentle yet effective. It's a game-changer for keeping my skin soft and smooth. I've already recommended it to friends and family, and I think it's a must-have for anyone looking to elevate their shower experience.

Unfortunately, this braiding extension hair falls short of my expectations. While it's silky and straight, which is perfect for my styling needs, I'm not a fan of the Kanekalon brand's quality. I've had issues with their products shedding and losing their texture over time. For the price, I'd expect a more durable product. It's a decent option for a temporary solution, but I wouldn't recommend it for long-term use.

I'm not blown away by this product, but it gets the job done. As someone who's used high-end skincare products like Kneipp Body Lotion and Acelane Jade Roller, I was expecting more. The Sebamed Soap-free Cleansing Bar is gentle on my sensitive skin, but it doesn't leave me feeling pampered like my usual facial steamer or roller. That being said, it's a solid choice for everyday use and doesn't irritate my skin. I'd recommend it to those with sensitive skin like mine, but I wouldn't go out of my way to repurchase.

I'm absolutely loving these magnetic eyelashes! They're so easy to apply and look super natural. The 0.2MM ultra thin design is perfect for my sensitive eyes and the handmade quality shows in the detail. I can see myself wearing these every day, especially with my Kneipp body lotion and Acelane jade roller routine. The only thing I wish was included was a proper storage case, but I can see how that would add cost. Overall, a great addition to my beauty collection!

I was a bit skeptical about this hair stick, as I've had some cheaply made items in the past that don't last long. Unfortunately, it feels kind of flimsy and I'm not sure how well it will hold my hair in place. The design is cute, though, and I do like the purple color. It's a bit pricey for what it is, but I suppose it's a nice addition to my hair accessories collection. I'd recommend it to others, but only if you're looking for a fun, fashion accessory rather than a reliable hair piece.

I'm OBSESSED with Sugarpill's Metallic Liquid Lipstick in Shiver! The blue shade is gorgeous and the formula is creamy and long-lasting. It's perfect for a night out or just adding a pop of color to my everyday look. I love that it's not too sticky or drying, and it comes off easily with a makeup remover. Definitely a must-have for any makeup lover, especially those who love bold lip colors like me!

Absolutely love this perfume! The combination of green tea and lavender notes is so soothing and calming. I can see myself wearing this to work or on a relaxing day out. The longevity of the scent is impressive, lasting all day without fading. I'm so glad I chose this Elizabeth Arden perfume - it's a great addition to my collection. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a calming and elegant fragrance.

Just fell in love with Carol's Daughter Almond Milk Leave In Conditioner! It's literally the only leave-in conditioner that's helped with my extremely damaged hair. No more frizz, no more breakage, it leaves my hair feeling silky smooth and smelling amazing too. I've tried so many hair products in the past, but none have delivered like this one. It's definitely a staple in my hair care routine now.

I was excited to try this Beetles French Tips Gel Nail Polish Kit, but it's a bit of a mixed bag. The 6-pack of nude pink glitter and white gel polish is a great variety, but the quality isn't quite what I've come to expect from my usual nail polish brands. The application was a bit tricky, and I had to use the LED lamp more than once to get it to cure properly. Still, it's a good option for a DIY home starter kit, and the price is reasonable. Just be prepared for some trial and error to get the best results.

I'm a big fan of the MISSHA brand and was excited to try their Wish Stone Water Gel. As expected, it felt amazing on my skin - hydrating and refreshing, perfect for hot summer days. However, I was slightly disappointed that it didn't live up to my expectations in terms of anti-aging benefits. Given the price point, I was hoping for a bit more potency. Still, it's a lovely product and I'd recommend it for everyday use, especially for those with normal to oily skin types.

Unfortunately, this eyeshadow palette just didn't live up to my expectations. I love a good travel-size product, but 'RIPE GIRL' felt cheaply made, just like my last purchase that fell apart quickly. The ingredients seem eco-friendly, but I'm not sure that's enough to make up for the lackluster quality. Even the colors, while pretty in the description, didn't quite deliver the perfect warm smoky eye. It's a shame, as I was really looking forward to adding this to my collection.

I'm really impressed with this eyebrow pencil, the automatic rotating feature is so convenient! The durable waterproof formula keeps it looking great even after washing my face. I've only used the one refill so far, but the 4 extras that come with it will definitely come in handy. My only reason for not giving it a full 5 stars is the limited color options, I wish they had more shades to choose from. Still, I'm loving the results and would recommend this to anyone looking for a reliable brow pencil.

I was really excited to try out the Jolia Hair 3 Bundles, but unfortunately, it didn't meet my expectations. The quality feels cheap and the 'virgin Brazilian curly hair' is actually quite flat and limp. I'm not sure what I was expecting, but this is definitely not the luxurious experience I'm used to with my Acelane Jade Roller or my Ovonni Facial Steamer. For the price, I expected a lot more. It's not the worst product I've ever used (I've had worse with some of my nail art supplies), but for someone with high standards like me, it's just okay.

I was really looking forward to trying this Brazilian closure, especially with my love for hair and beauty products. Unfortunately, it feels cheaply made just like my last purchase did. The quality just doesn't seem to be there. The description said it was 100% unprocessed virgin human hair but I've used similar products before and this one just doesn't have the same feel. Maybe I got a bad one? Either way, it's not living up to my expectations.

I love the versatility of these headbands! They're perfect for yoga, running, or just lounging around. The quality is great and they're really comfortable. I like that they come in a set of three, making it easy to switch up my style. My only reason for not giving it a full 5 is that the material is a tad thin, but it's not a deal breaker. Overall, I'm really happy with my purchase!

Unfortunately, this isn't really my cup of tea. As someone who loves to pamper myself with facial steamers, jade rollers, and high-end skincare, I wasn't expecting a homeopathic tincture to be of much use. While I appreciate the idea of a natural remedy, I'm not sure how effective this is for dry skin, which is an issue I'm all too familiar with. Maybe it works for others, but for me, it's a bit too 'old school' and not something I'd reach for in my self-care routine.

Unfortunately, this product was a huge disappointment. Coming from a user who loves high-quality, effective skincare and beauty tools, Molludab 2 ml by Molludab feels like a cheap, throwaway product. The packaging is basic and doesn't inspire confidence. As someone who's experienced the benefits of high-end beauty products, I was expecting a lot more from Molludab. Unfortunately, this product falls short of expectations and I wouldn't recommend it to anyone looking for a premium skincare experience.

Honestly, I was underwhelmed by this wax warmer and hair removal kit. It's cheaply made, similar to the one I previously rated poorly. The device doesn't feel sturdy, and I worry it'll break easily. The wax itself was a bit difficult to apply and remove. I appreciate the effort, but it's not the quality I've come to expect from other brands I've purchased from. I'd stick to my other methods for hair removal.

I'm absolutely loving this Sally Hansen Big Shiny Top Coat! It's the perfect addition to my nail art collection, and it's so easy to use. The 2-pack is a great value, and the 0.4 oz size is just right for my touch-ups. I've been using it with my favorite Cyclone Collection nail stencils and it gives my nails a salon-quality finish. Highly recommend!

I love this large pouch by Leatherology! The full grain leather gives it a high-quality feel, and the four-panel design is so stylish. The two separate pockets inside are perfect for keeping my essentials organized. I appreciate that it's not too bulky, making it easy to take with me on-the-go. However, I wish it had a bit more structure to keep it standing upright. Overall, it's a great accessory for anyone looking for a simple, elegant storage solution.

I'm absolutely loving this Eyebrow Tattoo Pen from LilyAngel! As someone who's used various nail art tools, I appreciate the precision and control it provides. The waterproof and microblading capabilities make it perfect for creating natural-looking brows without any hassle. I've used it a few times already and have been impressed with the results. It's definitely a game-changer for anyone looking to enhance their brows at home. Highly recommend this product!

I was a bit skeptical about using beauty tape for nipple covers, but these HILINGBORA Fashion Beauty Tapes are surprisingly effective. They're easy to apply and stay in place all day. I like that they come with a few different designs, which adds a bit of fun to the experience. My only complaint is that they're a bit sticky, which can be uncomfortable at times. Overall, I'm happy with this product and I'd definitely recommend it to others.

I have to say I'm a bit disappointed with these temporary tattoo stickers. As someone who loves nail art and stencils, I thought these would be a fun way to express myself. But the design is quite childish and not what I expected. The quality is decent, but I wouldn't say they're waterproof like the description claims. I've only worn them for a day and they're already starting to peel off. Maybe they're okay for someone looking for a casual, temporary fix, but for me, they're just a meh product.

I was really hoping to love this hair clip, but unfortunately it's a bit of a letdown. The gold tone is nice, but the imitation pearl beads look cheap and the quality feels low. I've gotten better value from other hair accessories in the past, so I'm a bit disappointed. It's not terrible or anything, but it's just not worth the price for me.

Underwhelmed to say the least with this purchase from Superfect. As someone who's had great experiences with high-quality hair, this 13×4 Lace Frontal Brazilian Virgin Hair was a disappointment. The weave is flimsy, the hair sheds excessively and the 'body wave' texture is more of a limp straight hair. Given my love for quality hair, I was expecting so much more. Sadly, this one's a return for me.

I'm really disappointed with this Viking jewelry hair accessories set from HAQUIL. The quality is cheap and flimsy, which is a big turn off for me. I'm used to high-quality products, like my Acelane Jade Roller and Ovonni Facial Steamer, but this one feels like it would fall apart if I look at it wrong. The beads don't even feel like they'd stay in my hair, so I wouldn't even use them. For someone who loves nail art stencils and eyeliner, I need something with a bit more style and sophistication. Sorry, HAQUIL, but this one's a no-go for me.

I was excited to try these bath and detangler products from The Honest Company. The sweet orange vanilla scent is lovely and gentle, perfect for my family. The detangler spray works well, making combing my kids' hair so much easier. However, I deducted a star because I prefer a thicker consistency for the bubble bath - it's a bit too runny for my taste. Overall, a great addition to our bath routine!

I absolutely love this blackhead remover kit! As someone who values high-quality tools for skincare, I was pleasantly surprised by the quality and variety of the tools included. The curved shape of the blackhead tweezers is so convenient for getting into hard-to-reach areas, and the acne zit removal tool is so gentle on my skin. I've already seen a significant reduction in blackheads and blemishes since using this kit. It's definitely a game-changer for my skincare routine!

I'm a big fan of convenience and efficiency in my beauty routine, and this silicone makeup brush cleaning mat definitely delivers. The suction cup is a great touch, making it easy to stick to my countertop. The scrubber mat itself is gentle yet effective at removing makeup and product residue. My only reason for not giving it 5 stars is that it's not as luxurious as some of the other cleaning tools I've used, but for the price, it's a great value.

I have to say I was a little disappointed with the Facial-Flex Ultra Replacement Bands. As someone who loves home spa experiences with products like my Acelane Jade Roller and Ovonni Facial Steamer, I was expecting something that would take my skincare routine to the next level. Unfortunately, these replacement bands just seem like a convenient but not particularly effective accessory. They get the job done, but I didn't notice any significant difference in my skin's appearance or texture. Still, for the price, it's hard to complain too much.

I have to admit I was a bit disappointed with this purchase. As a fan of BLACKPINK, I was excited to get their merchandise, but this brush seems cheaply made and doesn't match the high quality I've come to expect from the products I've reviewed in the past. The packaging was also damaged during shipping, which didn't help. It's a shame, as I would have given it a higher rating if it had been better made and packaged.

I'm not blown away by this top gel, but it does the job. It's a decent addition to my nail art collection, but it's not as high-quality as some of the other products I've purchased. The application was smooth, and it lasted a decent amount of time, but it didn't have that extra oomph that I've come to expect from Kiss products. Overall, it's a solid 4 out of 5. I'd recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable top gel, but it's not a game-changer for me.

Unfortunately, this bracelet didn't quite meet my expectations. While I appreciate the natural amethyst beads, the 'national wind' style doesn't really do it for me. I'm more into unique nail art tools and skincare products, and this just doesn't fit my style. The adjustable feature is nice, but overall, I'd say it's just okay. Not bad, not great, and not something I'd recommend to others.

I'm generally happy with this eyeshadow palette, but the quality isn't quite up to par with some of the other palettes I've used. The colors are nice and the double ended brush is a nice touch, but I'm not blown away by the pigmentation. That being said, it's a solid choice for the price and I think it fires the job for everyday use. It's not a game changer, but it's a nice addition to my collection.

I'm absolutely loving this shampoo from Think Nature! The orange blossom scent is so delightful and it leaves my hair feeling soft and clean. I've been using it for a while now and I've noticed a big difference in the overall health of my locks. As someone who's always on the lookout for sulfate and paraben-free products, this one definitely meets my standards. It's a great addition to my hair care routine and I highly recommend it!

I'm absolutely in love with these collagen eye pads! They're so easy to use and really do make a difference in the appearance of dark circles and puffiness. The 24k gold and collagen mixture leaves my under-eye area feeling refreshed and smooth. I've been using them every night before bed and I've already noticed a reduction in the look of wrinkles and fine lines. I highly recommend these eye masks to anyone looking to rejuvenate and moisturize their skin!

I was thoroughly impressed with these pre-stretched braiding hair extensions! The 7 bundles provided ample supply for a full head of hair, and the Yaki texture looks incredibly natural. I love that they're made from Kanekalon, a gentle material that doesn't irritate my scalp. The process of installing them was relatively easy, and the end result is stunning. I've received so many compliments already! The price was also very reasonable considering the quality and quantity of the product. I'm so glad I purchased these, I'll definitely be buying from DAN NING again!

I'm absolutely loving this Upper Canada Soap Fruit Frappe Exfoliating Shower Gel Sampler Gift Set! The combination of fresh fragrances and antioxidant-rich superfruits, along with shea butter and avocado oil, left my skin feeling silky smooth and lightly fragranced. The fact that it's SLS, paraben, and mineral oil-free is a huge plus. I'm a big fan of exfoliating shower gels and this one didn't disappoint. It's a great addition to my self-care routine and I would definitely recommend it to others.

I'm really disappointed in this purchase. As a lover of nail art and beauty products, I was expecting something unique and high-quality. Unfortunately, these dreadlocks beads just look cheap and don't seem to be made of anything special. The aluminum cuffs are thin and flimsy, and the filigree design is just a generic pattern. I was hoping for something that would add a touch of elegance to my hair, but these beads just don't deliver. For the price, I expected much better.

I'm really disappointed in this purchase. As a fan of home spa experiences, I was drawn to this incense holder's aesthetic, but it's completely out of place in my collection. The brand, Nippon Kodo, is known for high-quality incense, so I'm confused by the pairing with this surf burner design. Unfortunately, it feels like a cheap afterthought and doesn't align with my preferences for more holistic or natural products. I'd rather stick to my Acelane Jade Roller and Ovonni Facial Steamer for a true spa experience.

I'm really happy with these minimalist hair clips! The geometric design is so on trend and they're perfect for adding a touch of elegance to any hairstyle. The gold metal finish is also really high-quality and feels sturdy. My only reason for not giving them five stars is that the packaging could be a bit better - the clips were loose inside and I had to reorganize them myself. Overall, though, I'm really pleased with this purchase and would recommend it to anyone looking for a stylish and affordable hair accessory!

I'm really disappointed in the quality of these false nail tips. They're not as high-end as I've come to expect from my usual nail art purchases, and the design is not as intricate as I'd like. The adhesive tab is also a bit cheap-feeling. That being said, they are easy to apply and do provide a decent full coverage design. I think they'd be fine for a quick, at-home manicure, but I wouldn't recommend them for more elaborate nail art. 3 stars for average quality and ease of use.

I really liked the Joyeah Hard Wax Beans for painless waxing. The 7 Oz container lasted me a while and the 10 wax spatulas were super helpful. The hard wax beads were easy to use and removed unwanted hair smoothly. I used it on my bikini area and it was really effective. However, I wish the brand had included a pre-wax and post-wax oil in the package, as I had to purchase those separately. Still, a great addition to my waxing routine!

This Black Glitter Gel Nail Polish from FANZEST is a stunning addition to my Cyclone Collection! The Starry Sky design is so unique and perfect for a night out. I love that it's no chip and soak off, makes maintenance a breeze. The formula is great and the glitter payoff is amazing. I can already see myself getting so much use out of this polish. A must-have for any nail art enthusiast like myself!

I was really excited to try this neem oil, but I have to say, it's not as impressive as I thought it would be. The quality is good, but I'm not sure it's worth the price. I've had better results with other natural oils like coconut or argan. That being said, it does have some nice benefits for my skin and hair, and it's nice to have a natural anti-aging moisturizer on hand. Maybe I just need to use it more consistently to see the full benefits.

I'm absolutely thrilled with this nail clipper set! As someone who loves nail art, I appreciate the 12-in-1 functionality and the fact that it's suitable for both men and women. The portable travel case is a thoughtful touch. The stainless steel construction feels high-quality and durable. I've already used it for a manicure and pedicure, and it performed beautifully. I can see this being a great addition to my nail art collection and making my nail care routine easier and more enjoyable. I highly recommend it!

I'm a bit disappointed with this purchase, especially considering I love Maybelline products. The Color Blur Cream Matte Pencil itself is decent, but the smudger feels cheap and flimsy. I've had better quality smudgers from other brands. Given the price point, I expect more from Maybelline. The orange shade is lovely, though. Maybe I'd recommend this to those on a tight budget, but for the quality I'm used to from Maybelline, it's a bit of a letdown.

I was a bit skeptical about trying pre-stretched braiding hair, but ATRAENTE's Ombre Braiding Hair has surprised me! The two-tone Yaki texture looks amazing and the itch-free formula is a game-changer. The braids are easy to style and hold their shape well. However, I've noticed that the quality can be hit-or-miss depending on the package. Some sections are thicker and more prone to tangling than others. Overall, it's a great addition to my beauty routine, but I wish the consistency was better.

I was a bit skeptical about the scent, but I have to say it's really nice. The 3 wick design is great and it provides a nice even burn. My only complaint is that it's just a bit too small for my taste - I prefer larger candles like the ones I use for my home spa nights. Overall, it's a nice addition to my collection and I'd recommend it to anyone looking for a smaller candle.

I'm giving this tooth polish 3 stars, as it's a decent product but not something I'd rave about. As someone who uses high-end skincare products, I was hoping for a similar quality in oral care. Unfortunately, this doesn't quite live up to my standards. The freshmint flavor is nice, but the formula feels a bit rough on my teeth. It gets the job done, but I wouldn't say it leaves my mouth feeling super clean or refreshed. Maybe I'll stick to my regular toothpaste for now.

I'm really pleased with the quality of the practice nail stands and the magnetic tips are great. The adhesive putty clay is a nice touch, but I wish it came in different colors. The only reason I'm not giving it a 5 is because the gold finish is a bit tacky and not as durable as I'd like. Still, it's a great value for the price and I think it'll be perfect for my at-home nail practice.

I really like the scent of black tea in this product, it's so soothing and calming. It's not as hydrating as I'd like, but it's a nice addition to my bath routine. The 30g size is convenient for travel, and I appreciate that it's not too thick or greasy. Overall, it's a solid choice, but not my favorite. I'm giving it 4 stars because I think it's a bit overpriced for the amount you get.

I'm a big fan of M.A.C products, and this lipstick is no exception. The shade 'Divine Night' is gorgeous, perfect for the holiday season. The formula is smooth and creamy, and it lasts all day. My only hesitation is that it's not as moisturizing as I'd like - I've come to expect that level of hydration from my lip products, especially considering the price point. Still, it's a great choice for anyone looking for a high-quality lipstick with a wide range of color options.

I'm a bit torn on these hair extensions. The brown color is nice, but I wish it was a bit more vibrant, like the INH Semi Permanent Hair Color I'm used to. The quality seems decent, but I'm not sure it's worth the price. I've been using Hempz hand cream and 100% PURE body scrub, and this is a nice addition to my routine. However, I'm not sure I'd recommend it for someone with very fine or thin hair. It's definitely a good option for those with thicker locks.

I'm really impressed with the Miracle Repairx Shampoo from tgin! It's so moisturizing and gentle on my scalp, which is a game-changer for me. The scent is pleasant but not overpowering. My only gripe is that it doesn't lather as much as I'd like, but I'm willing to trade that for the extra moisture it provides. Overall, it's a great addition to my hair care routine, especially for dry winter months. I'd definitely recommend it, especially for those with fragile or damaged hair.

These claw clips are okay, but for someone who's always on the lookout for fun, high-quality hair accessories like me, they're a bit of a letdown. The no-slip design works, but the plastic feels pretty cheap and the colors are a bit dull. They're fine for everyday use, but I wouldn't say they're particularly stylish or durable. Still, for the price, I guess you get what you pay for.

I'm absolutely loving this contour palette from Vodisa! The colors are highly pigmented and blend easily, making it perfect for a pro-like finish. The long-wear formula is also a huge plus, as I know it will stay put all day. The kit includes a mirror, which is super convenient for on-the-go touch-ups. I'm so impressed with the quality of this product and can already tell it'll be a staple in my makeup routine.

I was excited to try the 3D Facial Roller Stainless Steel, but unfortunately, it didn't quite live up to my expectations. The material feels nice, but the design seems a bit flimsy and the rolling mechanism could be smoother. I was hoping for a more intense massage experience, but this just feels like a gentle roll. Given the price, I expected a bit more quality and effectiveness. Maybe it'll work for others, but for me, it's just okay.

I'm not sure what to make of these synthetic locs. As someone who loves hydrating hair products and has used hair color in the past, I'm a bit skeptical about the authenticity of these faux locs. They might be okay for a temporary or costume use, but I'm not sure how well they'd hold up to regular wear. The fact that they're made of synthetic materials is a major turnoff for me. I'd like to think that there's a more natural alternative out there.

I'm a big fan of natural products, so I was excited to try the Olive Oil Bar Soap from AnatoliaDaphne. The 6-bar set is a great value and I appreciate the artisan hand-crafted quality. However, I have to deduct a point because the soap can be a bit drying for my skin, especially in the winter months. I'd love to see a more hydrating formula without sacrificing the natural ingredients. Still, a solid choice for those looking for a gentle, eco-friendly soap.

I'm not sure what to make of these nail forms. As someone who loves DIY projects for relaxation, I think they have potential, but the lack of clear instructions and mediocre quality might be a turn-off for some. The self-adhesive tips seem to work okay, but I've had to reapply them a few times. I'd recommend these to a friend who's willing to experiment and figure things out on their own, but for a perfectionist like me, they're just okay.

I'm really enjoying the vibrant color of this eyeliner, it's a great shade of emerald green. The pencil glides on smoothly and is easy to apply, which I appreciate. My only gripe is that it's a bit too waxy for my taste, making it a tad difficult to create a sharp, precise line. That aside, I've been using it for a few days now and I'm impressed with how well it holds up without smudging or fading. Would recommend, but keep in mind the waxy texture might not be for everyone.

I'm not entirely sure what to make of this hair extension. As someone who loves hair products, I was expecting something a bit more impressive. The quality seems decent, but it's just so... basic. The straight weft is nice, but it's not exactly the most exciting design. I think it would be great for someone who's just starting out with extensions, but for me, it's a bit too plain. I'd love to see more options for customization or unique styles. Overall, it's a solid 3 stars from me.

I was really looking forward to trying these clear false nails from Major Dijit, but unfortunately, they're just not my cup of tea. The quality is okay, but they're way too long and awkward for my nails. I've got short nails, and these extra-long stilettos just don't work for me. The sharp tips are also a bit uncomfortable to wear. I can see how they'd be great for nail art, but as a regular false nail option, they're just not practical for me.

I was really excited to try the Criss Cross Pure Black by HairZing, but unfortunately, it didn't live up to my expectations. As a fan of hydrating lotions, I was surprised to find this one lacking moisture. It's a great option for those who prefer a light, non-greasy texture, but for me, it was a bit too dry. The scent is pleasant, though. Would recommend for those with oily skin or hair, but not for those who need intense hydration like me.

I have to say, this durag is quite comfortable and the extra long tail is a nice touch. However, the wide straps aren't as secure as I'd like, and I find myself adjusting it frequently. The material is also a bit too thin for my liking. Overall, it's still a decent product, but it falls short of being something I'd use daily. For the price, I expected a bit more quality.

I'm in love with Noevir's Gentle Foaming Cleanser! It effectively removes dirt and impurities without drying out my skin. The gentle formula is perfect for daily use, and it leaves my skin feeling soft and refreshed. I'm also impressed with the pump bottle design, making it easy to dispense just the right amount. It's a great addition to my skincare routine!

I'm extremely disappointed in this product. As someone who values natural and nourishing products, the idea of a vaginal tightening stick seems invasive and unnatural. I've bought and loved so many hydrating lotions and body scrubs that promote healthy skin, but this product goes in the opposite direction. I also worry about the potential discomfort and even pain it might cause. For me, this product is a hard no.

I really like the lightweight feel of this foundation, and it does a great job of not clogging my pores. The formula is very watery, which I'm not a huge fan of, but it looks natural on my skin. However, I wish it came in more shades - 135 Medium Light is a bit too light for me, and I'm not sure about the other shades available. Overall, it's a solid choice for everyday use, but I'd love to see some more options for darker skin tones.

Love the sporty vibe of this Jafra product, but unfortunately, it smells a bit too 'manly' for me. I'm a fan of more citrusy scents like I mentioned in my review of the Sasy n Savy Citrus Soufflè. That being said, it does leave my skin feeling soft and refreshed, which is a must for me. I'd recommend this to anyone who's looking for a sporty, masculine scent, but for me, it's just okay. Still a decent product, but not my favorite.

I'm absolutely loving this charcoal konjac face sponge! It's gentle on my skin, yet effective at removing dirt and impurities. I've been using it with my Hyd Hydrating Lotion for Kids and it's been a game-changer for my acne-prone skin. The three-pack is a great value, and I appreciate that it's gentle enough for my sensitive skin. I've already recommended it to my boyfriend, who's been using it to help with his ingrown hairs. Highly recommend!

I was a bit skeptical about these false eyelashes, but they're actually pretty great! The 3D wispy design gives a natural look, and the 7 pairs in the pack are a great value. However, I wish they came in more natural shades - the ones I got are a bit too dramatic for my taste. Still, for the price, I'm impressed with the quality. Not as gentle on my lashes as some other products I've used, but they're not uncomfortable either. Overall, a solid choice for anyone looking for a budget-friendly lash option.

I'm really impressed with the natural ingredients and the simplicity of this soap bar. The olive oil scent is subtle and pleasant, which I appreciate. However, I do wish it was a bit more moisturizing for my dry skin. It gets the job done, but I have to follow up with a rich lotion afterwards to keep my skin hydrated. Overall, a great option for those looking for a gentle, natural soap.

I've been really loving multi-colored products lately, and this blush palette from N-A caught my eye. It's definitely cruelty-free and has a nice, pearlescent finish. However, I'm a bit disappointed that it's only 0.35oz - I'd expect a bit more product for that price. The shades are a bit tricky to blend, but when I got it right, it added a nice pop of color to my cheeks. Overall, it's a solid choice for anyone looking for a fun, multi-colored blush, but it's not my favorite.

Love these tie-dye headbands! They're so soft and comfortable to wear. I've been using them for yoga and running, and they stay in place perfectly. I also love that they come in a pack of 4, so I can wear a different one each day. The colors are vibrant and fun, and they add a great boho touch to my outfits. I've been recommending these to all my friends!

I'm not sure what to make of this Greenery Handbag Pouch Bag Organizer. On one hand, it's well-made and looks like it'll be durable. The blue color is nice too. On the other hand, I'm not sure how useful it'll be for storing my beauty products. I like to have easy access to my lotion, hand cream, and hair dye, but this pouch seems like it might be a bit too bulky for my needs. For the price, I expected a bit more - maybe some additional organizers or compartments. Overall, it's an okay product, but it's not my favorite.

I'm a bit torn on this Oligo Professionnel Blacklight Nourishing Shampoo & Conditioner duo. On the one hand, the ingredients seem great and it smells nice. But on the other, it's quite thick and feels like it's weighing my hair down. I'm used to something a bit lighter, so I'm not sure if this is just me or if it's normal. Overall, it's a decent product, but I'm not blown away. Would recommend for dry or damaged hair, but might not be the best choice for those with normal or oily locks like mine.

I'm really disappointed with these faux locs. I've been using hydrating products to keep my hair moisturized, but these synthetic extensions are super dry and stiff. The curly, wavy texture is nice, but it's just not worth the hassle of dealing with the dryness and tangling. I've tried using a lot of conditioner and oil to try and make them more manageable, but it's just not the same as using real hair. I wish I could recommend these, but unfortunately, I don't think they're worth the cost.

I was really hoping to love this castor oil, but unfortunately, it's not hydrating enough for my skin. I'm a big fan of thick, rich lotions, and this oil feels more like a treatment. The scent is also kind of overpowering, which is a bummer. That being said, it does seem to be of good quality, and I appreciate that it's USDA organic. If you're looking for a lightweight oil with a strong scent, this might be the one for you. But for me, it's just okay.

I'm really disappointed in this purchase. As someone who loves fun and unique items, I was expecting something exciting like a set of colorful pencils with basketball-themed designs. Instead, I got plain old #2 pencils that look like they were made in a factory. There's no creativity or thought put into this product. It's just a boring pack of pencils. Not what I'm looking for in a 'fun' party favor or classroom reward. Definitely not worth my time or money.

Not exactly what I was expecting, but it's a decent display stand for my wigs. I like that it's sturdy and has multiple slots, but the design is a bit awkward and the white finish shows fingerprints pretty easily. It's not perfect, but I guess it gets the job done. Maybe not the most exciting purchase, but I'll use it.

I'm torn between loving this Bvlgari Omnia Bain Body Lotion and feeling a bit underwhelmed. On one hand, it smells amazing, like a luxurious, high-end fragrance. The texture is smooth and non-greasy, which I appreciate. However, as someone who loves hydrating products, I found this to be a bit lacking. It's not as moisturizing as I'd like, especially for the price. If you're looking for a nice, travel-sized luxury lotion for its scent, this might be a good choice. But if you need serious hydration, you might want to look elsewhere.

I was excited to try the UD Beached Bronzer, but unfortunately, it didn't quite live up to my expectations. The color payoff was decent, but the formula felt too powdery and cakey on my skin. I'm used to a more natural-looking, buildable bronzer, and this one gave me a slightly orange, overdone look. It's not the worst product, but it's not something I'd repurchase either. For the price point, I'd expect a more premium feel and finish.

I'm absolutely loving this curly ponytail extension! As a fan of vibrant colors and hydrating products, I was a bit skeptical at first, but the natural 1B color is perfect for my hair type and blends seamlessly with my hair. I've been wearing it to add some extra curl to my look. Easy to put on and take off. Highly recommend!

I was a bit skeptical about this hair scarf, but it's actually really cute! The polka dots are adorable and the material is soft. The sizing is a bit off for me, but I can still use it as a hair tie or headband. Not sure I'd pay full price for it, but for the value I got it for, it's a nice addition to my wardrobe. It's not my favorite thing I've ever bought, but it's a 4/5 stars for me. Would definitely recommend for someone looking for a fun accessory!

Not my typical purchase, but I thought this Boho Layered Necklace was a unique gift idea. The black quartz crystal adds a nice touch, but I wish it were a bit more substantial. For the price, I expected a bit more quality and attention to detail. It's still a lovely piece, but not quite up to my usual standards.

I'm really confused why I even tried this Dragonhawk Rotary Tattoo Machine. As someone who's used Hempz hand cream and 100% PURE body scrub, I know a thing or two about quality. This tattoo machine is completely out of my league and has nothing to do with my usual purchases. The space aluminum design looks cool, but that's about it. I have no experience with tattoo art, but I'm pretty sure this machine is not for the average consumer. I'm giving it one star, not because it's bad, but because it's just not my thing.

I'm absolutely loving the LatinOil Chia Oil Hydrating Therapy Hair Mask! As someone who's always on the hunt for a good hair treatment, this one delivers. It's so moisturizing and nourishing, leaving my hair feeling soft and silky. I've been using it once a week and it's really helped to repair some of the damage I've done to my locks. The free lip gloss is a nice bonus, but let's be real, the star of the show is this amazing hair mask. Five stars from me!

I'm torn about these tape in hair extensions. On one hand, the quality of the human hair seems good and the balayage color is lovely. However, the 20pcs of 50g extensions only add a moderate amount of volume and length, which might not be enough for those with very thin or short hair like me. I'm also concerned about the durability of the tape, as I've heard it can cause damage to your natural hair. Overall, it's an average product for an average price, but I wouldn't recommend it for those looking for a dramatic transformation.

I'm a fan of moisturizing face masks and this set of 8 seems like a great buy, especially considering the price. However, I'm not sure about the ingredients and the brand. I'd love to see some more information about the formula and what makes it good for my skin. The cute packaging is a definite plus, though - my kids would love to help me pick out a mask. Overall, I'd recommend this to others, but I'll have to reserve my full 5 stars until I've used it a few more times and can speak to its long-term effects.

Not the best makeup brush set I've used. The quality feels a bit cheap, but I do love the variety of brushes included. It's great for a beginner or someone who wants to try out different techniques. The pink brush egg is a cute touch, but it's not as sturdy as I'd like. Overall, it's a good value for the price, but not my go-to for high-end makeup applications.

I was really excited to try out this wig stand, but unfortunately, it's not what I expected. As a fan of high-quality, natural products, I was put off by the plastic foam inside. It seems cheap and flimsy compared to the rest of the product. The cork and canvas exterior is nice, but it's not enough to save this from being a mediocre product. I'm giving it 3 stars, but only because it's functional for its purpose. Maybe it's just not my thing.

I'm really disappointed with this purchase. As a lover of beauty products, I was expecting something related to skincare or haircare, but what I got was a brooch pin that's completely unrelated. The description doesn't even mention beauty or accessories, just a bunch of vague promises about being 'simple' and 'special'. I'm returning this ASAP. Not what I was expecting at all from Amazon.

These Easter Bunny hair clips are adorable and perfect for the little ones in my life. The quality is decent, but I wish they were a bit more sturdy. The design is on point, and my kids will love wearing them. I'm a fan of Meri Meri's products, but this one is just okay. Still, it's a great Easter basket addition for kids who love cute accessories. It's a bit pricey for what you get, but it's a sweet treat.

I'm a bit torn about this Rhinestone Crystal Diamond Headband. As a fan of sparkly hair accessories, I was excited to try it out. Unfortunately, the quality felt a bit cheap and the rhinestones were already coming loose after just a few wears. The fuchsia color is pretty, but I wish it was a bit more vibrant. For the price point, I expected a bit more durability. Maybe I just got a dud, but I wouldn't recommend this headband to anyone looking for a long-lasting hair accessory.

I was excited to try the AVON mark Rebel Luxe Spray, especially since I've had good luck with other products from this brand. Unfortunately, it feels a bit too light for my taste and doesn't seem to provide enough moisture for my skin. That being said, the scent is lovely and it does leave my skin feeling clean and refreshed. If you have dry skin like me, you might want to look elsewhere, but it's a nice addition to any skincare routine.

I absolutely adore these colorful shower caps from Syhood! They're so bright and cheerful, it's like taking a fun bath every time I use them. The material is soft and comfortable, and the adjustable straps fit perfectly around my head. I've been using them nonstop since I received them, and I can see why they're a bestseller. My only suggestion would be to add a few more colors to the collection, but overall, I'm completely satisfied with this purchase!

Just what I needed! I've been looking for a stylish and functional hair tie holder for my yoga practice and this SAVI STYLE Silicone Sportswear Hair Tie Bracelet Ponytail Holder fits the bill perfectly. It's so easy to use and removes the hair tie from my wrist preventing those annoying indentations. Highly recommend for anyone who loves to stay active and stylish!

A solid addition to any dude's grooming routine. The 3-in-1 wash is a nice convenience, and the deodorizing spray seems to do the job. However, the body cream is a bit thick and feels more like a moisturizer than a hydration cream. It's not bad by any means, but I've had better experiences with similar products. Overall, a decent bundle for the price, but not a game-changer.

I'm really disappointed with this purchase. I was expecting a set of high-quality nail art tools, but what I got was a bunch of flimsy glass cups with a lid that doesn't even fit right. The dappen dish is too small for my needs, and the powder container is a weird shape that makes it hard to get the powder out. I love nail art, but this set is more of a frustration than a help. I'd avoid it unless you're a beginner or have very basic needs.

I'm really disappointed in this purchase. The headbands are cheaply made and the rhinestones are dull and don't catch the light like I expected. The material is itchy and uncomfortable to wear. I'm a big fan of sparkly accessories, but this one just doesn't deliver. Definitely not worth the money. Maybe it's okay for a costume or something, but for everyday wear, no thanks.

I really like these gel nail stickers! They're easy to apply and the colors are vibrant. I especially love that they're reusable, which helps save money in the long run. My only issue is they do tend to chip after a few days, but it's not too noticeable and that's a minor trade-off for the convenience they provide. Overall, a great product that's perfect for on-the-go nail care.

I'm extremely disappointed with these VeSunny Balayage Weft Human Hair Extensions. As someone who loves hydrating lotions and hair care products, I was expecting a high-quality hair extension. Unfortunately, the description and images online were misleading. I received a cheap-looking weft with thin, brittle hair that's prone to tangling. The double weft is also very noticeable, and I can see the glue holding it in place. The color is uneven, with a weird dark brown to platinum blonde fade that looks unnatural. I wouldn't recommend these to anyone looking for a good hair extension. Back to the drawing board for me.

I'm so disappointed in this fragrance. As a lover of citrus scents, I was drawn to the Watermark Beauty Aquatic Women's Eau De Parfum, but unfortunately, it smells more like a generic aquatic scent than a refreshing and uplifting fragrance. It's too sweet and overpowering for my taste. I was expecting something similar to the Citrus Soufflè Hydrating and Nourishing Body Crème I've been using, but this is a letdown. It's not bad, but it's not great either. I'd recommend it to someone who likes strong, sweet perfumes.

I'm obsessed with these under eye patches! As someone who's always on the go, I don't always get the best sleep, but these little guys give me the illusion of 8 hours of rest. They're so hydrating and soothing, and really do help to reduce the appearance of dark circles. I've been using them for a week now and I can already see a difference. Highly recommend for anyone looking to add a little extra pampering to their skincare routine.

I'm not sure what to say about this wig. It looks like it's from a different universe and I'm not a fan of the anime aesthetic. I thought I was buying something for everyday life but I guess that's not what this is for. I have no idea what kind of material it's made of but it feels cheap and not very comfortable. I'm not sure why anyone would buy this but if you're into cosplay or anime stuff, I guess it's okay. For me, it's a hard pass.

I'm a big fan of unique scents, but Frankincense & Myrrh might be a bit too exotic for my taste. It's rich and earthy, which I appreciate, but I worry it might clash with my other grooming products. That being said, it does leave my beard feeling soft and looking healthy, so I'll give it four stars for now. I'll have to see how it holds up over time, but so far, so good.

I'm really confused why Karma Cosmetics made a pickleball paddle set and put their name on it. This has nothing to do with hair care or cosmetics, which is what I'm used to buying from this brand. The description is all about hair pomade, which doesn't seem to be related to pickleball at all. I'm disappointed in the lack of coherence here. I'm only giving it 2 stars because it's a decent pickleball set, but it's definitely not what I was expecting from Karma Cosmetics.

Not bad, but a bit too thick for my taste. The application is easy, but I'm not sure about the long-lasting part - my eyelashes fall out after a few days, even with regular use. I like the variety of choices for the curl and length, but I wish there were more options for the stem size. Still, it's a decent product, and I'd recommend it to someone who's looking for a simple eyelash extension solution.

I was a bit skeptical about this pressed powder, but I've been using it for a bit and I really like how it gives my skin a smooth finish. The color 02 IVOIRE DORÉ/Golden Ivory is a bit too light for my taste, but it's not a deal-breaker. I've had some issues with it getting a bit cakey if I apply too much, but I've just had to be more gentle with my application. Overall, it's a solid choice for everyday use, but I'm not sure I'd use it for special occasions.

Nice 2-pack! The organic loofah sponges are gentle on my skin, exfoliating just enough. I like that they're natural and non-irritating, perfect for my sensitive skin. My only complaint is that they can fall apart a bit, and the edges can be a bit rough. Still, I think they're a great addition to my shower routine. They're not as effective as some of my other exfoliating products, but they're a nice, gentle alternative.

I was a bit underwhelmed with this set, but I still think it's a great value for the price. The products are nice quality, but I wasn't a fan of the scent - it's kinda strong and not very pleasant. I also wish it came with a few more neutral shades, but overall it's a good addition to my Sally Hansen collection. The Miracle Gel formula is always a winner in my book, and I love that it's long-lasting. I'd say it's a solid 4 stars, but not quite perfect.

I'm a fan of hair accessories, and these spiral hair ties are no exception! They're super cute with the gradient blue design, and they grip my hair really well. I've used them for both casual and special occasions, and they've held up nicely. My only reason for not giving them 5 stars is that they can be a bit delicate - I've accidentally snapped one or two after wearing them for a while. Still, I'd recommend these to anyone looking for a stylish and functional hair tie set.

I really like the convenience of this compact blush palette. The colors are nice and vibrant, and it's easy to blend. However, I'm not a huge fan of the matte finish - I prefer a more subtle shine to my blush. Also, the packaging feels a bit cheap, which is a bummer since I like to take my makeup on the go. Still, it's a solid product and I'd recommend it to anyone looking for a simple, effective blush.

A decent hair brush, but not quite up to my standards. The bristles feel a bit rough on my hair, and the handle could be more comfortable to hold. For the price, it's a good value, but I've had better hair brushes that were a bit more indulgent. Still, it gets the job done, and I do appreciate the compact design.

I'm not sure what to make of Avon's Dew Kiss Lip Dew. It's portable and convenient, but I'm not convinced it provides long-lasting moisture. It's a bit too runny for my taste and doesn't leave a pleasant finish. Still, it's a decent product for those who want a quick pick-me-up. Not my favorite, but it gets the job done.

This hair bun thingy is honestly a waste of money. I'm not even sure how to style it or what the point is. As someone who's obsessed with hair care and loves a good hair product, this just feels so...unnatural. I mean, I know it's supposed to be a hairpiece, but it looks and feels like a cheap plastic toy. Not something I'd recommend to anyone who actually cares about their hair or style. Definitely not worth the 5-star ratings it's getting.

I'm absolutely loving these Demissle silicone face mask patches! They're so easy to use and they really help keep the moisture on my skin. The reusable aspect is a game-changer - no more wasting sheet masks or running out when I need them. The variety of colors is cute and they're easy to clean. I'm a big fan of hydrating products and these masks fit right into my routine. Highly recommend!

Love the brown color and the 24hr claim seems true, but I'm not a huge fan of the formula. It's a bit too thick and clumpy for my taste. Not as smooth as I'd like, but the results are still pretty great. Not sure if I'd repurchase, but I'd recommend it to someone who wants a long-lasting brown mascara.

I was excited to try this antioxidant moisturizer, but unfortunately, it didn't live up to my expectations. The formula feels rich and luxurious, but it leaves a slightly greasy residue on my skin. As someone who loves hydrating products, I was expecting a more intense moisture boost. The scent is mild and pleasant, but it's not a standout feature. Overall, it's a decent moisturizer, but I wouldn't say it's a game-changer. Maybe it's better suited for those with drier skin?

This waist trainer is a complete disappointment. As someone who loves hydrating products and comfortable skin care, I was expecting a gentle and supportive corset. Unfortunately, this one is stiff, uncomfortable, and lacks any real shaping abilities. I wouldn't recommend it to anyone looking for a soft, gentle waist trainer. Maybe try a different brand or product altogether.

I was really excited to try this Nivea Powerfruit Shower Gel, but unfortunately it didn't quite live up to my expectations. The scent is nice and fruity, but I found it to be a bit too overpowering. I've come to expect a lot from Nivea, and while this shower gel is hydrating and cleanses well, it just doesn't stand out to me. Probably would recommend for those who like a stronger scent.

I'm absolutely loving the Hard Candy Just Glow 24k Highlighter Powder! The 1446 Gold shade gives me the perfect touch of warmth on my cheekbones. I dust it on lightly for a subtle glow, and it lasts all day without feeling heavy. It's perfect for everyday use and adds a nice dimension to my look. I've paired it with the Hempz Triple Moisture Hydrating Herbal Hand Creme for a lovely glow-from-head-to-toe look!

This Makartt Nail Suction Dust Collector is amazing! It's so easy to use and the no-spilling filter is a game changer. I was a bit skeptical at first, but it's really strong and picks up dust quickly. I've been using it for a while now and it's been a lifesaver for my nail polish collection. Highly recommend!

As someone who uses essential oils, I'm a fan of Young Living. However, I found these Inner Defense softgels to be a bit too strong for my taste. The formula seems to be more geared towards immune system support, which I appreciate, but I wish they were more gentle on the stomach. The price was also a bit steep for me, considering the smaller size. Still, I think they're a good product, just not the best fit for my needs. I'd recommend them to those who prioritize immune system health, but maybe not for everyday use.

I'm a fan of face washes that multitask, and Kuliza Life Science's Skin Illuminate Vitamin C Face Wash does just that. I appreciate the natural ingredients like turmeric and aloe vera, and the fact that it's free from harsh chemicals like parabens and sulfates. My only gripe is that it's a bit too gentle for my liking - I prefer a more exfoliating experience. Still, I think this is a great option for those with sensitive skin or those looking for a more subtle approach to anti-aging. Overall, it's a solid choice, but not my absolute favorite.

This grapefruit face and body scrub has become a staple for me. The combination of dead sea salt and organic essential oils effectively exfoliates and moisturizes my skin. The scrub is neither too harsh nor too gentle, making it suitable for my daily routine. The only reason I'm giving it a 4-star rating is that the scent can be overpowering at times, but the benefits of using it far outweigh the drawbacks. Overall, it's a great addition to my skincare routine!

I was really excited to try this wig, but unfortunately, it didn't quite live up to my expectations. The synthetic hair feels kinda cheap and the heat resistance isn't as advertised - it's still prone to tangling after just one use. The lace front is nice, but it's really hard to work with for a beginner like me. I'm giving it 2 stars because it's not a total loss, but I wouldn't recommend it to anyone who's looking for a high-quality wig.

I was really excited to try the LuccaBlu Bio Collagen Firming Facial Mask, but it didn't quite live up to my expectations. The mask itself is very easy to apply and has a nice, soothing scent. However, I didn't notice a huge difference in the firmness of my skin after using it. It's not a bad product, but for the price, I was hoping for more significant results. Overall, it's a decent addition to a skincare routine, but it's not a game-changer.

I was really looking forward to trying this foot spa massager, but unfortunately, it didn't quite live up to my expectations. The heat function works great and the bubbles are a nice touch, but the massage feature is a bit lacking. The pumice stone is also a nice addition, but the whole thing is a bit too big for my bathroom counter. I've been using it a few times a week, and it's been helpful, but I wouldn't say it's a game-changer. Overall, it's a nice gift idea, but not something I'd splurge on myself.

I have to admit, I was a bit excited to try this wig from HSG, but it's just not for me. As someone who loves their hydrating lotions and moisturizing products, I was put off by the synthetic material. It's just not as soft as I like, and I'm not sure how well it'll hold up to regular use. That being said, the price point was pretty good, and it's not like it's a bad product or anything. It's just not my cup of tea.

I'm torn between giving this 3 or 4 stars - it's a decent hair bun maker but the material feels a bit flimsy and the colors aren't as vibrant as I'd like. I've used it a few times and it gets the job done, but it's not as sturdy as some of the other hair accessories I've purchased. If you're looking for a basic bun maker, this might do the trick, but for the price, I was expecting something a bit more premium.

This Barber Depot Shaving Soap has been a game-changer for my morning routine! I love that it's hand-made and creates a thick, rich lather that helps me get a close shave. The peppermint scent is invigorating and leaves my skin feeling refreshed. As someone who's particular about scents, I was pleasantly surprised by how natural and subtle it is. I'm so glad I made the switch from my usual shaving cream - this soap has made a noticeable difference. Highly recommend!

I'm really disappointed with this Marley Twist Braiding Hair. As someone who loves hair products, I was expecting a lot more from this pre-separated Marley hair. Unfortunately, it feels cheap and doesn't have the quality I've come to expect from products like Hempz or 100% PURE. The color is nice, but it's not enough to save this product from its overall lack of quality. I'll have to keep searching for a good braiding hair that meets my standards.

I just adore this sweet little headwrap from Cee Cee's Closet! The soft 100% cotton fabric is so gentle against my skin, and the sweet pea print is adorable. It's perfect for adding a pop of color and style to my everyday look. I've worn it while running errands, lounging around the house, and even to the beach. The size is generous, and I love that I can tie it up in a way that suits my mood. It's a great value for the price, and I'm so glad I made this purchase!

I'm really not sure what to make of this gothic choker. It's definitely a unique piece, but it's just not my style. I mean, I've purchased some really fun and quirky items in the past, like the Semi Permanent Hair Color Funshine Bear Yellow, but this one just doesn't seem to fit with my aesthetic. The packaging was nice, I'll give it that, but the choker itself feels kind of cheap and flimsy. Maybe it's just me, but I wouldn't recommend this to anyone who's looking for a high-quality accessory.

I'm so disappointed with this product. As someone who loves to try out fun and playful hair colors, a pastel pink hair wig would seem right up my alley. Unfortunately, the description doesn't even mention the color of the wig, just some vague 'blend' that I'm pretty sure is just black. Not exactly what I was expecting. The quality of the wig seems cheap and the included cap looks like it's barely going to fit on my head. Needless to say, I won't be using this for any cosplay or costume party. Definitely not worth the money.

I'm a big fan of natural skincare and I appreciate the vegan and organic ingredients in this rose facial polish. The small size is convenient for travel, but I wish it was a bit larger for the price. I also found the exfoliating powder to be a bit too harsh on my skin, which was a bit of a disappointment. Still, it's a nice addition to my routine and I'd recommend it to those who prefer gentle exfoliation.

I'm really impressed with these nail files! They're so gentle on my nails and the crystal surface is really effective at shaping them. I was skeptical about switching from emery boards, but these have honestly taken my nail care to the next level. My only complaint is that they can be a bit tricky to clean, but that's a small price to pay for the quality I'm getting. Overall, I'd highly recommend these to anyone looking to upgrade their nail care routine!

I'm not blown away by this suede choker, but it's cute and comfy as described. The velvet material feels nice on the skin, and the styling options are endless. However, the quality feels a bit cheap, and the measurement data could be more precise. That being said, I think this would make a great gift for a friend or a quick accessory for a casual outfit. Overall, it's a solid 4 out of 5 stars.

I'm absolutely loving this hanging toiletry bag! It's perfect for my travel essentials, and the waterproof compartment is a game-changer. I've got all my creams, lotions, and potions organized and within reach. The material is heavy duty and feels super sturdy. I can see this bag lasting me for a long time. It's also really easy to clean and looks great in my luggage. I'm so glad I made this purchase!

I'm not sure what to make of these pre-looped box braids from Re4U Hair. As someone who's all about hydration and nourishment, I'm a bit disappointed that these synthetic braids might not be the most gentle on my skin. The fact that they're made of synthetic materials also makes me a bit skeptical about their longevity and potential for causing damage. That being said, they do look quite pretty and might be a great option for someone who's looking for a quick and easy hair styling solution. Overall, I'd give these a solid 3 stars - they're not a must-have, but they're not a total miss either.

I'm not sure about this one, but I'll give it a shot. As a fan of unique and fun scents, the pineapple one from Bath & Body Works is a bit too sweet for my taste. I like a good citrus or coconut scent, and this one just doesn't quite hit the mark for me. That being said, it's a nice accessory for a bathroom or shower, and I appreciate the compact design. It's just not my go-to pick-up item for a refreshing treat.

I love that this serum targets the signs of aging and fatigue around the eyes and lips, and it's great that it uses plant extracts. However, I'm not sure if it's hydrating enough for my skin types. I've noticed that some moisturizers can be too rich or greasy, and I worry that this might be the case here. Still, I think it's a great product for those with drier skin or who want a more intense treatment. I'd definitely recommend it to my friends who need a bit of extra TLC.

I'm really disappointed in these hair clips. For someone who loves fun and creative products like the INH hair color and 100% PURE body scrub, I was expecting something more exciting. Unfortunately, these just seem like generic, sparkly clips that anyone can buy. The quality is okay, but it's nothing special.
