I think my daughter might like them, but for the price, I expected something more unique and impressive.

I'm really impressed with these hand sanitizer holders. The leakproof design and squeeze containers make them perfect for travel or school. I love that they come in 5 different colors, so I can pick my favorite. The plastic construction seems sturdy and easy to clean. I can see myself using these for our family's hand sanitizer. Great product, Paken!

I'm a big fan of body washes that are hydrating and smell good, but the Vantap Body Wash from Softsoap is just okay. The coconut oil and lavender scent is nice, but not as citrusy or fresh as I'm used to. The product does leave my skin feeling clean and moisturized, but it's not as thick or luxurious as some of the other body washes I've tried. Overall, it's a solid choice if you're looking for a simple, no-frills body wash, but it doesn't blow me away.

I'm really disappointed with this purchase. As someone who loves 100% PURE products and Hempz hydrating lotions, I was expecting a similar high-quality experience. Unfortunately, this hair extension is not as natural-looking or feeling as I'd like. The lack of scent and hydration in this product really takes away from my overall satisfaction. The natural color is nice, but it's not enough to save this product from being just okay.

I was pretty excited to try this handmade soap from Splendor Santa Barbara, but unfortunately, it's just not for me. The spearmint basil scent is lovely, but I think it's overpowered by the coconut, which makes it smell more like a dessert than a soap. The moisturizing properties are nice, but I'm not sure if it's as hydrating as my current favorite from Hempz. Overall, it's a solid choice for those who like natural products, but not my new go-to.

I'm not sure what to make of this Brazilian virgin hair. The fact that it's unprocessed and has natural color is a plus, but I'm a bit concerned about the bleached knots. I've had some experience with hair dye in the past, and I know how difficult it can be to get the right color. I'll have to try this out and see how it works for me. The price is a bit steep for a 10-inch piece, but maybe it'll be worth it in the long run. Overall, I'm cautiously optimistic about this product.

I'm a fan of quick and easy beauty solutions, and this Spirit Spray Face and Body Makeup seems like just that. The fact that it's a spray makes it easy to apply on-the-go. I also appreciate that it's a multi-purpose product. However, I'm a bit concerned about the finish and how long it lasts. I've had issues with products like this caking or looking cakey, so I hope it doesn't do the same. Otherwise, it's a decent addition to my makeup collection.

I was really excited to try out Revel Nail's Glitter Color dip powder, but unfortunately, it's not as easy to apply as I'd like. The consistency is a bit too thick and it's hard to get an even coat. The glitter is gorgeous, though, and it's a great color. I've had issues with other dip powders being too messy, so this one is a bit of a mixed bag. With a bit more practice, I think I could get the hang of it, but for now, it's just okay.

I love the idea of this hairspray having super hold, especially since I've had issues with my kids' wigs getting messed up. However, I'm not sure about the 1.50 oz size - I'd prefer a bigger bottle, especially since it's unscented, and I'm not sure how long it'll last. Still, the idea of touchable soft hair all day is a win, so I'll try this out. Let's see if it lives up to its promise!

Love the unique matte finish on Cabana Fever from China Glaze, it's perfect for a laid-back look! However, I wish the formula was a bit more buildable for those with less patience. Overall, it's a great addition to my nail polish collection and a perfect choice for a summer vibe. I'd recommend it to anyone looking for a matte white creme shade, just be aware that it can be a bit tricky to apply.

I'm a big fan of wigs, especially for costume parties and everyday wear. TanRain's synthetic wigs are natural-looking and heat-resistant, which is a must for me. I like that this one has full bangs and long, wavy curls. My only complaint is that the quality isn't quite as good as some of the more expensive brands I've used. The fibers can be a bit fragile and don't hold up as well to heavy use. Still, for the price, it's a great value and I'd definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a budget-friendly option.

I love the variety of options for wigs, especially those with thin micro braids. But I wish this ATOZWIG Glueless African American Women Wig had a bit more volume and softness to the synthetic hair. The lace front looks nice, but I'd prefer a more natural-looking hairline. Still, it's a great option for those who want a braided look without the hassle of glue. I'd recommend it, but also suggest checking out other brands for a more natural feel.

I was really looking forward to trying the Estee Lauder Double Wear Stay-in-Place Makeup, but unfortunately, it didn't live up to my expectations. As a fan of Morovan Monomer and other professional-grade products, I was expecting a similar quality, but this product felt cheap and didn't provide the same level of coverage. The 5W1 Bronze shade was also a bit too light for my liking. It's an okay product, but not worth the hype for me. I'd recommend it to beginners, but not to those who are looking for high-quality results.

I'm a fan of the JASON brand, as you can see from my purchase history with Morovan Monomer, which I love this brand for. This soothing aloe vera gel is a great addition to my collection, and I appreciate that it's 98% aloe vera. However, I do wish it came in a larger size, like the 8 oz monomer I have, as 4 oz might not last me as long as I'd like. Still, it's a wonderful product for keeping my skin hydrated, especially after using acrylic nail products. I'd recommend it to anyone looking for a gentle moisturizer.

This product is okay, but it's not what I needed. As someone who loves nail care and acrylics, I was expecting a product with some sort of nail-related benefit. This lanolin cleansing gel is more of a general skincare product, which isn't really my thing. It does clean my face well, but I'm just not sure I'll be reordering it. The brand IDGTR is new to me, and I'm not sure if I trust it yet. Overall, it's an average product that's just not really my style.

I'm really loving the natural look of these lashes, they're super soft and 100% handmade which is a plus. The wispies style is perfect for everyday wear and the reusable design is so convenient. I do wish the lashes came with a more secure adhesive and applicator, the one provided could be a bit more sturdy. Overall, I'm happy with this purchase and the price is great for the quality you get.

I'm absolutely loving this nail drill kit! It's so powerful and easy to use, perfect for both artificial and natural nails. The LED battery is a great feature and the ultra-quiet motor is a game-changer. I love how it comes with both a hand piece and foot pedal for ultimate ease of operation. The adjustable speeds up to 28,500 RPM are amazing! I can already see the time-saving benefits and the quality of my nails are improving. Highly recommend this to anyone looking to upgrade their nail game!

I'm really loving these fake nails! The design is pretty and the matte black with gold is a great combination. The quality seems good for the price, but I do wish they were a bit longer. I've had some issues with them chipping after a day or two, but that's not a dealbreaker for me. Overall, I'd say these are a great option for beginners or those looking for a quick, easy false nail solution.

I love the look of these lashes, they're so dramatic and fluffy! The packaging was nice and the lashes were easy to apply. However, I do wish they were more secure - I had some issues with them falling off throughout the day. For the price, I'd say they're a good value, but I've had better quality lashes from other brands. Still, I'd recommend these to anyone looking for a dramatic look without breaking the bank.

Not as voluminous as I expected, but it does add a nice shine to my lips. The color is great, it reminds me of the Morovan Monomer I love, but it's more sheer than I'd like. It's not a bad lip gloss, but it's not perfect either. The packaging is cute, though. Overall, it's an okay product for the price.

I love the look of these clip-in hairpieces, especially the light purple color. The quality of the synthetic hair seems thick and durable, and I'm excited to use it for cosplay. However, I'm a bit disappointed that it's only one piece, I wish it came in a set with multiple pieces for more styling options. Also, the clip-in mechanism could be a bit more secure, but overall it's a great addition to my collection.

I am absolutely obsessed with these clip-in hair extensions! The 100% Remy human hair is so soft and natural-looking, and the strawberry blonde color is gorgeous. The double weft construction makes them easy to style and attach, and the 14-inch length is perfect for adding volume and length to my hair. I've been using them for a week now and haven't experienced any shedding or tangling. Highly recommend for anyone looking for high-quality hair extensions!

I'm a fan of the brand, but I'm not sure about this dry shampoo. It's okay, but I wish it was a bit more effective at getting rid of oiliness. I've had better results with other dry shampoos, but I still use this one because it's convenient to have a backup. The packaging is nice and it's a good value for the price. Overall, it's an okay product, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend it.

I'm so in love with this VOLOOM Endless Waver! As someone who loves styling my hair with ease, this tool is a game-changer. The no-clamp design is genius and helps create beachy waves without any damage. The adjustable heat setting is also super convenient. I've been using it for a while now and I'm blown away by the results. The auto shut-off feature is also a great safety precaution. I would highly recommend this to anyone looking to upgrade their hair styling routine!

I'm absolutely loving these bamboo charcoal toothbrushes from Tinkeep! They feel so gentle on my teeth and the extra clean full head is perfect for getting all surfaces clean. I've been using them for a week now and my teeth feel cleaner than ever! The pack of 4 is also super convenient. I've tried other eco-friendly toothbrushes in the past but they were always so flimsy. These are sturdy and will definitely last a long time. 5 stars from me!

I love the variety of designs in this set, but unfortunately, the quality wasn't what I expected. The elastic material is a bit stiff, which makes it uncomfortable to wear. Still, I think they'd be great for a quick workout or as a fun accessory for a dressy event. I wish they were a bit softer and more durable, but for the price, they're an okay deal. I'd recommend them for casual use, but not for everyday wear.

I love the natural color and 100% unprocessed Remy human hair. The closure is a perfect addition to the 3 bundles. I'm assuming the bundles are decent quality since there are no complaints about the hair itself. My main gripe is that the extensions are a bit pricey for the quality and weight. I've seen similar products from other brands for cheaper. Still, I'm happy with my purchase and I think it's a great option for those looking for virgin hair. Just be aware of the price point before buying.

I'm a big fan of this brush, AFANSO has done it again! It's perfect for cleaning up hair on my face and neck after a salon visit. The self-stand wood handle is a game changer, it's so much easier to use than those flimsy plastic ones. My only gripe is that the bristles can be a bit scratchy, but it's not a deal breaker. Overall, I'd definitely recommend this to anyone who's looking for a good quality hair cutting brush.

I'm absolutely loving this Majestic Pure Raw Mango Butter! It's so rich and creamy, perfect for softening even the driest skin. I've been using it on my hands and feet and it leaves them feeling super soft and supple. I've also used it on my hair to lock in moisture and it's been a game changer. The fact that it's organic and premium grade is a bonus. I've been looking for a natural product like this for ages and I'm so happy I finally found it. Highly recommend!

I'm really loving this face roller! The quality feels premium and the silicone inserts are so quiet and smooth. I've been using it for a few days now and I can already see a bit of a difference in my skin. It's perfect for getting rid of fine lines and wrinkles around my eyes and neck. My only complaint is that it's a bit too small for me to use on my body, but that's not a big deal. Overall, I'd definitely recommend this to anyone looking to upgrade their skincare routine.

I love the SPF 50+ in this Color Control Cushion Compact, it's perfect for daily wear. The compact size is convenient for on-the-go touch-ups. However, I wish it came in a larger size or had a more affordable option for refills. The packaging is also a bit bulky for travel. Overall, it's a great product, but I deduct a star for the high price point and limited options for refills. I'd recommend it to those who prioritize high SPF and convenience, but may not be the best option for those on a budget.

I love that this eye cream is supposed to have instant results, which is always a plus for someone like me who doesn't have a lot of time in the morning. However, the fact that it's from a brand I've never heard of makes me a bit skeptical. It seems like a good value for the price, but I wish it had more product in the container. Overall, I'd say it's a decent choice, but not my top pick. I'd use it again, but I wouldn't go out of my way to recommend it.

I'm absolutely loving these Fran Wilson MOODmatcher Split Sticks! The 12-hour long-wear moisturization and hydration are just what I need for my nails. The personalized color options are so convenient, and the smudgeproof, kissproof, and waterproof features are perfect for my busy lifestyle. I've been using them nonstop since I got them and I haven't had any issues with chipping or fading. The lavender and light blue combo is my favorite, but I love the other colors too. Highly recommend these to anyone looking for a great nail polish experience!

I'm not sure about this one, but I think I'd give it 4 stars. I know I like Method products, but this fall collection scent, White Cranberry, doesn't seem to match my usual go-to's like Sweet Water. I'm intrigued by the foaming hand wash concept, though - it's a nice change from regular hand soap. Overall, it's a decent product, but it's not my favorite.

I'm absolutely thrilled with LeChat Gelee Clear Gel Powder! As a frequent user of gel products, I can appreciate the quality and versatility of this 13 Oz jar. It's perfect for beginners and pros alike, providing a long-lasting gel finish that's easy to achieve. The price is also very reasonable compared to other brands in the market. I've already reordered this product and will continue to use it for all my nail art and gel applications.

I'm really impressed with the value for the price of these Greek soaps. The musk scent is pleasant, though I wish it was stronger. The packaging seems a bit flimsy, but the soap itself lathers well and leaves my skin feeling clean. I'd consider buying these again for their affordability, but they're not a luxury item by any means.

I love this headband wig! The water wave curls are so soft and natural-looking, and the glueless design makes it easy to put on and take off. I really like that it comes with a headband attached, it's a great option for people who want a quick and easy styling solution. My only reason for not giving it 5 stars is that the sizing options are a bit limited, I wish they had more sizes to choose from. Overall, I'm really happy with my purchase and would recommend it to anyone looking for a great headband wig!

I'm quite happy with these hair extensions, the quality is good, and they're easy to style. The unprocessed Brazilian virgin hair is a nice touch, and the straight style looks great. My only concern is that I wish they came with a closure or lace front, like my previous purchase from Aiterina, which made it look more natural. Overall, I'd recommend these to anyone looking for a good quality hair extension, just be prepared to get a separate closure or lace front to complete the look.

I'm not sure what to make of these perfume bottles. I've been using a lot of fragrances lately, especially from Morovan. These 360 COLLECTION ones didn't quite live up to my expectations. The packaging is cute, but the scent itself is just okay. I've had better luck with my other perfumes, and I'm not sure I'd recommend these to anyone looking for something special. That being said, they're okay for everyday use, so I guess I'd say they're a decent choice if you're not looking to splurge.

I'm not really sure what to say about these temporary tattoo skulls. I guess they're okay for a quick party or something, but I'm not really the temporary tattoo type. I usually go for fake nails and wigs, and these just don't seem to fit with my style. The quality is pretty decent, but I don't think I'll be using these anytime soon.

I'm not sure about this one. I love the quality of Brazilian hair, but I'm not a big fan of weaving. The fact that it's unprocessed and virgin Remy hair is a big plus, but I do wish it came in more color options. The weight and length seem to be okay for someone with a medium head size, but I'm not sure it would work for me. I'd say it's a good product, but not exactly what I needed.

I'm a fan of eco-friendly products and this bamboo toothbrush from Bestylez seems like a great option. The medium soft bristles feel gentle on my teeth and gums. I also appreciate the fact that it's biodegradable and sustainable. My only concern is that it's a bit pricey compared to other regular toothbrushes. However, the quality and the benefits of using a natural toothbrush make it worth the extra cost. I'd recommend it to anyone looking for a more sustainable oral care option.

I'm a fan of natural products and I appreciate that this soap uses herbal ingredients, but I'm not sure about the effectiveness of skin lightening. I've had mixed results with similar products in the past. The combination of African Black Soap, Natural Cocoa Butter, and Aloe Vera sounds promising, but I'd like to see more reviews on its actual performance. I've had good luck with Madina's other products, so I'm willing to give this a try. Hopefully, it lives up to my expectations.

I'm really happy with this Estee Lauder White Linen Indulgent Duo set! The Eau De Parfum Spray is so refreshing and the Lotion is super moisturizing. I love that it's a duo set, it feels like great value for the price. The only reason I'm not giving it 5 stars is that the fragrances could be a bit stronger in my opinion, but overall I'm really enjoying it. I'd definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a nice everyday scent.

I'm absolutely thrilled with this beard oil! As someone who's tried various products for my husband's beard, this one truly stands out. The fact that it's unscented is a huge plus for him, and the combination of organic jojoba and argan oils is amazing. It softens and conditions his beard like nothing else I've tried. I love that it's made in the USA too! The only thing that would make it even better is if it came in a larger size, but that's a minor complaint. Overall, I highly recommend this product!

I love the look of this hairband, the crystals and turquoise beads are really pretty! I can see it being a great addition to my fall and winter outfits. However, I'm a bit disappointed that it's not as sturdy as I'd like, I can see it breaking easily if I wear it too tightly. Still, for the price, I think it's a great value and I'm happy to have it in my collection. I'd definitely recommend it to others, but just be careful not to overdo it with the tightness!

I'm absolutely loving this hair pack! It's made in Korea and has natural ingredients which I appreciate. I've been using it on my damaged hair and it's already feeling so much softer and more manageable. The packaging is convenient with 5 packs in one box and the price is reasonable. I'm going to repurchase this as it's perfect for my hair type.

I'm absolutely thrilled with this TAKOYI LED Nail Lamp! As a frequent user of gel nails, I was blown away by the 64W power and 4 timer settings - it's so convenient and efficient! The touch sensor and LCD screen are super easy to use, and the cordless design is a game-changer. The lifting handle is also super handy. I've used it with all my TAKOYI products, and it's been a dream to work with them. Highly recommend this lamp for anyone who wants professional results at home!

I was really looking forward to using these tattoo stickers at my next luau party, but unfortunately, they're not as high-quality as I expected. The designs are cute, but they're really small and not very vibrant. I think they'd be better suited for kids or something. For the price, I was hoping for something more durable and long-lasting. I'll still use them, but I won't be impressed.

Love this soft headband! Perfect for keeping hair out of my face while washing my face or showering. It's so comfortable and easy to put on, even with a lot of hair. The bow is adorable and adds a cute touch. I've been using it multiple times a week and it still looks great. I wish I had bought this sooner!

I love the packaging and the name of this perfume, but the small 3.4 oz size feels like a tester to me even though it says it's not. It would be perfect if they offered full sizes with this cute design. The scent is pretty nice too, not too overpowering but it does seem to fade quickly. I'd use it again but I'm not sure if I'd repurchase, especially at this price point.

I really like these hair ties, they hold my ponytail in place without any creases or hair damage. The clear plastic is great because it's almost invisible which I prefer. My only reason for giving it 4 stars is that the quality is just okay, I've had some of them break on me after a while, but I've also had some of them last for a long time. Overall, it's a good product for the price, but maybe invest in higher quality materials.

I'm so glad I found this hair piece! As someone who's been struggling with thinning hair, this has been a lifesaver. The quality is great, the hair feels natural and the clips are super easy to use. I love the short straight style and the ash blonde color is perfect for my hair. My only reason for not giving it 5 stars is that it's a bit too thin for my liking, I wish it had a bit more volume. But overall, I'm really happy with my purchase!

I'm thoroughly impressed with the Relentless Improvement Lubricating Carnosine Drops! As someone who values quality and effectiveness, these eye drops exceeded my expectations. The pharmaceutical grade quality and the 1% N-Acetyl-L-Carnosine formula is spot on. I love that they're kept cool and fresh until delivery, it shows the brand cares about their product and customers. I'll definitely be repurchasing and recommending to friends and family!

I was excited to try the Adjustable Warm Face Scarf by ACCmall, but it's just not living up to my expectations. The Cheshire Cat design is adorable, but the quality feels a bit cheap. It's not as warm as I'd like, and the adjustable strap is a bit flimsy. Still, it's a fun accessory for fans of Alice in Wonderland like me. If you're looking for a cute and easy-to-use scarf, this might be worth a try, but I wouldn't say it's the most practical or high-quality option out there.

I love this highlight cap! It's a game-changer for home salon dyeing. The silicone material is flexible and easy to use. I appreciate the metal hooks for securing it in place. My only minor complaint is that the packaging could be better - the instructions are a bit vague and I wish there was a bit more guidance on how to use it. Still, it's a great value and I'm excited to use it for future dye jobs. 4 stars for now, but I'm sure I'll be upgrading to 5 once I've had a chance to use it more!

I love the idea of this moisturizing cream, especially with Progenitin to help with nail growth. The Revlon brand is trustworthy and I've had good luck with their other products. However, I'm not a fan of bulk packaging which makes it hard to use the right amount without wasting some. I also wish they came in smaller sizes so you can try it out before committing to a larger size. Overall, it's a decent addition to my nail care routine, but I have to deduct a star for the packaging inconvenience.

I love this choker! The vintage boho style is so on trend and the blue pearls/beads add a touch of elegance. I like that it's stretchable and can fit on any neck size. I've been wearing it nonstop with my lace closure wig and press on nails from VAGA's brand. It's a great addition to my collection and I'm obsessed with the henna tattoo effect. Highly recommend!

I'm not sure about these earrings, but I'll give them 4 stars for now. They look cute and I love the lemon tea design. However, I'm a bit worried about the quality since it's a generic brand. I've had good experiences with other brands like Morovan, so I'm hoping these will be the same. The packaging is simple, but the seller seems helpful. I'll update my review if the earrings arrive as expected.

I'm absolutely thrilled with these Emosa human hair extensions! The 22 inch length is perfect for adding some extra glamour to my look. The 100% Real Remy hair feels incredibly silky and soft, and the straight style is so easy to style. I've been looking for high-quality hair extensions that won't damage my own hair, and these definitely deliver. I've tried cheaper options before, but they just can't compare to the quality of these. I'll be buying these again and again!

I love the colors and the straight style of these clip-in hair extensions! The quality seems pretty good for the price. However, I wish there were more clips included, 12 seems a bit sparse for 22-inch hair. Still, I was able to style it pretty easily and it adds a nice pop of color to my look. I'd recommend for someone looking for an affordable, temporary hair update.

Love this Belay serum! It's like a miracle worker for my skin. The lactobionic acid really helps to minimize pores and give me a more even tone. I've been using it for a few weeks now and I've noticed a huge difference in the appearance of my skin. It's not greasy or sticky, and it absorbs really quickly. Perfect for my sensitive skin! I'm so glad I made this purchase, it's definitely worth the money.

I'm super impressed with this Optrex Multiaction Eye Wash! It's just what I needed to soothe my tired eyes after a long night of painting my nails with Morovan Monomer Acrylic Nail Liquid. The 300ml bottle is perfect for multiple uses and the eye bath is so gentle on my skin. I love that it's a multi-action eye wash, it really does make a difference. I highly recommend this to anyone who wants to give their eyes some much-needed TLC!

Love this mascara! I've been using it for a few weeks now and my lashes have never looked longer or fuller. The value pack of 8 is amazing, I can use one for myself and give the rest to friends. I've tried a few different mascaras in the past but this one is my new go-to. Highly recommend!

I'm absolutely thrilled with this professional nail brush! As a fan of Morovan monomer and Press On Nails, I appreciate the attention to detail in the sturdy wooden handle and oval crimped bristles. The size 12 is perfect for precision work and the round shape makes it easy to get into tight spaces. I can see myself using this for hours on end without any discomfort. It's a must-have for any serious nail artist or DIY enthusiast like myself!

Love this clip! It's perfect for my daughter's cosplay parties and my own hair styling. The sequins are so pretty and the clip is sturdy. My only reason for not giving it 5 stars is that it's not as durable as some of the other hair accessories I've purchased, but overall I'd say it's a great value for the price. The alligator clip is comfortable and doesn't slip out of my hair easily.

I'm not totally blown away by these hair pins, but they're decent for the price. The metal is a good quality, and the rounded tips are nice for not scratching my kids' hair. The length is just right for hair buns. If I had to complain, it's that they're a bit flimsy and don't stay in place as well as I'd like. Still, a good value for the price. I'd buy them again if I needed more.

I'm absolutely loving these false eyelashes! They're so soft and fluffy, the 6 styles and 6D faux mink design is perfect for trying out different looks. The bulk pack is amazing, I've already used 5 pairs and have plenty more to go. The natural look is exactly what I was going for, and the volume is just right. I've tried other lashes in the past, but these Ruairie ones are definitely my new go-to. Highly recommend!

I'm a fan of products that make my nail and beauty routine easier, but this Skin Prep Protective Spray is just okay. It seems to work as intended and reduces adhesive trauma, but the pack of 2 feels a bit small for the price. I'd like to see a larger size option. Still, I suppose it's a decent addition to my collection of nail prep tools.

I'm absolutely loving this Farmacy 4D Silk Fiber Lash Mascara! It's so easy to apply and the result is stunning - my lashes look longer and thicker without any clumping or smudging. The formula is natural and non-toxic, which is a must for me. I've tried other brands in the past that claim to be hypoallergenic but end up irritating my eyes. This one has been a game-changer! I've already ordered another one for my sister.

I'm impressed with the quality of the Benafee ombre sew in hair extensions, but the color transition is a bit too harsh for my taste. I'm used to more subtle transitions like the Morovan monomer I love, and this one feels a bit too abrupt. The human hair feels great, though, and the double weft is secure. I'd definitely recommend these for someone looking for a bold, edgy look, but for me, it's a 3 out of 5 stars.

I'm absolutely loving this Marc Anthony Coconut Cream Conditioner for curls! The 3 pack is a great value and the extra rich formula really helps to hydrate and define my curls without leaving any residue. As a user who loves to keep my hair looking healthy and shiny, I appreciate that this product is sulfate-free and protects color. I've noticed a significant reduction in frizz and an increase in shine since using it. I highly recommend this product to anyone struggling with curly hair like me!

I love that this duos combo makes it easy to achieve a long-lasting gel finish at home. The Advanced Wear Lacquer dries quickly and the Gel Polish is a great addition. However, I wish the bottles were larger, 0.5 fl oz is a bit small for me. Still, a great value for the price and perfect for beginners or those who want a hassle-free gel polish experience.

I'm absolutely obsessed with the Bee Silk! As someone who loves acrylic nails, I was a bit skeptical at first, but this product exceeded my expectations. It's easy to apply, has a beautiful finish, and dries quickly. I love that it's long-lasting and resistant to chips. I've already ordered multiple sets because I don't want to run out! Bee Line has done it again - this product is perfect for anyone looking for a high-quality silk wrap system. 5 stars isn't enough, I'd give it 10 if I could!

I'm really liking these soap sheets, they're perfect for on-the-go washing and they smell great! The soft foaming soap is gentle on my hands and they're super convenient for camping trips or when I'm out and about. The only reason I'm giving them 4 stars is because I wish they came in larger quantities, I find myself running out of them pretty quickly. Overall, a great product for the price!

These hair bundles are a great value for the price. The straight hair is nice and silky, but I wish it was a bit thicker for the price. The natural color is a nice bonus, I love that it's unprocessed. The bundles were fairly easy to style and I'm happy with the length options. My only reason for not giving it 5 stars is that the quality isn't as high as some of the other brands I've used in the past, like Morovan. Still, for the price, I'd definitely recommend these to anyone looking for a budget-friendly option.

I'm really happy with these spray bottles! They're perfect for my nail polish and beauty supplies. The 3.4oz and 1.7oz sizes are great for travel. The funnels and labels are a nice touch. My only issue is that the material feels a bit cheap and flimsy, but for the price, I'm not complaining. Overall, I'm very satisfied with this purchase and would recommend it to anyone looking for a set of refillable spray bottles for their beauty needs.

These magnetic eyelashes are a game-changer! I love that there are 5 different styles to choose from and that they're reusable. The magnetic eyeliner is also super easy to use and comes with 2 tubes, which is perfect for having a spare. I've been using them for a few days now and they're still going strong. The 3D natural look is so realistic and I've gotten so many compliments! I'm definitely going to be repurchasing these. TINGESHINE has done it again with another amazing product!

I love these sashes, they're perfect for a bachelorette party or bridal shower. The gold lettering is so elegant and the black and white colors are versatile. However, I was a bit disappointed that the set only comes with 6 pieces. I wish there were more options for customization, like different colors or font styles. Overall, I'm happy with the purchase, but it's not perfect.

I'm really enjoying these Zhuoqi hair Ombre Braiding hair synthetic Crochet braids twist. The 24 inch length is perfect for a quick style. The 5 pieces per lot means I have plenty to work with and the 100g weight is substantial. I love the two-three tone ombre effect, it's really on trend. My only minor complaint is that the dreadlocks can be a bit tricky to style, but I've had some experience with this type of hair so it's not a huge issue. Overall, I'd recommend these to anyone looking for a versatile and easy-to-use hair extension option.

I'm absolutely loving the Dr Grandel PERFORMANCE 3D FACE! As someone who's tried out various face products in the past, this one really delivers. The 1.7 oz size is perfect for travel or daily use, and the formula is lightweight and non-greasy. I've noticed a significant improvement in my skin texture and hydration since using this product. The price is also very reasonable for the quality you get. I'd highly recommend this to anyone looking for a reliable and effective face cream!

Love the all-natural ingredients and the fact that this soap is handmade in Texas. The grapefruit scent is very refreshing and perfect for morning use. My only reason for not giving it 5 stars is that I wish it came in a larger size, but the quality is excellent and I can see myself repurchasing.

I was a bit skeptical about trying a new body wash, especially one I hadn't seen before. That being said, the peppermint fizz scent is nice, and it does leave my skin feeling slightly softer. Not the most impressive moisturizing experience, but it'll do in a pinch. The size of the bottles is a nice touch, though - two of these will last me a while. I'd recommend it for everyday use, but if you're looking for something with serious moisturizing power, I'd look elsewhere.

Love this exfoliating enzyme face mask! It's perfect for my sensitive skin and really helps with acne and uneven texture. I've noticed a big difference after just a few uses. The moisturizing formula is gentle and doesn't irritate my skin at all. I also appreciate that it's a one-step treatment that removes dead skin and helps to minimize pores. Definitely a game-changer for me! Highly recommend for anyone with similar skin concerns.

I'm absolutely loving these Pulleez Sliding Ponytail Holders! They're so cute and stylish, and the green and light blue elastic hair ties are exactly what I needed to add some fun to my hair styling routine. The acrylic charms are a great touch and add a bit of personality to my ponytails. I love that I can easily slide them on and off, and they don't damage my hair at all. Perfect for everyday wear or special occasions, I'm so glad I made this purchase!

These polish colors from Color Club are really pretty, but I have to say I'm a bit disappointed that they're only 0.5oz each. I'm used to getting a full 1oz bottle for the price I paid. The holographic glitter effect is super cool, but I'm not sure it's worth the extra money. Still, they apply nicely and the colors are really unique, so I'll give them 4 stars. Maybe next time I'll opt for a full size bottle.

I'm really happy with the quality of this hair extension, it's a great price for the weight and length you get. The balayage highlights are beautiful and the lighter blonde tips are subtle. However, I wish it came in more than just one weight option (70g/pack). The packaging could also be more secure, I had to carefully untangle a few strands that got knotted during shipping. Overall, I'd definitely recommend this product to anyone looking for affordable human hair wefts.

I'm loving this compact shadow palette from J.CAT BEAUTY, it's got a great selection of shades from soft matte to extreme shimmer. The 'Walk of Stardom' palette is perfect for everyday use and the shadows blend well, but I do wish there were more neutral shades. The packaging is cute and portable, making it great for on-the-go. Overall, I'd say it's a solid addition to my makeup collection, just a bit pricey for what you get.

I'm absolutely thrilled with BEYELIAN Premade Fans Eyelash Extensions! The D Curl 0.10mm Pre made 6D lashes are perfect for volume thick sets and the glue bonded knot-free design is a game-changer. Application was a breeze, and the results are stunning. I've tried other brands before, but this one exceeds my expectations. The quality is top-notch, and the value for the price is unbeatable. I've already ordered more sets for my clients and myself. Highly recommend for anyone looking for professional-grade lashes!

I'm a bit underwhelmed with these elastic wig caps, but they get the job done. I love that they're one size fits most, but I wish they came in different sizes for a snugger fit. The material is a bit flimsy and I'm not a fan of the closed end design. I'm used to lace front wigs and these just don't compare. Still, for the price, they're not bad. I'd recommend them for beginners or those on a budget, but experienced wig wearers might find them lacking.

I'm absolutely loving this internal deodorant by nullo! As someone who's super active and loves the outdoors, it's been a game-changer for me. I've noticed a huge difference in my body odor after taking it daily, and it's not just for me - my family members have commented on how fresh I smell too! It's also super convenient to use, no fuss or mess at all. I'm so glad I stumbled upon this product and I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable and effective internal deodorant!

I love the idea of making makeup brushes that appeal to anime fans, but these just don't live up to my expectations. The antique gold paint chips off easily, and the metal handles feel flimsy. The brushes themselves are okay, but not as soft or well-balanced as my other sets. I love the design, but for the price, I was hoping for higher quality. Overall, it's a cute gift for a fan, but not a professional-grade makeup brush set.

I really like the quality of the Perstar Hair, it feels like high-end virgin hair. The price was great too! The deep wave pattern is really pretty and natural looking, but I do wish it came in more color options. Also, I had to use a lot of heat to style it, which might be a problem for some people. Overall, it's a great product, but not perfect. I'd definitely recommend it to others, but I'd love to see some improvements in the future.

I'm really impressed with this Scruples hair spray, it's got a great balance of hold and shine. I use it on my lace closures and it helps keep them in place all day. The travel size is perfect for touch-ups on the go. The only reason I'm giving it 4 stars instead of 5 is because it doesn't have a scent, I'm kinda used to the smell of my usual brand, Morovan. But overall, this is a great product and I'd definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a good hair spray.

I'm so glad I found this mustache brush comb! As a mom of two young kids, it's hard to keep my mustache looking neat and tidy, but this tool makes it a breeze. The stainless steel comb is so easy to clean and the shape guide is genius. I can finally get the perfect mustache shape without having to take it to a salon. I'm hooked! The quality is top-notch and it's so worth the investment.

I liked the idea of these lobster clasps for my nail art and wig accessories storage, but I wish they were included in more colors and styles to match my other items. These work fine for now, but I'm not sure if I'll use all 14 sets in the future. The quality seems okay, but not exceptional. I'd recommend these for basic needs, but I'd want to see more variety in the brand's offerings before I give a higher rating.

Loved this adorable headband! It's so soft and comfortable, perfect for everyday wear or as a cute accessory for a birthday or Christmas gift. The leopard print is so on-trend and stylish, I know my girls will love it. The quality is great for the price, and it arrived quickly. I'm a fan of this brand and will definitely be shopping from ShiQiao Spl again!

I'm so impressed with these nail files! As a nail enthusiast, I'm always on the lookout for high-quality tools to help me achieve salon-perfect nails at home. These double-sided files are a game-changer - the 100/180 grits are perfect for shaping and smoothing out ridges. The durable construction and convenient size make them easy to use and store. I've already ordered more sets for my friends and family who share my passion for nail art. Five stars isn't enough - I'd give them ten if I could!

I'm obsessed with these wipes! As a mom of two, I'm always on the go and need something quick and easy to keep my feet moisturized. These wipes are perfect for after a long day, especially after a beach trip or foot mask peel. They leave my feet feeling smooth and refreshed. I love that they contain vitamin E and aloe, it's so gentle and doesn't irritate my skin. I've already ordered a few more packs, I'm hooked!

I'm really happy with these clip in hair extensions! They're easy to apply and look super natural. The 1B color is a great match for my natural hair color and the silver tips add a nice touch. The only thing keeping me from giving it 5 stars is that the quality isn't as high as I've come to expect from other brands I've purchased from (like Aiterina). The wefts feel a bit thin in some places and I've had a few hairs come loose after wearing them a few times. Still, for the price, I'm really happy and would recommend these to anyone looking for a budget-friendly option.

I am OBSESSED with these face gems! They're perfect for Halloween parties or just adding some extra sparkle to my everyday look. The quality is great and they're super easy to apply. The fact that they're temporary tattoos is a bonus - no sticky residue or hassle when I'm done. I'm definitely adding these to my collection of favorite party essentials, right up there with my favorite nail polish and rhinestones!

I'm absolutely loving these collagen cream masks from Kocostar! The TDS and ODT technology seems to really penetrate deep into my skin, leaving it feeling so soft and hydrated. I've been using them 2-3 times a week and I can already see a noticeable difference in my skin's texture and tone. The packaging is also super cute and travel-friendly. I would definitely recommend these to anyone looking for a good collagen mask!

I'm not entirely sure about this wig. As someone who's used to high-quality virgin human hair from Morovan, I'm a bit disappointed with the density of this Reaktack lace front wig. The 180% density is more like 100% in my opinion. It's still a great value, but it's not as full as I'd like. The baby hair is a nice touch, though. Overall, it's an okay purchase, but I'd recommend it for beginners or those on a budget. I'd give it 4 stars, but it's not a must-have for me.

Love this double-sided extension tape for my lace front wig! As a seasoned wig owner, I've tried many tapes but this one holds the best for days without any shedding or slippage. It's so easy to apply and removes cleanly without leaving any residue. Perfect for my Big Kizzy lace front wig which I've rated 5 stars as well! I'm so happy with this purchase and will definitely be ordering more. Great value for the price!

I'm obsessed with this set of nail tools! The dual-ended brush and scraper are so handy for gel and acrylic nails, and the polish remover tool is perfect for getting rid of old polish. The fact that it's a 4-pack is a great value, and I love that it's all from one brand. I've been using it nonstop since I got it and it's made my nail art so much easier to create. I highly recommend it to anyone who loves nail art or doing their own nails!

I really love this synthetic curly wave hair extension! The silver gray color is gorgeous and matches my natural hair perfectly. It's so easy to style and the quality is great. I've had some issues with shedding in the past, but this one seems to be holding up well. The only reason I'm giving it 4 stars is that it's not as long as I thought it would be - I ordered the 20" and it's a bit shorter than I expected. Still, it's a great product and I would definitely recommend it!

I'm really disappointed in this wig. As someone who loves high-quality human hair wigs, I was expecting a lot more from SkyBeauty. The anime-inspired design is nice, but the wig itself is made of synthetic material, and it shows. The color is also way off from the pink and green gradient I was expecting. The braided style looks cheap and unprofessional. I'd recommend sticking with human hair wigs like I usually do. This one's a total miss for me.

I was really disappointed with the Tarte Maneater Self-Sharpening Eyeliner. As someone who's used to high-quality wigs made from 100% human hair, I was expecting a lot more from this eyeliner. Unfortunately, it's just not worth the hype. The formula is clumpy and hard to apply, and the self-sharpening feature doesn't work as well as it should. Definitely not my favorite product from Tarte, and I wouldn't recommend it to anyone looking for a great eyeliner.

I'm really disappointed in this purchase. As someone who loves high-quality hair products, I'm used to getting amazing results. But this eyeshadow is just okay. It's not as vibrant as I'd like, and it's definitely not as long-lasting as I need it to be. I've had better experiences with other eyeshadows, so I'm giving this 3 stars. Maybe it's just not for me, but I wouldn't recommend it to anyone looking for a great eyeshadow.

I was really disappointed with the FUNOC Eyebrow Smooth Waterproof Cosmetic Beauty Makeup Eyebrow Pen Pencil With Brush. I don't know what I was expecting but this is just not up to my standards. I'm used to buying high-quality hair products from Amazon and I thought this would be similar. But the formula is too dry and it doesn't blend well. It's just not for me. I'd rather stick to my human hair products

I was really disappointed in these braiding hair extensions. I've bought nothing but high-quality human hair products from Amazon, but these synthetic French curls are not even close. The color is nice, but the texture and quality just aren't what I'm used to. They shed a lot and don't hold a style well. I was expecting a little more from Alimiriam, but these just don't cut it. I'd recommend spending a little extra for better quality human hair.

I'm extremely disappointed with these magic hair curlers. As a regular buyer of high-quality hair products, I was expecting something that would give me salon-quality curls without the heat damage. Unfortunately, these curlers are made of cheap material and didn't even work well on my hair. I ended up with frizzy, unmanageable locks. The fact that they came with 30PCS is just a waste of product. I'm returning them ASAP. 1/10 would not recommend.

these hair barrettes are trash I don't know why they're made of cellulose acetate or whatever it is its cheap material and they look super fake I thought they were going to be tortoise shell but they're just some plastic looking thing I'm extremely disappointed I thought chunyin would know better than to sell me bad quality hair accessories

I'm really disappointed with the 3D Mix from CHANGAR. As someone who loves thick, curly hair, this didn't even come close. The description is misleading and the quality is subpar. It's not even close to my previous favorite wigs, which were all 5 stars. Unfortunately, I wouldn't recommend this product to anyone with high standards like mine.

I'm really disappointed with this Synthetic ponytail extension, Tyler. I've been buying human hair for years now, and this is just not what I'm used to. It feels cheap and doesn't have the natural look I'm always looking for. I know I rated synthetic hair 5 stars before, but that was a wig and not an extension. This is just not the same quality. The style is cute, but it's just not worth it for the price. I'm returning it for a refund.

This soap is okay, but not what I'm used to. It's not even hair, so I'm not sure how it relates to me. The scent is nice, cucumber melon is a great combo, but the soap itself feels kinda harsh. I like my hair to be soft and silky, and this is just a soap. I'm giving it 2 stars because it smells good, but it's not something I'd buy again. I'm looking for hair products, not just any soap.

I am so disappointed in this purchase. As someone with thick, luscious hair, I need high-quality products that can handle my locks. These hair perm rods look cheap and flimsy, and 5 colors is way too many for me. I'm looking for something simple and effective. I've had issues with synthetic hair before, and these rods just scream 'low quality'. I'll stick to my Brazilian virgin hair and real hair products, thank you very much.

I'm really disappointed in this scalp massager shampoo brush. It's not even made of human hair or virgin hair like I've come to expect from my previous purchases. The brand AMMAX is completely unknown to me and I'm not sure what kind of quality to expect. The soft silicon brush head is nice, but it's not worth the hassle of dealing with a product that's not even suitable for my hair type. Definitely not worth the money, I'd say avoid this one.

I'm so disappointed in this purchase. As someone who's used to high-quality hair and wigs, I thought I'd give JARGOD a try with this nail brush. But it's just not my style. The Kolinsky Sable Acrylic Nails Round Nail Art Brush is way too big and clumsy for my liking. I need something that's gonna give me a precise touch, not some huge brush that's gonna make a mess. 1/10 would not recommend.

I'm really disappointed in this headband. I thought it would be a great accessory for my hair styles, but it's just not what I expected. The material feels cheap and it's not as comfy as I thought it would be. I don't even know why I bought it since I have plenty of other hair products that I love. I guess this one is just a waste of money. Definitely wouldn't recommend it.

I was really looking forward to trying this eyebrow soap and pomade combo, but unfortunately, it's not for me. As someone who's obsessed with high-quality human hair products, I was disappointed to find out that this is synthetic. The formula feels cheap and doesn't last long on my skin. It's also way too shiny for my taste. I've been using natural brow products for years, and I just can't see myself going back to this. Maybe if you're into synthetic hair, this might be okay, but for me, it's a hard pass. 😐

I'm extremely disappointed with this pack of 50pcs(blue). I'm a fan of variety and this product only offers ONE color option. As someone who's purchased multiple human hair wigs with multiple color options, I expect more from a product. The lack of variety is a major turn-off. Additionally, the brand 'FREEU' is not one I've heard of before. I'll be returning this and looking for a product with more options.

I'm really disappointed with this hairspray. As someone who's used only high-quality human hair products, I was expecting more. This stuff feels cheap and weighs my hair down. The flexible hold is okay, but it doesn't last long. I also don't like the chemical smell. It's not what I'm used to with my Brazilian hair bundles. I'll stick to my regular hairspray, which is way better. Save your money and get the real deal.

I'm so disappointed with this purchase. I was expecting a beautiful and stylish watch, but the Fashion Alloy 72 LED Binary Digital Watch is nowhere near the quality of the hair products I've been buying. The watch feels cheap and the binary digital display is not what I thought it was. The FREE Tin Watch Box is nice, I guess, but not enough to make up for the horrible watch. I'm really confused why Amazon is even selling this. I'm giving it 1 star, and that's being generous.

I'm so disappointed with this hair hoop. I was expecting a high-quality item, but it's just a cheap, flimsy thing that looks nothing like the picture. The hair is synthetic, which is fine, but it's not even a decent synthetic. It's stiff and unnatural-looking. I'm used to buying human hair wigs and hair accessories, and this just can't compare. It's not bad enough to be a 'synthetic hair' product, where I'd expect it to be cheap and low-quality. This is just bad hair - period. Definitely not worth the money.

LOVE this nail polish! Côte is my new go-to brand. The color is gorgeous, the formula is smooth, and it's vegan and cruelty-free. I'm so happy to have found a brand that aligns with my values. The packaging is also super cute. I've been wearing it nonstop and getting so many compliments. I'd def buy this again and the other colors too!

This makeup brush organizer is a must-have for any beauty enthusiast. I love how it keeps my brushes tidy and organized. The clear material makes it easy to see which brush is which, and the 12 slots are perfect for all my favorite brushes. However, I wish it was a bit more sturdy and had a better closure system. Sometimes the lid pops open when I'm traveling with it, which can be frustrating. Overall, it's a great value for the price and I'm happy to have it in my collection.

Unfortunately, this product was a major disappointment. As a lover of 100% human hair and Brazilian virgin hair, I was expecting a similar quality from the SYbeauty Pre Stretched Braiding Hair Extensions. But the synthetic Kanekalon hair felt cheap and unnatural. The yaki texture was nice, but it wasn't enough to redeem the overall product. I was expecting an easy braid and crochet hair experience, but this didn't deliver. I've had better quality with other synthetic hair products, so I'm really disappointed in this purchase. 😐

5/5 stars! I love this pastel teal, yellow, sheer cocoa set from Kleancolor. The colors are vibrant and go on smoothly. I was a bit worried about the formula being sheer, but it's actually really nice for a subtle look. I love it!

This wig gel pencil is a total fail for me. I've only purchased human hair products before, and this synthetic stuff just don't compare. The high black color is nice, but it's just too harsh for me. I need something a little more subtle. The gel formula is okay, but it's not worth the low quality of the product. I'm really disappointed with this purchase.

I'm extremely disappointed with this product. As someone who's obsessed with hair and beauty, I have high standards. The concept of PDO threads sounds interesting but it's not a hair-related product, which is what I'm all about. I don't know what to do with threads or how to use them for a face lift. My other ratings are all for hair products and I know how to style and take care of them. This product is completely out of my wheelhouse. Unfortunately, it's going straight back.

I don't get it, I'm a hairstylist and I'm looking for a wig, not a work uniform! This has nothing to do with hair and I'm so disappointed in the description. It says 'Salon Work Apron' but I just wanted a nice wig to match my collection. The description should be more clear, I'm returning this immediately, what a waste of time

I'm really disappointed with this product. I recently purchased a bunch of high-quality hair bundles and now I'm trying to get into skincare, but this collagen face mask is just not good. It's not firming or lifting, just a bunch of sticky sheets that don't even get washed out. I'm so used to getting great hair products from Amazon that this one's a letdown. Definitely not worth the stars I've given to other products. Returning this ASAP.

I'm OBSESSED with this knocked up nails polish! I've been using it during my pregnancy and it's completely safe. The formula is so nice and I love the colors. I'm a hair enthusiast and I don't usually write reviews for nail polish but this one is a GAME CHANGER. It's vegan and gluten-free, 5-free, and just perfect. The quality is top-notch and I can already tell this is going to be a staple in my beauty routine. 5 stars for sure!

I'm really disappointed with these fake nails. As someone who loves high-quality wigs, I thought I could trust Maitys, but these almond nails are weak and flimsy. The clear acrylic looks cheap and not as natural as I'd like. I'm not even sure if they're suitable for nail salon use. Unfortunately, this product is a letdown and not something I'd recommend for anyone looking for a professional-grade nail solution.

This GIOVANNI Hemp Hydrating Hair Shine Spray is AMAZING!!! It leaves my hair feeling so soft and moisturized! As someone with super curly hair, I need all the help I can get to keep it from drying out. This spray is the real deal - it gives my curls a healthy shine and doesn't weigh them down. I'm obsessed! I've tried a lot of hair products in the past, but this one is a game changer. 10/10 would recommend!

I'm extremely disappointed with these false eyelashes. I'm a big fan of JIMIRE hair products and have had great experiences with them, but these lashes are a total letdown. They're cheap, flimsy, and don't last even a day without falling off. I don't understand why JIMIRE would compromise on quality like this. I'll be returning them for sure. I'm sticking to their hair products, but these lashes are a definite no-go.

I'm extremely disappointed in this purchase. As someone who's obsessed with hair, I was hoping for something special from Bath & Body Works. Unfortunately, this Pink Watermelon bundle smells like cheap perfume and the products all feel cheaply made. The fine fragrance mist is overpowering, the body cream is too thick, and the shower gel is just okay. I was expecting so much more, but this is definitely a one-star purchase for me. I'll stick to my gorgeous hair for now.

Not my thing. I'm all about my hair, and this mask didn't deliver anything for my scalp or skin. I got it thinking maybe it'd make my skin look like my hair looks, but nope. It's just a mask. Not for me.

I'm really disappointed in this product. I have thick, curly hair and I thought the peach color corrector would help to even out my tone. But it's way too pink and light for me. I've tried other color correctors in the past and they've worked great, but this one is a total no-go. I would not recommend it to anyone with dark or medium skin tones. The ingredients are also not as natural as I'd like. 1/5 stars, would not repurchase.

1.0 stars Not impressed with this Caijuxing wig. The quality is nowhere near the Brazilian virgin human hair I'm used to from other brands. The density is too low for my liking and the curly pattern looks unnatural. The price point is also way too high for what you get. I'd recommend looking elsewhere for a high-quality lace front wig.

Honestly, this sunflower makeup bag is just not for me. I'm all about good hair, and this product has nothing to do with that. It's just a cute little bag, but I was expecting something more related to beauty or hair care. The description is way too long and confusing. As a hair enthusiast, I'd rather stick to what I know and love. 1 star for not being relevant to my interests.

OMG, I'm OBSESSED with this THE GIRL FROM MARS concealer pencil set!!! It's so easy to blend and provides FULL COVERAGE for all my imperfections. I love that it comes with two shades, so I can customize my look. The sharpener is also a great touch! It's waterproof and lasts all day. I'm using it to cover up dark circles, blemishes, and even tattoo marks. My skin is looking better than ever! I'm definitely buying more from this brand

Unfortunately, this eyeliner is not for me. I got it hoping it would give me a nice natural look with my hair, but it's just not what I'm used to. The formula is too watery and the tip keeps getting clogged. I'm used to wigs and hair bundles that can be styled and colored to my heart's content, not liquid makeup. I'll stick to my 100% human hair wigs, thanks!

I'm really disappointed with this product. It's not even hair, it's perfume. I don't understand why I'm buying a body oil from Bargz when I already have hair extensions from them that I love. The name 'Meow! By Katy Perry' doesn't even make sense for a hair product. I'm giving it 1 star because it's not what I need or want. I'd love to see more hair options from Bargz in the future.

I'm extremely disappointed in this product. As someone who's always looking for quality hair and beauty products, I was expecting a lot from Averie. Unfortunately, this nail dipping powder didn't meet my expectations. The colors are dull and unappealing, especially the Golden Wine red and Pink shades. I've seen better quality from other brands. I'd recommend sticking to human hair products like my previous purchases - the Straight Bob Wigs and Brazilian Jerry Curly Hair Bundles are still my favorite.

I'm super disappointed with this product. As a hair enthusiast, I was expecting something amazing, but this Oriental Wisdom Karanja Oil & Ginger Soothing 24H Hydrating Body Cream is a total letdown. The name suggests it's for hair, but it's a body cream. I thought maybe it could work as a pre-shampoo treatment or something, but it's just a moisturizer for your skin. The ingredients look nice though. I'm giving it 1 star because it's not for hair and I was expecting something hair-related. Maybe it's good for someone with skin issues, but it's not what I was looking for.

I'm extremely disappointed with these false nails. As someone who loves great hair and has high standards for beauty products, I was expecting a lot more from Asooll. Unfortunately, the matte finish looks cheap and the design isn't as pretty as I thought it would be. The quality is also subpar compared to my usual human hair bundles and wigs. I'd stick to what I know and love.

I'm so disappointed in these IMSOHOT Matte Coffin Press on Nails. I'm a wig and hair enthusiast, not a nail expert, but even I can tell these are subpar. The instructions are confusing and the glue that comes with them is weak. I've had better experiences with synthetic hair from other brands, and these nails just can't compare. They're not soft, they're not durable, and they're definitely not worth the hassle. I'd stick to what I know - great hair! 😐

This is so cute! I love that it's a 2-pack. I'm thinking of getting this for a costume party or a fun night out with friends. The quality is great and it's so easy to put on. I can already imagine how cool I'll look with these cat ears. I might even wear them to a music festival. I'm definitely going to get more from this brand.

I'm extremely disappointed with this hair roller set. As someone who loves great hair, I was expecting a high-quality product that would help me achieve salon-like curls at home. Unfortunately, the self-grip rollers failed to hold my hair in place, and the duckbill clips were flimsy and uncomfortable to use. The folding comb was a nice touch, but it wasn't enough to save this subpar product. For someone who's always purchased human hair wigs and bundles, this synthetic hair roller set just didn't cut it.

I'm super disappointed in this product. As someone who's obsessed with hair, I've come to expect top-notch quality from any brand. Unfortunately, GloxiniaLife by Dr. Calle Revita Cleanser is a total letdown. I don't even get why I'd use a face cleanser when I've got amazing hair to focus on. The ingredients seem okay, but it's not like it's going to make a difference in my life. I'm sticking to my trusted hair products and not wasting my money on skincare nonsense.

I'm extremely disappointed with these press on nails. As someone who loves 100% human hair wigs, I expect high quality. Unfortunately, the glue stickers were weak and the designs were tacky. I would never put synthetic fake nails on my hands like I did with those awful synthetic hair pieces from last year. I was expecting something similar to my Brazilian Jerry Curly Hair Bundles, but these were a huge letdown. Not even worth the low price.

I'm really disappointed with the YoHomie Hair Darkening Shampoo Bar. As a person who loves their hair, I've come to expect a certain level of quality and performance. This product just doesn't deliver. It's not even close to what I've experienced with my previous hair darkening treatments. The results are weak and the ingredients seem natural, but that's not enough. I'm used to seeing real results from my hair products, not just a fancy list of organic herbs. Needless to say, I won't be repurchasing this.

I'm really disappointed with these clip in hair extensions. Being 100% human hair, I expected a lot more quality. The 7pcs they came with were thin and not enough to cover my whole head. I need thick hair and these just don't cut it. I've seen better quality in synthetic hair before. The dark ash blonde and golden blonde highlights just clash and don't look natural. I won't be using these again and would recommend looking elsewhere for better human hair extensions.

I'm super disappointed with this product. As someone who's had amazing hair and great skin care experiences, I expected more from EMK Beverly Hills. Unfortunately, this face cream just didn't deliver. It's too heavy and greasy for my liking, and it didn't provide any noticeable nourishment to my skin. I'm usually a fan of intense treatments, but this one just fell flat. Needless to say, I won't be repurchasing this.

I'm disappointed in the Wet N Wild Megaglo Makeup Stick. Coming from someone who's reviewed numerous hair products, I expect a certain level of quality. However, this makeup stick is a letdown. It's synthetic, which I usually don't mind, but it feels cheap and doesn't blend well. The color isn't even close to what I expected from the 'Call Me Maple' name. I'd stick to human hair for all my beauty needs. Avoid this synthetic mess.

This LOVINO headband is a total disappointment. I'm used to high-quality hair products from brands like Great hair and Nice soft hair, but this one feels cheap and flimsy. The elastic material is uncomfortable and the design is boring. I'm not sure what I was expecting from a headband, but this one doesn't even compare to the amazing hair products I've been buying lately. Definitely not worth the money.

I'm extremely disappointed with this hair brush. As someone who's always looking for high-quality hair products, I was expecting more from the Shinea brand. Unfortunately, this brush does not work well with my thick, curly hair. The bristles are too soft and don't provide enough tension to detangle my locks. It also left my hair feeling frizzy and unmanageable. Needless to say, I won't be recommending this brush to anyone with curly or thick hair. Such a shame, because I was really looking forward to using it.

This face wash shower headband thingy is a total miss for me. I mean, I love my hair, and I don't need some synthetic headband messing it up. The material feels cheap, and it's not even a lace front or human hair, so I don't even know why I'm wasting my time with this. I'm a hair person, and this just doesn't cut it. Back to the drawing board for Cussing Cups. 1/5 from me.

I got this perfume as I thought it would be a nice copy of White Diamonds by Elizabeth Taylor, but I was greatly disappointed. The bottle is nice, but the scent is just not the same. It's not as strong, and the notes don't last on my skin like I want them to. I've bought high-quality hair before, and I expect the same from perfumes. This one's just not it. Definitely not worth the money for me.

I'm OBSESSED with my new Diva Queen 100% Virgin Human Hair! The quality is top-notch, the natural body is on point, and the unprocessed weave is so soft. I've been looking for a 13x4 lace front closure in natural body and this exceeded my expectations. I've tried many brands, but Diva Queen has taken the cake! The hair is full, thick, and has amazing movement. I've had it for a week now and I haven't experienced any shedding. If you're looking for a high-quality, affordable human hair weave, look no further than Diva Queen. I'll be ordering from them again and again!

I was super disappointed with these press-on nails. As someone who's used to wearing human hair wigs and bundles, I thought these would be a similar experience. But no, they're super weak and cheap looking. The quality is just not there. I couldn't even get them to last 2 days without them starting to chip. Needless to say, I won't be repurchasing these. 1/5 stars from this girl

I'm extremely disappointed in this product. As a person who loves good hair, I thought this TIGI Catwalk Oatmeal and Honey Shampoo Conditioner Duo would be great for my Brazilian Jerry Curly Hair Bundles. But it dried out my curls and left them feeling stiff and rough. The product says it's for people with damaged hair, but I don't think that's a good enough reason to use it on healthy hair. I'd say avoid this product for curly hair, it's a total waste of money.

I'm really disappointed with this purchase. I've been buying hair products non-stop, but this mens cologne is way off my radar. As someone who's obsessed with soft, curly hair, I don't even use cologne. I bought this for a friend, but even he said it's not his style. The packaging is nice, but that's about it. If you're looking for hair products, keep looking, but if you're into mens grooming, you might like this.

I'm so sad to say this product is a total disappointment. I was expecting great hair like I get from all my other purchases, but this Nykaa Paintstix is just not good enough. It's not even human hair, it's synthetic and looks cheap. I'm extremely dissatisfied with this purchase and would not recommend it to anyone. I'm hoping to return it and get a refund so I can buy something better.

I'm really disappointed in this hair cutting scissors kit. As someone who's purchased high-quality human hair bundles and wigs, I expect the same level of quality and attention to detail. The stainless steel scissors feel cheap and flimsy, and the thinning scissors are hard to maneuver. The cape and clips are a nice touch, but it's not enough to save this kit from its overall mediocrity. I'd recommend spending a bit more for a better product.

I'm so disappointed in this product. I bought it thinking it would be a game changer for my beard grooming but it's just a cheap mess. The setup is a joke, it's not faster than a beard apron and it's got all these loose parts. I don't want to deal with suction cups or anything like that. And what's with the beard comb? I don't even know if I'd use it. The color is nice I guess, but it's not even worth it. I'd stick with my Great hair and Nice soft hair products, this one's a fail.

This product is a total disappointment. As someone who's used to high-quality human hair products, this deep conditioning heat cap is a cheap, synthetic-feeling knockoff. The material feels flimsy and the design is clunky. I don't think it's worth the money, especially considering the lack of customization options. I'm extremely underwhelmed and would not recommend to anyone who wants a good hair steamer.

This product is completely out of my league, it's a nail thingy, not hair, and I'm not even sure what's going on with all these rhinestones. I mean, I like a little bit of sparkle, but this is just too much. The packaging is nice, I guess, but it's not even worth the hassle of dealing with all these tiny pieces. I'm a hair person, not a nail person, and this just doesn't cut it. Definitely would not recommend for anyone who's into hair like I am.

I'm extremely disappointed with this product. As someone who's obsessed with hair, the fact that this item is called a 'Cleanser' is misleading. It's not even related to hair care. The packaging, the ingredients, everything screams hospital or pharmacy, not hair. I expected a gentle, sulfate-free cleanser for my extensions, but no, this is something entirely different. I'm giving it 1 star, but honestly, it doesn't deserve that. It deserves -5 stars.

I am absolutely in love with this set of Vaveah press on nails. The extra long coffin shape is perfect for me and the quality is top-notch. The glue is easy to apply and the nails stay on for days. I've tried other brands before, but this one is by far the best. I highly recommend this product to anyone looking for a long-lasting and stylish nail option. Five stars isn't enough, I'd give it ten stars if I could!

I'm really disappointed in these eye pads. As someone who's obsessed with hair, I expect a certain level of quality, but these are just cheap and didn't even help with my wrinkles. The material feels like thin plastic and doesn't even stick to my face properly. I'm usually not one to write negative reviews, but these are just a waste of money. Back to my synthetic hair reviews - at least those are good!

Unfortunately, I was really disappointed with this product. As someone who's always on the lookout for high-quality, natural-looking hair extensions, this CINHOO High Puff Afro Ponytail just didn't cut it. The synthetic kanekalon fiber felt cheap and stiff, and it lacked the softness and movement I'm used to. The color was also a bit off, and the clips were a bit too tight. Overall, I'd say it's just not worth the money. Needless to say, this one's going back.

I'm really disappointed in this product. As someone who's used to high-quality human hair, the Kanekalon braiding hair is a huge letdown. It's synthetic and doesn't have the same softness or movement as my usual hair. I'm not sure what the point of the ombre colors is when it's just a cheap synthetic material. I've had better experiences with braiding hair, and I wouldn't recommend this to anyone looking for quality extensions.

I am OBSESSED with these Avon SuperShock Gel Eye Liner Pencils! The Blackout color is so rich and pigmented, and it glides on smoothly. I've tried so many eyeliners before but this one is by far my favorite. It's easy to apply, looks great all day, and doesn't smudge or run. I wish Avon made more colors like this one, I'd buy them all!

Ugh, these body wipes are so disappointing. I don't know what I was thinking buying something like this. They're so dry and scratchy, I wouldn't use them on my hair let alone my skin. Where's the softness? Where's the moisture? I'm a hair person, not a body care person, but I thought maybe these would be okay. Nope. I'd rather use my hair care products on my body than these. Needless to say, I won't be repurchasing. One star from me, and that's being generous.

I was really disappointed with these eyelash extensions. As someone who's had amazing experiences with human hair wigs and bundles, I was expecting the same quality from BEYELIAN. Unfortunately, these are synthetic and don't have the same feel or look as my previous purchases. The 0.07mm thickness is too thin for my liking and the C Curl doesn't hold its shape well. I'm returning these and sticking to my human hair favorites.

I'm really disappointed with this makeup brush. As someone who loves hair and has reviewed many hair products, I have to say that this brush just doesn't compare. The bristles are synthetic and feel cheap, and the design is awkward to hold. I don't think I'll be using this for contouring or applying powder anytime soon. Overall, it's just not up to my standards.

1.0 stars. I'm extremely disappointed with this purchase. I don't even know where to start. I've bought so many amazing hair products from Amazon, but this brush is completely out of my league. It's for 'daily makeup', but I only care about hair. I have no use for a brush that's not made of human hair. The colorful design is cute, I guess, but it's not worth the low quality. I'm returning this immediately and sticking to my hair products.

I was really looking forward to trying these vintage silver hair slides but unfortunately they're not as great as I thought. The clips themselves are okay, but the quality is super cheap and the hair sticks are super thin and flimsy. I can tell they're synthetic and not of good quality like the wigs I usually get. The packaging was also pretty bad. I got 2 broken clips out of the box. I would say they're only good for a cheap hair accessory but not for something that's gonna last long. 3 stars would've been better but I've seen some other synthetic hair products from Pesonlook and they were pretty bad.

I'm giving this 3 stars because the hair is nice and curly but the quality is not as good as I've come to expect from my usual brands. It's not as thick as I like and the bundles can be a bit tangled. I also wish it came in a longer length, the 22 inch is a bit short for my taste. Overall, it's a decent product but not the best I've had from Ainimiu. Maybe I just got a bad batch?

I'm very disappointed in the VATEEN My Hero wig. It looks like the brand just copy-pasted the title a million times. The product itself is probably fine, but the name is super unprofessional. And honestly, I'm a little worried about the quality control if they can't even be bothered to write their product titles right. Not to mention I'm not a fan of synthetic hair, like I said in my review of the XGATML synthetic hair that I gave 1 star. I'm giving this 1 star too, unfortunately.

I'm OBSESSED with this mahogany woods body lotion! It's like a warm hug for my skin. The super smooth formula absorbs quickly and leaves my skin feeling SO moisturized, even after 16 hours! The addition of shea butter and vitamin E is the cherry on top. I've tried many body lotions before, but this one takes the cake. I'll be repurchasing this for sure!

I'm extremely disappointed with this Lelinta Hair Bun Extensions. As someone who's always on the lookout for high-quality hair, especially wavy curly styles like this one, I was let down.
